name: Tammy
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Reaching out with some good news:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2811%2E35263%2Ew3Zm7e)
Peter — Tammy here reaching out with some good news: My team let me know we are only a few donations away from getting our grassroots fundraising back on track! I’m reaching out one last time because every dollar matters in a race as close as ours. My opponent has spent _millions_ flooding Wisconsin’s airwaves with his campaign ads. Combined with the attack ads that five different dark money groups are running against me, Republicans have already dropped more than $14 million in Wisconsin. We need to step up our fundraising if we’re going to keep pace with right-wing spending and defend this Senate seat. So, will you chip in to help us reach our goal before midnight? Here’s a secure link you can use to donate: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-jun24](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun24.Hijekx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240615_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2811%2E35263%2Ew3Zm7e)** Thanks, Tammy

clean_body: We have exactly 142 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 There are 142 days until Election Day 🚨 142 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. And President Joe Biden knows this, so he’s calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: Republicans have raised a staggering $47 million this cycle, making this an even tougher battle to win. We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – there’s a hell of a lot more to do. Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory this November: Strategize with our candidates in these final months Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line Invest in pivotal races to ensure every vote counts Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you, to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a crucial part of this team, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund. name: Adam Schiff
subject: We simply cannot fall short this month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

We’re just a few hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline — the
last benchmark before our quarterly FEC deadline at the end of the month —
and we’re a few hundred dollars short of where we need to be.

The truth is, we can’t fall short this month.

Not when Trump has held several high-dollar fundraisers in California.

Not when he’s turned his criminal charges into record fundraising hauls.

Not when GOP super PACs have committed millions of dollars to attack ads
in our state.

Not when so much is on the line, and my opponent, Steve Garvey, is a
far-right Republican who will back a MAGA agenda in the Senate.

Not when Steve Garvey raised almost $5 million last quarter, the second
most on the GOP's right-wing online donation platform — second only to Ted
Cruz.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=june2024_abs_em.GGnUBV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]So with a few hours until our mid-month deadline, I’m asking you to
pitch in a few dollars to help us close the gap in our fundraising. Any
amount makes a difference.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]EXPRESS DONATE

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m forever grateful for your ongoing support,
Derek. Even if you can’t chip
in today, reading this email means a lot to me.

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240615_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=6699%2E5257348%2EQtj-vK ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
we must act NOW
| | |
---
Friend, I'm sorry to start this email with bad news, but I don't have anywhere else to turn.
**New polling shows this Ohio race is still tight, which is not where we want to be in a race that could decide Senate control.**
The good news is there's still time to right the ship – but we must act NOW. I set a personal goal to raise $100,000, and I'm counting on you to help us get there by midnight: [**Please, friend, will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86983878/479654690/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5125-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWJiOGQ4MC03NTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yi8xvB6XZrKukjWX_VIwtKChJSTBEOaS6fGOo6ZfYHI=)
The stakes couldn't be higher. Reproductive freedom, affordable health care, our fight for the Dignity of Work, and more are on the line.
We have so much to fight for, but it's going to be a tough one. Right now, my wealthy opponent is pouring millions of dollars of his own money into this race.
**But with your grassroots support at this critical moment, I know we can turn this around and win. Your support is how I've won every tough race before, and I'm counting on you to come through now.**

falling short of our critical mid-month goal.

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: More important than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
I'll be honest: not every day in Congress is a great one.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=zAyNBCNm4SKfbhKFSFCdpPFzkvo7fxMQ5a4FkQXTveHPHOQvrURv11RP2i0Lm9%2B2Er7XstTBaIO1UeX539NqE7V%2FKuAlyo1vI8Gf%2BCVj7GJVZCPE71TQgRnZsMb3dL9MA4uQ8oq1s4%2F14JyyuZHBJKCCjCO0ibucEcohz1no09x5%2B4rTX69stkmpTx0dz6om75s9DO2EJgMX%2BpkODSkOXvl%2BpgVhdUzuU1n%2BuZ5V%2BGOn6Ku4zokNe7O4ALEPTkDC0d3%2FY16mMGmbKgMO8Ov3OCLnrzOU1xxxzaz09OuiQbcquEYLKKUxTeZmm%2BylIYSWchbaPSn%2BCfrVm5mfFmHdACJIFWiK6UAWVat3yDOpdKdl7D0rSxdjw3G88IHKgh%2FXcQcCFR7BPdEtY6HDlMc7Y2RlqSZi1O0B3GQL3ZtCauoIH8srfTpuxxYrjhV6lvmh)

| |

I'll be honest: **not every day in Congress is a great one.** There are days when real legislation that could keep our country on the path of progress is upended by partisan politics. But let me be clear: it's times like these that I'm reminded of just how important our work is. Because if we're not fighting for progress, who will? It's you and me in this together, and I'm counting on your support to keep up the good work we're championing in Congress: [Before my upcoming fundraising deadline right around the corner, will you chip in to my re-election campaign today? Any amount helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86984128/479676918/-970032967?source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_061524_1_1_Honest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjZiZjQxN2EtN2MyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rr-S2YusP7dUdmwFXO6UToLP7Qpl5eUknTAHjxhpo60=) | | **[CHIP IN TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86984131/479676921/-970032967?source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_061524_1_1_Honest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjZiZjQxN2EtN2MyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rr-S2YusP7dUdmwFXO6UToLP7Qpl5eUknTAHjxhpo60=)**
---
This fight is far from easy.
Just take a look at what happened last week, when Senate Republicans voted to block the _Right to Contraception Act._
A bill that would protect a woman's right to birth control at a time when reproductive rights are under attack across the country (also a measure that 80% of voters —**including 72% of Republicans** — support), was rejected because of political extremism.
Days like those aren't the best. **They also happen to be the days when standing together strong and pushing forward is more important than ever.**
And that's exactly what we're doing here. CA-25's future is in our hands, and we can't let it be taken by an extremist Republican like my opponent. [I need your help to defend our seat, our progress, and our future: Will you support me with a contribution of $10, $25, or even $50 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86984134/479676924/-970032967?amount=25&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_061524_1_1_Honest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjZiZjQxN2EtN2MyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rr-S2YusP7dUdmwFXO6UToLP7Qpl5eUknTAHjxhpo60=)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

clean_body: I'll be honest: not every day in Congress is a great one. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | I'll be honest: not every day in Congress is a great one. There are days when real legislation that could keep our country on the path of progress is upended by partisan politics. But let me be clear: it's times like these that I'm reminded of just how important our work is. Because if we're not fighting for progress, who will? It's you and me in this together, and I'm counting on your support to keep up the good work we're championing in Congress: = | | = This fight is far from easy. Just take a look at what happened last week, when Senate Republicans voted to block the Right to Contraception Act. A bill that would protect a woman's right to birth control at a time when reproductive rights are under attack across the country (also a measure that 80% of voters —including 72% of Republicans — support), was rejected because of political extremism. Days like those aren't the best. They also happen to be the days when standing together strong and pushing forward is more important than ever. And that's exactly what we're doing here. CA-25's future is in our hands, and we can't let it be taken by an extremist Republican like my opponent. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = I'm proud to have you by my side, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

body:
#
Peter — remember Todd Akin?
He was the GOP U.S. Senate candidate Missourians rejected by **_double digits_** after he exposed just how extreme his anti-abortion beliefs were.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52548?refcode=em20240615-5768&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5768%2E614464%2EsjgHNj)
**This year, everyone is waiting for Josh Hawley to have his "Todd Akin moment."** After all, with reproductive freedom — from abortion to birth control to IVF — on the line in Missouri and across the country this year, there’s plenty of opportunity.
**But the truth is, as a lifelong crusader against reproductive healthcare, Hawley has already had a whole career of "Todd Akin moments."**

clean_body: Peter — remember Todd Akin? He was the GOP U.S. Senate candidate Missourians rejected by double digits after he exposed just how extreme his anti-abortion beliefs were. This year, everyone is waiting for Josh Hawley to have his "Todd Akin moment." After all, with reproductive freedom — from abortion to birth control to IVF — on the line in Missouri and across the country this year, there’s plenty of opportunity. But the truth is, as a lifelong crusader against reproductive healthcare, Hawley has already had a whole career of "Todd Akin moments." Lucas Kunce is running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate because he wants to be a real warrior for working Missourians — someone who will actually stand up to protect and defend our freedoms, not some corrupt politician who wants to rule over every aspect of our lives. That message is already resonating with everyday people, from all parties, all across the state. But we need your help to keep reaching voters with every single one of Josh Hawley’s "Todd Akin moments" every day between now and November 5. So we’re asking for your help: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, Team Kunce HQ | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

Folks, we’re just a few hours out from our campaign’s mid-month deadline, so I’m hoping you’ll hear me out one last time. Right now, my multimillionaire, hedge fund executive opponent is on the air with her second TV ad — **reaching voters statewide this week as a new poll shows us in a dead heat.** Frankly, my challenger doesn’t need the kind of grassroots support our campaign relies on every day. She has a huge war chest and has already poured $500,000 into her own campaign. At any moment, she could put millions more behind another ad campaign. She thinks this is an auction, not an election. Our campaign needs to reach each and every fundraising milestone between now and Election Day to stay competitive and power our voter outreach. But we’re still a bit short of tonight’s goal. **[**Can you chip in $10 or any amount to help keep New Mexico and the Senate blue? name: JoeBiden.com
subject: If Donald Trump wins this election…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If President Biden can’t keep up and doesn’t have the resources he needs to win, he won’t. Donald Trump will win. It’s that simple. | | |
---
We need you to stop for a minute and think about this: _Peter, can you imagine what will happen if Donald Trump wins this election?_ We saw the damage he inflicted on our country last time. He separated families at the border, led the crusade to gut our health care, and told people to inject bleach during the COVID-19 pandemic. He provoked a violent insurrection on the Capitol. It was awful. _We hate to put this thought in your head, but can you imagine how much worse it will be this time?_ Look, this election will be way closer than any of us want it to be. The polls out of battleground states are razor-thin, and just last month, Trump raked in _$141 million_ to fund his campaign of revenge and retribution. **If President Biden can’t keep up and doesn’t have the resources he needs to win, he won’t. Donald Trump will win. It’s that simple.** [You, Peter, are the key to ensuring that never happens again. Our campaign is powered by folks like you. Will you make your first contribution to reelect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump? clean_body: If President Biden can’t keep up and doesn’t have the resources he needs to win, he won’t. Donald Trump will win. It’s that simple. | | | We need you to stop for a minute and think about this: Peter, can you imagine what will happen if Donald Trump wins this election? We saw the damage he inflicted on our country last time. He separated families at the border, led the crusade to gut our health care, and told people to inject bleach during the COVID-19 pandemic. He provoked a violent insurrection on the Capitol. It was awful. We hate to put this thought in your head, but can you imagine how much worse it will be this time? Look, this election will be way closer than any of us want it to be. The polls out of battleground states are razor-thin, and just last month, Trump raked in $141 million to fund his campaign of revenge and retribution. If President Biden can’t keep up and doesn’t have the resources he needs to win, he won’t. Donald Trump will win. It’s that simple. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Biden-Harris

After immigrating to the United States in 1999, Elizabeth “started attending night classes which would lead her to becoming a social worker, dedicating herself to helping children and families with mental-health issues.”
The _Star-Exponent_ also highlighted Elizabeth’s commitment to the district’s small towns and rural communities, working to expand rural broadband and protect small family farms.
**We can’t take back the House without Virginia’s 7th District, and Elizabeth Guzman is the proven, effective progressive who stands the best chance of keeping this seat blue.**

clean_body: | | | ** The Culpeper Star-Exponent that in the battleground Virginia 7th District, Elizabeth Guzman’s “experience in life drives her to help others who are going through similar issues.” After immigrating to the United States in 1999, Elizabeth “started attending night classes which would lead her to becoming a social worker, dedicating herself to helping children and families with mental-health issues.” The Star-Exponent also highlighted Elizabeth’s commitment to the district’s small towns and rural communities, working to expand rural broadband and protect small family farms. We can’t take back the House without Virginia’s 7th District, and Elizabeth Guzman is the proven, effective progressive who stands the best chance of keeping this seat blue. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. subject: Joe Biden’s involvement in attack on Secret Service has Republicans outraged
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 16, 2024

Joe Biden's
involvement in attack on Secret Service has Republicans outraged

The president has been known to make life difficult for
those who work with him. But no one ever expected this.

As Joe Biden's involvement in an
attack on the Secret Service has Republicans outraged.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

What Jill Biden just
did to U.S. citizens will have you sick to your stomach

The Biden family is
full of bad actors. And that includes the first lady.
➞ Continue Reading

Border Patrol
uncovered this disturbing reality that is spinning heads

We all know the
southern border is a mess. But the latest discovery is downright
scary.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump prosecutor cuts
CNN interview short after being asked one incriminating question

The witch hunt
against Donald Trump is picking up steam. But now one fell flat
on its face.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Are you still with me, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I need to know

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr33hf80k8fea94jlbh2pbgp28e6uoeqsrj83078_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj60oj4cdh2bs)

Friend,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

Ben Carson has the answers in his new book!

Friend, we're thrilled to offer you an exclusive chance to get a **SIGNED COPY** of Dr. Ben Carson's explosive new book, **_The Perilous Fight_**.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Do you know about Joe Biden’s Executive Order 14019?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
URGENT: Biden’s new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden’s personal “Get-Out-The-Vote” machine.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdut3hkjc4ebi11prubdff6vtt09gltlje6slv4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)
Friend,

**URGENT: Biden’s new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden’s personal “Get-Out-The-Vote” machine.**

While courts may take up the case, here’s what I fear the most...

Republicans in Congress do not have the willpower to stop this unprecedented and unconstitutional use of our government to interfere with our elections in 2024. Republicans are already behind the Democratic machine to turn out votes, and this will only increase their efforts.

No wonder Biden and his campaign are “increasingly confident” they will win despite bad polling and collapsing approval numbers.

I’m not going to sit aside and do nothing. And neither should you.

Here’s my solution:

**I am directing Turning Point PAC to fund the largest ballot-chasing army ever in key electoral states. The success of this operation will determine the White House and help elect President Donald J. Trump.**

Here’s how you can help:

[As a personal favor to me, can you send an urgent donation today of $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to fund ballot chasing in key states? Please select an amount below to donate:](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9ft6mlvcvtmubjpu6l51km4m6auv1ep3h4u13co_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

[$50](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7dmrckuc59365ompkhkfi8t2q96rc25mrqm2hco_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

[$100](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zd17n2rekdh1lg3t7mk5ip0f8j74ft6q9n0ksil0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

[$250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7f3p17liu5j0dbs73u6rpjsco2kc4mu5okfqq10_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

[$500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znos4jutr1hdq57sk6b5bs3n3ssgadb8t9kjjdog_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

[$1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zq38irmhtmjemq2ga8ttl15ae946gaato5a6l018_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

[Other](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkhc6lba3s79io5n4ggqkjpstfvun71qpod92c1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)
Even if you can’t give $20.24, please consider chipping in $10 or ANY amount you can generously contribute.

My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to fund ballot-chasing operations in key electoral states to win back the White House—and take back our country.

To be frank, I don’t trust the DC Establishment and Uniparty to do this important GOTV work. It’s going to require organizations like Turning Point PAC to do the hard work. And I am up for the challenge if you can join me today in supporting our movement.

[Please rush your support today by donating $20.24 or more and help us win back the White House >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmpvg6t58tm2kvi05q8jt0oquntkpdcao7e5ii90_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6co75chh2bs)

We need to win in November. This isn’t a football game. This is for our civilization.

Thank you,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g. corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidate and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g. foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.

No wonder Biden and his campaign are “increasingly confident” they will win despite bad polling and collapsing approval numbers. I’m not going to sit aside and do nothing. And neither should you. Here’s my solution: I am directing Turning Point PAC to fund the largest ballot-chasing army ever in key electoral states. The success of this operation will determine the White House and help elect President Donald J. Trump. Here’s how you can help: Even if you can’t give $20.24, please consider chipping in $10 or ANY amount you can generously contribute. My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to fund ballot-chasing operations in key electoral states to win back the White House—and take back our country. To be frank, I don’t trust the DC Establishment and Uniparty to do this important GOTV work. It’s going to require organizations like Turning Point PAC to do the hard work. And I am up for the challenge if you can join me today in supporting our movement. We need to win in November. This isn’t a football game. This is for our civilization. Thank you, Charlie Kirk Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g. corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidate and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g. foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. subject: The Democrats have no choice left but to HIDE the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m relieved you opened this email in time...

| |

---
| | | I'm relieved you opened this email in time...

Democrats have no choice left but to HIDE from the truth so they just deemed President Trump America's "persona non grata" and launched a COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH against his allies in the House. _I 'm afraid to admit it but we're running out of time to stop them!_

- They can't focus on the _economy_ because Biden destroyed it

- They can't focus on _community safet_ y because they peddled soft-on-crime agendas

- They can't focus on our _border_ because they're flooding our neighborhoods with illegals

- They can't focus on our _military_ because they injected it with wokeism

- And they can't focus on _national security_ because they're siding with terrorist sympathizers

**That 's why they're doing EVERYTHING IN THEIR POWER to take down Donald J. Trump and his political allies.**

They know the American People are sick and tired of Biden and the radical agenda. They know they only have one chance to retake the House, establish a supermajority in the Senate, and hand Joe Biden a second term.

Look:

The ONLY thing standing in the way of complete Democrat control of our country - _and Radical Democrats ramming through anything they want_ - is what happens just a few short months from right now.

So I'm taking it upon myself to usher in the GREATEST LANDSLIDE VICTORY for Republicans that our nation has ever seen.

name: Kim George For Arizona
subject: News, Upcoming Events & Volunteer Opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim George for Arizona
body:
Get Involved!

https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=fedd1421bd&e=98be86514c

** BORDER CRISIS COLLABORATION
------------------------------------------------------------

Kim was proud to attend the birthday celebration for “America's Toughest Sheriff,” Joe Arpaio, on Friday, June 14th. Sheriff Arpaio shares a birthday with President Donald J. Trump and with Flag Day, which is a U.S. holiday that commemorates the adoption of the flag of the United States on June 14, 1777, by the Second Continental Congress. Arpaio earned his title after his 1996 book "America's Toughest Sheriff, How to Win the War Against Crime" was released.

Kim has met with Sheriff Arpaio regarding the problems at our border and he has agreed to collaborate, and provide advice based on his years of dealing with national security. Happy Birthday, Sheriff Joe!

Pictured: Kim George with Joe Arpaio, celebrating Joe’s 92nd birthday in Fountain Hills, June 14, 2024.

** FLAG DAY PATRIOTS PROMOTE KIM FOR CONGRESS!
------------------------------------------------------------

** KIM STANDS WITH
------------------------------------------------------------

** REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE PRESIDENT TRUMP
------------------------------------------------------------

KIM WILL FIGHT TO

REFORM THE DOJ

Kim George has been a fighter all her life and now has a passion to help fix what is wrong in our nation's capital, starting with a reformed Department of Justice.

As a 23-year veteran of the FBI as a Special Agent, Kim saw first-hand how the once-storied agency went off the rails over the past decade and how the destructive influence of progressive politics have caused many Americans to lose faith in the overall mission.

Her skills are needed now more than ever to help congress restore the agency to its former glory as the best law enforcement agency in the world - and free from politics!

CHECK YOUR VOTER REGISTRATION STATUS

Don’t be surprised at your polling place like many were at the last election, to find you are no longer registered to vote in CD1. You need to check especially if you registered a vehicle or boat at the MVD with a second home address outside of CD1.
Click Here To Check Voter Registration Status (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=4f11cd821d&e=98be86514c)

VOTERS MUST BE REGISTERED BY JULY 1, 2024 TO VOTE

To register online, visit servicearizona.com. You must have a valid Arizona driver’s license or identification card. You will be emailed a confirmation after you complete the registration process.
Click Here To Register Online (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=1cf126e6ec&e=98be86514c)

You may register with a paper form. Voter registration forms are available at county recorder offices, motor vehicle division (MVD) offices, most libraries, city clerk offices and public assistance agencies.

To download a paper form or for more information on the registration process, including the qualifications to register to vote, please visit: azcleanelections.gov/register-to-vote.
Click Here To Download A Registration Form (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=8ac6f281f9&e=98be86514c)

** UPCOMING EVENTS
------------------------------------------------------------

Join hosts Tara and Larry Sheffield for this informative event to hear from Kim, ask questions, meet fellow patriots and enjoy delicious complimentary apps and cocktails.

The exact address of the event will be on your ticket sent via upon registration.

For more information about the event, contact Nancy Smith at 480-522-7589 or nancy@campaignevents.com

For more information about Kim, please visit kimgeorgeforarizona.com

Join host Alpio Barbara and co-hosts Robert and Lynn Torcolini for this fun and informative event to hear from Kim, ask questions, meet fellow patriots and enjoy delicious complimentary heavy apps and cocktails. Plus, check out some really fancy cars too!

For more information about the event, contact Nancy Smith at 480-522-7589 or nancy@camelbackfundraising.com

For more information about Kim, please visit kimgeorgeforarizona.com

** Mountain View Pub (The Irish Pub)
------------------------------------------------------------

** Cave Creek
------------------------------------------------------------

** June 28th, 6pm
------------------------------------------------------------

Owners Michelle and JP will be introducing Kim to their patrons up on stage at 6pm, then Kim will be circulating throughout the establishment to answer any questions.

** VOLUNTEERS NEEDED
------------------------------------------------------------

** 22,000 Postcards Need Written
------------------------------------------------------------

We need MANY Volunteers who will take postcards home and hand-write a personal plea to vote for Kim George in the Primary. You do not address them or add postage—just write a personal note. We have 22,000 cards that need written so we can cover the entire area of Congressional District 1. The cards will be mailed the first week of July, so we need them written in the next two weeks.

Please email Rhonda to make arrangements to pick up a stack of cards. rhonda@kimgeorgeforarizona.com

** Host a Meet and Greet
------------------------------------------------------------

Help us get Kim in front of as many Republican voters as possible before July 30th! Invite your friends, family, and neighbors to your home to meet Kim, where she will share how she is the best candidate for the job!

Please email Rhonda to make arrangements. Rhonda@kimgeorgeforarizona.com

** Yard Signs
------------------------------------------------------------

The Primary vote is next month! Help us get Kim George’s name as visible as possible with yard signs. Note: If you live in an HOA, by law you can put up a political sign.

Email info@kimgeorgeforarizona to request a sign(s).

Knock on Doors

Go door-to-door in your neighborhood and distribute palm cards with information about Kim. Encourage your neighbors to vote for Kim July 30th. We can direct you to your Republican neighbors.

Email Rhonda@kimgeorgeforarizona.com for more information.

** Primary Vote—Tuesday, July 30th
------------------------------------------------------------

Mark your calendar now to vote! This race is too important to miss! If you’re going to be out-of-town, use the Secretary of State’s online portal to request a ballot-by-mail for the Primary and/or General Election.

** About Kim George
------------------------------------------------------------

Kim George is a retired FBI Special Agent with over two decades of experience in law enforcement and investigations. Now she is running to represent Arizona's First Congressional District to fight to protect our national security and ensure our law enforcement has what they need to enforce the law.

Voters can learn more about Kim’s campaign at www.KimGeorgeForArizona.com.

** Can you help the campaign today?
------------------------------------------------------------

Kim has to raise money to get her message out. One yard sign costs $5-7. Now more than ever, the campaign needs your show of support. Can you help her with a financial contribution today? No donation is too small! $10, $20, $50—anything helps!

Click below to donate with a credit card, or you can mail a check to the campaign P.O. Box:

Kim George For Arizona

7339 E. Williams Drive, #25866

Scottsdale, AZ 85255-9998

Checks should be made out to “Kim George For Arizona.” Please make a note with your name, address, and occupation (campaign funding regulations).
Click Here To Donate Now (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=77563df2f7&e=98be86514c)

** Sign Up...
------------------------------------------------------------

Click below to get the latest news about Kim’s campaign.
Click Here For The Newsletter (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=d7609a9be2)

** Contact
------------------------------------------------------------

info@kimgeorgeforarizona.com (mailto:info@kimgeorgeforarizona.com)

7339 E Williams Drive #25866
Scottsdale AZ 85255-9998
https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=de3ee0139b&e=98be86514c
https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=efede5e499&e=98be86514c https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=efa757e90e&e=98be86514c https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=2dc03c5463&e=98be86514c https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=c7b38f73d7&e=98be86514c

www.KimGeorgeForArizona.com

Paid for by Kim George for Arizona

View email in browser (https://mailchi.mp/0a05ac897c87/news-upcoming-events-volunteer-opportunities?e=98be86514c)
Kim George for Arizona . 7339 E Williams Dr Unit 25866 . Scottsdale, AZ 85255-7034 . USA
update your preferences (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=d7609a9be2&e=98be86514c&c=711a3bdb73) or unsubscribe (https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=d7609a9be2&t=b&e=98be86514c&c=711a3bdb73)

name: Hillsdale College via Pro Life Update
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbvaett92hflvn074412sg8geqcpaiu25evbbk58_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj62pr4cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znmid4l7se0hgbq7qk6v8l692aihptc9gdbftm70_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj62pr4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Riley Gaines, Leadership Institute
subject: My New Book: Swimming Against the Current
body:
| Friend, You may have heard my story. I'm the swimmer from the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against a man at the women's NCAA championships.
But I'm not speaking out because of what happened to me. Rather, I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up." They're told men deserve women's trophies. That men deserve their scholarships. And that men should use women's locker rooms. **Well, I disagree. And I will not shut up.** [I won't sit by and let other women and girls have their accomplishments erased and their safety put at risk.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc023tvi116kdeo88co4f43c387gqk5qsfds5mkg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj62pr4cdh2bs) I joined the **Leadership Institute** to educate, activate, and mobilize thousands of young women and men to fight for their rights. The Leadership Institute organized and funded my speaking tour on college campuses all over the country. My colleagues and I start conversations, recruit ambassadors, and help others make a big difference in their communities. My team at the Leadership Institute and I plan to go back on the road this fall, speaking out across the country. [Will you donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even $50 to support this most urgent effort?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeavs0a91inpe4j7cb0qkroia8t77c8egp9alneg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj62pr4cdh2bs) If you donate at least $100 you will get a copy of my new book! [Friend, please donate as generously as you can right now! And remember, if you give $100 or more, you'll get a copy of my new book.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0cac9fsco0c1h7pgfq97jmmpsuniianqdlcjcno_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj62pr4cdh2bs) Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeh8i757m8vppp3f7f7fol03eulnc7eln3k5h8vg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor4cth2bs "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ihq3o7jc930nm3g80tce4g1hj4kqion2nde3ig_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor4cth2bs "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8j4gc9g6l6807h051khoolveqrl8hbi3djbi92o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor4cth2bs "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3jc75t5a6js6qfb50iqsfga4c19u5lts6c42af8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor4cth2bs "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. ")**_

The Radical Left Democrats have an army of Liberal megadonors on their side... But if EVERY America First Conservative pitches in JUST a few bucks - we'll surge ahead and shock the world.

PLEASE:

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs36rti4bd0qro0k3b23m06sg00ds8o3i84rvoe0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor4cth2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")

**Even a small amount can help build our movement!**

---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help.

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

_**[I hope you'd agree America - as we know it - wouldn't survive something like that. Please join me now while there's still time to prevent that dark reality.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8rv0qiuniks21u8c2aldt47c37ts04622abpic0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor4cth2bs "I hope you’d agree America – as we know it – wouldn’t survive something like that. Please join me now while there’s still time to prevent that dark reality.")**_

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Learn from C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsCtNKLWLN

Hillsdale College

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCtNKLWLN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63291652:sCtNKLWLN:m:3:2627245898:54F977613C6B969D2F267DD71E833784:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3bp4v33mhhcuse6jcjhvcnpdf5kd9n7a4iv3dtg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor1cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zga8eqicl75cf9l5ij8j616hsj4u66vdojrusq20_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor1cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znlv0ijh3krctp5qbj0ug34rr4lvjmrnesgde3m0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6aor1cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkkv6tpb89jp0884t5r6vci02e4tth7fosnb9ei0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6eob6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zho7c8bagid5v01nir7tv1brlnidhdhvpms70b3o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6eob6clh2bs)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zad4phuf3roiirf868rkgef9s2fheb36jkm6f5vg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6eob6clh2bs)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc7u89vh5bi8b0ac4s78u3gje4t56m3ak1nrknjo_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6eob6clh2bs) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcml1p66sh3df64adqotmiraht0giqtv104255h8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6eob6clh2bs)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zktalm094q2if8p0d7i6e2b8rj140nonl93gfkog_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj6eob1cjh2bs)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

name: Riley Gaines, Leadership Institute
subject: My New Book: Swimming Against the Current
body:
| Friend, You may have heard my story. I'm the swimmer from the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against a man at the women's NCAA championships.
But I'm not speaking out because of what happened to me. Rather, I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up." They're told men deserve women's trophies. That men deserve their scholarships. And that men should use women's locker rooms. **Well, I disagree. And I will not shut up.** [I won't sit by and let other women and girls have their accomplishments erased and their safety put at risk.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2hg3d16407tee7mqfbjamqigr1ot1t2mnm9m25o_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj69oj2cdh2bs) I joined the **Leadership Institute** to educate, activate, and mobilize thousands of young women and men to fight for their rights. The Leadership Institute organized and funded my speaking tour on college campuses all over the country. My colleagues and I start conversations, recruit ambassadors, and help others make a big difference in their communities. My team at the Leadership Institute and I plan to go back on the road this fall, speaking out across the country. [Will you donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even $50 to support this most urgent effort?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0c1g8i70t95csemt4gj1n8t9qlbelf9pmq6bdc8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj69oj2cdh2bs) If you donate at least $100 you will get a copy of my new book! [Friend, please donate as generously as you can right now! And remember, if you give $100 or more, you'll get a copy of my new book.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z04s5cq2tnd13gujr2lp9jicpjgb5gg7b4e374s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slj69oj2cdh2bs) Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

clean_body: | Friend, You may have heard my story. I'm the swimmer from the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against a man at the women's NCAA championships. But I'm not speaking out because of what happened to me. Rather, I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up." They're told men deserve women's trophies. That men deserve their scholarships. And that men should use women's locker rooms. Well, I disagree. And I will not shut up. I joined the Leadership Institute to educate, activate, and mobilize thousands of young women and men to fight for their rights. The Leadership Institute organized and funded my speaking tour on college campuses all over the country. My colleagues and I start conversations, recruit ambassadors, and help others make a big difference in their communities. My team at the Leadership Institute and I plan to go back on the road this fall, speaking out across the country. If you donate at least $100 you will get a copy of my new book! Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: C. Trump
subject: Your Gift Can Defeat the Biden Admin's Censorship Agenda
body:
Your gift can fuel Speech First's unyielding defense of the First Amendment against the Biden admin
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | |
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNTA0MDAifQ/PbqmB86L1JsrF2_Mua8_mw)
---
Fellow American, The battle lines have been drawn. The Biden administration has made its move by rewriting Title IX, and now we are in a 60-day stretch before it takes effect. Speech First filed a lawsuit against the Department of Education, but we need your help to win this critical fight for free speech. **[Your gift of $25, $35, or $50 will help us keep fighting the Biden administration in this important stretch before the August 1st deadline. Your contribution today will help us continue this critical legal battle.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNTA0MDAifQ/tCVgrZ6wXcM0wYZdwWSV9A) **
---
[**Fight the Biden Administration**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNTA0MDAifQ/FIuvFqUuNbRBSecFCs0jjQ)
---
The Biden administration seeks to undermine the hard-won protections of Title IX. Under the new rule, students will be forced to use "preferred pronouns" or other "gender-affirming" language or face being reported. Speech First refuses to stand idly by while our liberties are stripped away. _It 's time for the Biden administration to get a taste of their own medicine in the court of law. _ Speech First has filed a lawsuit, challenging the administration's misguided efforts to silence student voices and censor the marketplace of ideas. This is a battle we cannot afford to lose. The radical ideologues are running rampant, wielding the power of the state to crush any semblance of intellectual diversity. It's a nightmarish vision, but it's one that's all too real if we fail to act. But we won't let that happen. We're drawing a line in the sand, and we're counting on you to stand with us. **[**Your contribution of $25, $35, or $50 will be a powerful testament to your commitment to free speech, a resounding declaration that you refuse to be silenced.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNTA0MDAifQ/QqigMm6gwB3_R08zAkPOsA)**
---
[**Fight the Biden Administration**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNTA0MDAifQ/3Kgqq4e7z8AYHTdMGF3BhA)
---
Together, we'll take the fight to the Biden administration, using every tool at our disposal to preserve the fundamental rights that generations of Americans have fought and died to defend. We'll be the unyielding champions of the First Amendment, the uncompromising defenders of the marketplace of ideas. This is our moment. The time has come to ensure that the torch of freedom continues to burn brightly. Join us in this battle, and let your contribution be the spark that ignites a revolution of free expression. With Gratitude, C. TrumpExecutive DirectorSpeech First
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkcuK3DAQRb9G3tnoPe6FFhPchoFMJ-BAlkKWyrZAloQlJ78fPHTvs61b3HOo-v2pP40PPq4Ps4Pypeij6Gj05kNoDyhQW5uippjyFsuWSE0apwQl_dI3oMgb6QUT8oabTXEBC_SADWaCEzCWL8YxY-dlXsRM-8arqwdLIvFNEME7KmduHRhLMGX8ZhHHZ3amQudj8Q6KTSnnFHz1tnTpWJugtlpzQewd0RHRMeTuUi3OBOjAnYiOdYN2PcDUl7811y4bi0VswJhQ9sCU0-9YDj-G-31CVJ511yWdhwXEhnykksFWH9dntIPz547YALvx4Tm0Zs_GrxGxoW7wRfwCvuIUK8SK2PDt_riPH78m_fO9_Zim9nWE5lAu__Uh-CLfEMfrVd7ZtDf1Pz_xR9F_AQAA__-FhJBw)
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkcuK3DAQRb9G3tnoPe6FFhPchoFMJ-BAlkKWyrZAloQlJ78fPHTvs61b3HOo-v2pP40PPq4Ps4Pypeij6Gj05kNoDyhQW5uippjyFsuWSE0apwQl_dI3oMgb6QUT8oabTXEBC_SADWaCEzCWL8YxY-dlXsRM-8arqwdLIvFNEME7KmduHRhLMGX8ZhHHZ3amQudj8Q6KTSnnFHz1tnTpWJugtlpzQewd0RHRMeTuUi3OBOjAnYiOdYN2PcDUl7811y4bi0VswJhQ9sCU0-9YDj-G-31CVJ511yWdhwXEhnykksFWH9dntIPz547YALvx4Tm0Zs_GrxGxoW7wRfwCvuIUK8SK2PDt_riPH78m_fO9_Zim9nWE5lAu__Uh-CLfEMfrVd7ZtDf1Pz_xR9F_AQAA__-FhJBw) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkcuK3DAQRb9G3tnoPe6FFhPchoFMJ-BAlkKWyrZAloQlJ78fPHTvs61b3HOo-v2pP40PPq4Ps4Pypeij6Gj05kNoDyhQW5uippjyFsuWSE0apwQl_dI3oMgb6QUT8oabTXEBC_SADWaCEzCWL8YxY-dlXsRM-8arqwdLIvFNEME7KmduHRhLMGX8ZhHHZ3amQudj8Q6KTSnnFHz1tnTpWJugtlpzQewd0RHRMeTuUi3OBOjAnYiOdYN2PcDUl7811y4bi0VswJhQ9sCU0-9YDj-G-31CVJ511yWdhwXEhnykksFWH9dntIPz547YALvx4Tm0Zs_GrxGxoW7wRfwCvuIUK8SK2PDt_riPH78m_fO9_Zim9nWE5lAu__Uh-CLfEMfrVd7ZtDf1Pz_xR9F_AQAA__-FhJBw)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
READ THIS VERY CAREFULLY: House Democrats just formed a task force to derail, obstruct, and stonewall President Trump’s entire agenda if he’s reelected!

| |

---
| | | **READ THIS VERY CAREFULLY:** House Democrats just formed a task force to derail, obstruct, and stonewall President Trump's entire agenda if he's reelected!

- Jamie Raskin (D-MD)
- Jared Huffman (D-CA)
- Diana DeGette (D-CO)
- Mark Pocan (D-WI)
- Ted Lieu (D-CA)
- Pramila Jayapal (D-WA)
- Nanette Barragan (D-CA)
- Judy Chu (D-CA)

These radicals aren't wasting a SECOND blocking anything President Trump wants to accomplish in a second term. Neither can we. If they take back the House, President Trump's entire agenda will come to a screeching halt.

_**[That's why we're pleading for your help to save our Pro-Trump House Majority.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AhqXLahEvDQRnyxxw4jdng~~/AARclAA~ "That’s why we’re pleading for your help to save our Pro-Trump House Majority.")**_

Remember:

Last time President Trump was in office, House Democrats unleashed every available resource to launch partisan investigations, subpoena President Trump's personal documents, and block our America First agenda.

On top of all that, they're unloading 100 million dollars to brand Trump as a convicted felon, attack all his supporters, and win total control.

_**[It's up to every American Patriot to make sure that NEVER HAPPENS. We just set a goal of raising one million bucks between now and the end of the quarter to fight back and save our Pro-Trump House Majority. Please chip in a few bucks right here and right now.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AhqXLahEvDQRnyxxw4jdng~~/AARclAA~ "It’s up to every American Patriot to make sure that NEVER HAPPENS. We just set a goal of raising one million bucks between now and the end of the quarter to fight back and save our Pro-Trump House Majority. Please chip in a few bucks right here and right now.")**_

But the good news is if every Patriot reading this email right now chips in 15 or 20 bucks, we'll hit our goal before the deadline. Will you please do your part?_

Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations. Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.** Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: You and I can’t let them down now
body:
K-12 education in America is at a crisis point.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo34kghh7g6i3e54eq1m752s3ie36qt8cgfipnj8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

K-12 education in America is at a crisis point. And students in classrooms all across this country need your help.

My name is Bill Gray, and I work at Hillsdale College.

**Have you seen how activists and education bureaucrats in our nation have taken over K-12 schools? They are pushing to replace the idea of equal individual rights and replace them with a more destructive idea: unequal rights based on identity.**

**You can see how they do this using critical race theory and other Marxist ideologies.**

**And they 're undoubtedly doing so in K-12 classrooms in your community.**

That's why today, I'm asking you to help us provide pocket Constitutions for young students. These vital founding documents will help them learn about America's founding documents and history--right from the source.

Even a small gift can go a long way:
* [$15 can provide booklets to 75 students](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo82sodlm1nb97lkvb34336jb5o216ke17hh7d6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs),
* [$25 reaches and teaches 125 students](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1h2rr05jbmh7evtevgirj9lv82grm5gs461ljeg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs),
* [$35 reaches and teaches 175 students](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7blkafnr6kr59i8mapmr4q3j1ol3g9sa01kvuto_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs),
* [$50 helps 250 students](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpk516ju61ihj0c02dn9ja42894qrqa904t3j568_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs).

I'm sure you agree that efforts like this are more important than ever. We need more and more K-12 students reading and understanding the Constitution and Declaration if we're to save America.

It isn't a secret that American civics education--education in American history and government--has been abandoned in far too many of our schools. We've seen how hundreds of thousands of young people are unaware of the importance of the Constitution to liberty. This threatens freedom itself!

Can you help us do something about this knowledge gap? **With your help, we can take action.**

When we send out pocket-sized Constitutions that YOU provide to teachers, principals, and administrators across the country, we make an important promise...

_ To send as many pocket Constitutions as needed so that they can teach their students about our nation's founding principles of liberty!_

You may be encouraged by this...we receive requests for more pocket Constitutions weekly. That's a sign that there is hope for education in America. After all, great teachers know how important it is for their students to receive a proper civics education.

And, when you help, you'll also be helping these students. Most of the high school students who send us letters take a moment to say how excited they were to learn about America's founding documents. **[Here's a copy of one letter from a high school senior named Ava that you can read for yourself](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kurl15m1v6tg5nb8ap4fnia2h2q1c3mj88gsqo_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs).**

After reading it, I'm sure you'll agree... **We cannot let them down now.**

You can make a big difference in teaching our youngest citizens to be intelligent patriots.

And because we have distributed an astonishing 700,000 pocket-sized copies of the Constitution to schools nationwide, you will make a difference in your community as well.

**But the demand could soon exhaust our budget ...**

...especially because we do all of our work without accepting even ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support. Not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY.

It's generous citizens like **you** --who care about teaching young people America's founding principles of liberty--and who fund our pocket Constitution program and every other educational outreach initiative here.

These national educational outreach programs include teaching anyone wishing to learn with free online courses. Your gift will reach millions of Americans through _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty. And your support will restore excellence to K-12 education by providing thousands of children with a classical education.

You can see how much we need you. So, I have a simple question for you:

**Will you support our successful educational outreach efforts with your best tax-deductible gift?**

**When you do, you 'll reach and teach millions of Americans nationwide on behalf of liberty, including in your state, about the Constitution. Including our youngest Americans.**

You love this country. You know how important it is to educate young minds properly. And today, you can take learning directly to schools in your state and nationwide.

**That 's why I hope you'll give a generous tax-deductible contribution of $15, $25, $35, $50, or even $100 or more at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/give-schoolchildren-the-constitution**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrk9e96m4sm93l1itk0mr4dn33gl97tkak2682qo_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs)

I know you share our commitment, and I hope you will join us in our effort. Thank you!

For our youth,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Young minds in classrooms all across America need your help. Critical race theory and woke politics are found nationwide in K-12 classrooms, even in your state. These radical ideologies have pushed K-12 education in America to a crisis point, threatening freedom itself.

Will you support our mission to provide pocket-sized Constitutions to students in your state and advance educational resources that teach the principles of liberty? You will help millions of Americans nationwide--including our youngest Americans. **You can easily give your best gift at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/give-schoolchildren-the-constitution**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4jrqi6gluqfa5o9clh8pbd9ku5n3hkg75ulglc0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs)
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0gcak8vh47cdb2cg5919oretgnd16t00q3kn3qo_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32cjj68pj2c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs5njecr4k9f154kcqmge6f3ivmutna2c6oqviro_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbt0mkg4jjiobjahhn816ua0s7ibrfmt9vou2sd0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30slgm6ob1cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
