name: The Flyover
subject: Presidential Debate Rules Set, Charles Barkley Retires Again, and a Very Old Book
body:
CNN has [set the rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u5CAUxfGnwd214PJhb0GxjbvZdkuLmMuYCIMFeKy8fTSp057T_PT__1gfLqaYn__cQbaHsrqtxxetBoQBVKsavA1ESHIgKyYxa2U4imG3s3Fu2pTkWnEjtZbKYQg8TAEnmp0eokWOihthBBdCipEHPZOS4o80hGbTTHHysZc6fpaY-04hfZUX1XErx5Ds3vvZmPzLcGG43Pc9Vro61fb-30upyTNcrsZw2XKGeiVqEGJtHa4GZ6UWPeUeXQJPH64T5AJnLWeD4-rk4YhbLedeMjV4Y4EbEJrhMlTrzzumFJuZmOLPw8X04-q_V3pZ_A4AAP__86Vp2w) for the first 2024 presidential debate on June 27 in Atlanta, with Independent candidate Robert Kennedy, Jr., still having a chance to join Biden and Trump on the podium.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OqzAUhJ_GdKDzYw6kcHElRJdbRdoS2XAcvCIBgTerffsVqbeZ0Wim-DQf1-Hq05Ke9__-oS7HdfBjTi8dpEQpyQ62mFxUJeVCHTbY1laAsJhdlDZoE0KDWge2YRqpDmQv8eJVRoAiOQKyICgIiIwVxLpVy3hhUZKxNhZ0Snndq881PfOscflZX7pX4_ooFjfnvB2G_xnqDfUxVE9_om0-z-fCUL9Pp1TbvBnujzQZ7pDEGpLtKxjuyELdsCEZ8UxvGmjLWx_TfuQSa4CzJMPd6Wy4u_XF7qbtOy1LOqQxFu4Pn5Y3Uv77oJej3wAAAP__hehgmA) | |
# SUNDAY, JUNE 16, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1775,** ** George Washington was named commander in chief of the Continental Army by the Second Continental Congress. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L-OozAQBvCnMR3IHhsTChe5nDjppNyVWyL-DDCRwZGZwKbZZ18tKbbZ7jejmeL73q71tSFPy_ivmdHxEOqmY9qwtqmyKZjaJL0bEAF1gk4V6pQbK0Elk7PGYCFLbEyZtxpPoEHLEjsLWEI7tAk5kGCkVVZJpbTK5JCf0GhVaotgu1wYiT1xiNkt0MITDv4ZNoxZF-bEu4n5vgp9FlAJqPZ9z3zosjFsAipinAVUHPrmmdKSTrRyiE8B1e2xYKrs8aSFPn8IfWZ8Z6F__18E5CD_PhY88HWVw-Xlosi_pz8Y4ogCLo97F2ZaxmPbNswe18M78XTgVySm9eUhxA7XLImuv-_kPa22EEaOc0P-CMU_V7w5-AwAAP__Ryl2Tw)) Welcome to the first Sunday edition of _The Flyover_! You asked for it, and now you can expect it to land in your inbox like clockwork--every Sunday. You'll notice that we switched up a few of the content sections, and we'd love to know what you think about our layout. Hit reply and let us know what you think! Our sponsor today is [Money Pickle](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v4zAMQH-NvMUQKUtOBg0H5Lwl0wE3GopMJ2z14dpy2vTXF26Rrevj4wPB_6f-5Dhwup5dJFvG3Dtf-E692YHZYdM31WBHIiRVkYUW9roxEqG6WdVKkuC1Ju0vBoGMQ30xNBw0tC24ii1KbKQBAxJAQS1HvadGwUEZQuO1aCQNXPJcv2RO5UZjeOQ7zbXPsQr2Vsq0CPVHYCewe1v5s4450WNi_xpok7aJ6tYS-yWvsyehjt1PQqBGeXaFc3JBoNmcSAOvUajj3-j4Cb2Lk-Nr2lZ5XsoT51QoFaGO_-ijVLMdpncOgRfTikZet8D3leX3n90tfgUAAP__5yxvIA), connecting you with trusted advisors to help plan for retirement.
|
---
## Stage Set for First 2024 Presidential Debate
CNN has [set the rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u5CAUxfGnwd214PJhb0GxjbvZdkuLmMuYCIMFeKy8fTSp057T_PT__1gfLqaYn__cQbaHsrqtxxetBoQBVKsavA1ESHIgKyYxa2U4imG3s3Fu2pTkWnEjtZbKYQg8TAEnmp0eokWOihthBBdCipEHPZOS4o80hGbTTHHysZc6fpaY-04hfZUX1XErx5Ds3vvZmPzLcGG43Pc9Vro61fb-30upyTNcrsZw2XKGeiVqEGJtHa4GZ6UWPeUeXQJPH64T5AJnLWeD4-rk4YhbLedeMjV4Y4EbEJrhMlTrzzumFJuZmOLPw8X04-q_V3pZ_A4AAP__86Vp2w) for the first 2024 presidential debate on June 27 in Atlanta, with Independent candidate Robert Kennedy, Jr., still having a chance to join Biden and Trump on the podium. To qualify, Kennedy [must have 15% support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu6yAUgOGngQ2LAwTbA8NdvOWuHS0Ch-RUBCxD7aZPX7Vz53_49b1d16unTOX-3z_R9VRXHzoduFoBViizGh5dQlSoOToYYboYKxXwhxshxaQBQhonKf1tjhN6gPmmRzMHGTk5JZWRFixIAA2DTJcJjYZZW1Q2XJiRGKnXfXivVPoDU37VA_ch1CfP7tH71pj-x9TC1HKe55DqZ8Gz_XSmlq1m6hQaU0soRSQqPtMXNhHx5juK_SNjE82_-O7idlLO1OzIjLw_PeXfSf-bfDj1HQAA___fW1mv) in at least four national polls and be on the ballot in enough states to total 270 electoral college votes. Notably, there will be no live audience for the debate and the candidates' mics will be muted outside of their own speaking times in an effort to stave off the often chaotic nature of presidential debates in recent election cycles. Trump and Biden have also [agreed to rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGnwRsWHHB2BoYu3tK1o0XsI74KQ2RorPTpq3bu_A-_vo_rfA2cON_fw06-xTKHpfGTZpQaJdjZdquPRECmI68HPTqLCnS3eRjCOCzqEpUDHNHcVrOsl-jAxMEoozr2oMAq1KiV1kb3KrqRrNEXgwS4OGEVrdzK0X8Wzm2jmF7lSUe_lL1LfmvtUYV5EzAJmM7z7F9hK-W3CpgynVXAtOQsI-eQ-JuqPL4SVRn5qE3eeKUstXVonRqx39qeusOvj5NT4oqDsOq-B05_u_Y__unhJwAA__9pU1rB) around enforced speaking times and not consulting campaign members during the two planned commercial breaks.
## Explosion Kills 8 Israeli Soldiers
Eight Israeli soldiers [were killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1OxDAQhJ8m6RzZ679QuKBJd7SU0V68viw48Sm2LoKnRwct3Ugzo0_63i_zBTnzfnvDjUJLZcal8YNmJ5QTYGbTx5CIgHRPQXk1WuMkqH4NFkejR2u9vKpEkTBKBO88LFpZ77HnABKMdMopqZRWg0x2JKPVi3YEbrGdkRS5lWP4KLy3lVL-Kg86hqVsfQ5ra_fa6dcOpg6m8zyH5Vp3Ouuz72B6xg4mrgdSFjf8RrHihlXUkiPTUcUn50xR_C1YREq0VxKpHAs9r_0R4v3knLk63xl525DzL7397-IR4CcAAP__0wtiHw) in an explosion in southern Gaza early Saturday morning, marking Israel's deadliest day since January. Israeli protests are expected to escalate in the wake of the [explosion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAURb8Gd1jwwCQpKLahy7ZbWgQe9stiEwGJlfn6Uaae9upK5-j8u85XT5n25a_f0PZUZh86vXA2XBoOetZDtAkRUA1o5UmeJ20EyGG1KYqbuCiBQisZUKeQfDBTECe8JTB6IAsCtDDSSCGlkqNI0xm1khdlEEyYmBYYqZc63gvtfcWU3-WFdQxlG7Jde380pv4wcAzccRxjX3F5-hrJ75_PZy01RwbO104hIwP3YTJw9-fOwMmJgaNWPWbireRIWBv_Tzlj5LTzVp59xbrzxX95vlGm7uubN_9uQ7XxcVDO1MyJabFsnvKPWf-908vCdwAAAP__OV1rnw), especially as the government faces outrage over military exemptions for ultra-Orthodox men. Prime Minister Netanyahu is [vowing to continue](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnMRvo7mwuMHjo4i1dOyIbjuRaJ47ACmqfvkrn7r_0Sf_HeTpHzXq_vMeb-LqWKc5VnzJxi9ySm1yz-FWExDbi8YRD7xgIm6tPCUbBaHtHLjkcl3FMK504JQa2aWnUE5ADRkZAtNjB2g_iLI6WhXjujQNZtJat-yx6r1dZ83d5ytbN5dZkf631sRv7ZigYCsdxdI-StepcXoGhcJdjNxReiqEAbChgbyjovkXJ2u4lLyrb3l7iT2xjrXH-agGQbT8MzeaXx6E5684n4-Byi5r_5Pr_h6en3wAAAP__Cq9cvg) the offensive, despite mounting pressure for a ceasefire. Negotiations are at a standstill, with Hamas demanding a full Israeli withdrawal from Gaza and the release of hostages, terms included in a U.S.-backed proposal.
## List: America's Fastest Growing Retirement Spots
Cities in Arizona and Florida provide the most value for relocating retirees, according to GOBankingRates' list of America's 50 Fastest-Growing Retirement Hot Spots. Check out the [full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWd2CIB4Yu3tK1o4XwYV-FIcIoUd6-aufuv_RL39d9vQfOXPbPcJLvqa4hdn7SaiVYiWY1w-YTEZIeyIOD22SsQhgOP896Q4sqmWBijM5NoMim2QFhdAQDe1RolAULCkDDqNJ0I6Nh1pbQxkkYRRv32sbvyqUflPK7PqmNsZ5D9kfvj0voD4GLwCVxCSXS-A5Hrb-FwKXQ6xK4hJMaxyAnJVO4Ol1d7q2-uOyyUedGJ5UuAZXSekI3Hv3MQ_Pb48U582WdMGo_A-e_cf-f4enxJwAA__9ij16X). GOBankingRates analyzed population, living expenses, amenities, and taxes and determined that Goodyear, Arizona is the No. 1 retirement hotspot. Goodyear also featured the largest percentage increase of people in retirement age living there. Florida had four cities in the top 10 with Clermont, North Port, Fort Meyers, and Vero Beach South. The Sunshine State also has the most cities out of all the states on the top 50 lists as it landed 12 retirement hot spots overall.

| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v4zAMQH-NvMUQKUtOBg0H5Lwl0wE3GopMJ2z14dpy2vTXF26Rrevj4wPB_6f-5Dhwup5dJFvG3Dtf-E692YHZYdM31WBHIiRVkYUW9roxEqG6WdVKkuC1Ju0vBoGMQ30xNBw0tC24ii1KbKQBAxJAQS1HvadGwUEZQuO1aCQNXPJcv2RO5UZjeOQ7zbXPsQr2Vsq0CPVHYCewe1v5s4450WNi_xpok7aJ6tYS-yWvsyehjt1PQqBGeXaFc3JBoNmcSAOvUajj3-j4Cb2Lk-Nr2lZ5XsoT51QoFaGO_-ijVLMdpncOgRfTikZet8D3leX3n90tfgUAAP__5yxvIA) [**Secure Your Retirement with Trusted Advisors**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v4zAMQH-NvMUQKUtOBg0H5Lwl0wE3GopMJ2z14dpy2vTXF26Rrevj4wPB_6f-5Dhwup5dJFvG3Dtf-E692YHZYdM31WBHIiRVkYUW9roxEqG6WdVKkuC1Ju0vBoGMQ30xNBw0tC24ii1KbKQBAxJAQS1HvadGwUEZQuO1aCQNXPJcv2RO5UZjeOQ7zbXPsQr2Vsq0CPVHYCewe1v5s4450WNi_xpok7aJ6tYS-yWvsyehjt1PQqBGeXaFc3JBoNmcSAOvUajj3-j4Cb2Lk-Nr2lZ5XsoT51QoFaGO_-ijVLMdpncOgRfTikZet8D3leX3n90tfgUAAP__5yxvIA) Many believe they don't need a financial advisor until much later. On this date in 1775, George Washington was named commander in chief of the Continental Army by the Second Continental Congress. () Welcome to the first Sunday edition of The Flyover! You asked for it, and now you can expect it to land in your inbox like clockwork--every Sunday. You'll notice that we switched up a few of the content sections, and we'd love to know what you think about our layout. Hit reply and let us know what you think! Our sponsor today is , connecting you with trusted advisors to help plan for retirement. | Stage Set for First 2024 Presidential Debate CNN has for the first 2024 presidential debate on June 27 in Atlanta, with Independent candidate Robert Kennedy, Jr., still having a chance to join Biden and Trump on the podium. To qualify, Kennedy in at least four national polls and be on the ballot in enough states to total 270 electoral college votes. Notably, there will be no live audience for the debate and the candidates' mics will be muted outside of their own speaking times in an effort to stave off the often chaotic nature of presidential debates in recent election cycles. Trump and Biden have also around enforced speaking times and not consulting campaign members during the two planned commercial breaks. Explosion Kills 8 Israeli Soldiers Eight Israeli soldiers in an explosion in southern Gaza early Saturday morning, marking Israel's deadliest day since January. Israeli protests are expected to escalate in the wake of the , especially as the government faces outrage over military exemptions for ultra-Orthodox men. Prime Minister Netanyahu is the offensive, despite mounting pressure for a ceasefire. Negotiations are at a standstill, with Hamas demanding a full Israeli withdrawal from Gaza and the release of hostages, terms included in a U.S.-backed proposal. List: America's Fastest Growing Retirement Spots Cities in Arizona and Florida provide the most value for relocating retirees, according to GOBankingRates' list of America's 50 Fastest-Growing Retirement Hot Spots. Check out the . GOBankingRates analyzed population, living expenses, amenities, and taxes and determined that Goodyear, Arizona is the No. 1 retirement hotspot. Goodyear also featured the largest percentage increase of people in retirement age living there. Florida had four cities in the top 10 with Clermont, North Port, Fort Meyers, and Vero Beach South. The Sunshine State also has the most cities out of all the states on the top 50 lists as it landed 12 retirement hot spots overall. | | | Peter, I’m running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate. [I’m hoping you’ll split a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb2a2e89-6037-4382-bec0-483c3603cc5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – and here’s why. It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem. I recently published a law review article highlighting how this captured Supreme Court often simply makes up false facts to arrive at decisions that ultimately benefit partisan Republican special interests. Take Citizens United v. FEC as an example. Remember when the Federalist Society justices said that all the unlimited political spending they were unleashing would be “transparent”? Well, we’ve seen dark money in politics prove them wrong several billion times over. Our system is designed to leave fact-finding to the lower courts that hear testimony, make credibility determinations, and review evidence. The Supreme Court is then supposed to defer to – and not alter – factual records in its decisions. Think about it: if the Highest Court in the Land makes up phony facts, there is nowhere else the parties can appeal to. The captured Roberts Court has done a lot of this phony fact-finding in big decisions that have fundamentally changed life in America. The Dobbs decision that ended a fundamental freedom for women is another one that was built on made-up history. How are the American people supposed to trust a Court that makes up its own rules to concoct decisions that suit right-wing special interests? [I won’t give up my fight to improve transparency and accountability at the Supreme Court, but I need your help. Split a contribution today to send me back to the Senate so I can protect American democracy and make sure our Court is giving Americans the fair shake they deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb73853d0-33bc-439a-952b-b4b8d8783d0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wdwZgGJPPyCuX2v2HG97yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoUVwmP0TCaHR0cHM6Ly9hcnRpY2xlcy5zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS92YW5ndWFyZC12cy1maWRlbGl0eS12cy1zY2h3YWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmFpbm1ha2VyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1ybWFfX2ZhbGNfY29udGVudF92YW5maWRzY2h3YWImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dmZzX2NvbXBhcmVfcmFscGgmdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wXzA2MDEyNF9STS1ST04tMjAyNDA2MTZXA3NwY0IKZm3-wm5mq2xd6VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/laaDS35TpDjfhZtZCL27vw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoUVwmP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS9yZXRpcmVtZW50L2ZpbmQtYS1maW5hbmNpYWwtcGxhbm5lcj91dG1fc291cmNlPXJhaW5tYWtlciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cm1hX19mYWxjX2RpcmVjdCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12ZnNfcmFscGhfdG9vbF93YWx0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wXzA2MDEyNF9STS1ST04tMjAyNDA2MTZXA3NwY0IKZm3-wm5mq2xd6VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wdwZgGJPPyCuX2v2HG97yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoUVwmP0TCaHR0cHM6Ly9hcnRpY2xlcy5zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS92YW5ndWFyZC12cy1maWRlbGl0eS12cy1zY2h3YWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmFpbm1ha2VyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1ybWFfX2ZhbGNfY29udGVudF92YW5maWRzY2h3YWImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dmZzX2NvbXBhcmVfcmFscGgmdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wXzA2MDEyNF9STS1ST04tMjAyNDA2MTZXA3NwY0IKZm3-wm5mq2xd6VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: OTC Morphine, APPROVED
body:
Now Legal Worldwide - No side effects or Addiction Risk

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | Hi,
By now, I know you have heard the news rumblings.
**You saw the media frenzy on Fox.**
_...You may even know someone who has tried it. _
After 14 years of private testing, the **Conolidine alkaloid dubbed** “Nature’s Morphine” is now legal worldwide.
_As you probably heard... _
After a 100,000-person clinical analysis, **Conolidine is now certified as the** **world's most effective natural pain reliever.**
**... Proven "pharma-level" relief with no adverse effects. **
_One incredible quote from the top minds at Harvard started a medical deep dive. _
---
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JQIuISfdeUDsKvxFuzOKGg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoUVuQP0Q_aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueDYzaHNmZy5jb20vS0hOWkIvM01aTlBSLz9zdWIxPUJTU01QQVZEUlRGMDYwODIwMjRBVwNzcGNCCmZtB8NuZo4ZeHBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| _Now, some of the brightest medical minds in the world are weighing in on the future of Conolidine..._
---
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JQIuISfdeUDsKvxFuzOKGg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoUVuQP0Q_aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueDYzaHNmZy5jb20vS0hOWkIvM01aTlBSLz9zdWIxPUJTU01QQVZEUlRGMDYwODIwMjRBVwNzcGNCCmZtB8NuZo4ZeHBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=774f41f8a7ef4e6989062bfdf29a22b2&_e=CGrIYeTJXo0X_Zw4nSE0b9NsH-yYd9deb2nWW2mSPAQ-S-sYEiiuv8NMl9xDPDD_Q8phFLCaLVpu4XfHHABMAIYGW9Y0X_jlI2ijTKXRsLcufUFF-ZIvoVlfrIYvnVo5wJFRDdl5KRlKwSmmHGIDMKL4GM6fAGJiF6znD1_eLKDU8yXEZn8N1J3lvDzNeyPw0tei6iigBV7UDxKT3y7qdfuQxXHZYlV7q5tBr2bA5X2-ECsnAiKq-7_6KydzF-tsWYvI1edo0Xq3GY-MpB62fwfKyfLJ7vMYyC9vHKEoJxt0j2oZ3vbWmZJJg_8i6j4qjnAv0P_Vi0M7Z3ZTNsPpdXKAdVZAyDqt9M5oLPhFhEya2BGdZiZtXMkW5cvG36vvO4hW---slol0c3qjq-s7EVK4UzeLRgiEksaIHR_FNdM%3D)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That's why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=774f41f8a7ef4e6989062bfdf29a22b2&_e=CGrIYeTJXo0X_Zw4nSE0b3tIW4uMfK_zBK3MNETb2wI-lCvfFz1PQqZ4l7NR20oNthW6o7MGt7OJ7rLgesv4OcI8_KRaGGJzU_9CXPk95GXxM59RIeEpESq-rMUuvr_sEVuBDslOdcwRKZtG666ks7oDBG7Hk0KSW8_4P9N0yNRaCHM8bDaLkb_-BNvbFbJTNZp8xx1cf7ZdjPkYJqCBPSwsGGCANrrmobqRWTuymoLE-fa3FI_4Tg3tPrKfVD5iH2Lbw-KgXn8WlJSkO83wAnMQAzXQjYWrdXyYyzaM99E2w6IAwKVlhHIVEcNh3L2IDagVNW-bWRoOmFFFUBlV-Oime20UJvg0XUbOnciSpPkeEYZ0Nlh_PIacOPBVWKl5UBgo-YBPG3P8WzEPZAJmhw%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=144b02dfda5a4d64bb9011960655deea&_e=QJsBnVf5MiCv8FTwwmB2yaQpaYzsVYAQfzwEXpp9GvmQ5dCzQrXcUCLJ9ujGVp_hQ41l9USC_y1hsMDc719HYkVLTU48WlVBKVDE9_vRQ2UNOjszr_brGoU5RDvwxgQ1BIXU0a1TpL2YJwxuVUfIt3t1HU7fDkY_bjo4fZl9Eo6vrQFCgS_RVbYYPklskuZp7jKUBon3Wfy-7LkN8yHJzssG5FwLh5M31YHjSf28h0eMEZpsabHk3TVq33PlYTKKSI3oVsn-WD6d7QT3BMQf_1XYFYheDCEXJOhLelw1V2sH1y7eIQOjo3MO-UHUqm9eW3uFiiaoumbOsBeYJvd8bUKPXOHyJl7YEiRLZ73cSPd84OCzeZJ1kyLU4ZiJgJNsKlp-DHltfyuftbBMjwXqYGTlFz1n9PTfHsboM5wrsJU%3D)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That's why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=144b02dfda5a4d64bb9011960655deea&_e=QJsBnVf5MiCv8FTwwmB2yUOyJve42fYmxJKfNNArPXksVtji_dl6sz9Nn52NCpKJrKuQCMj_A_etsPUwi9pXVJL6_C_03zxvNtkOXrNn1qVSseAfKCbKmXq_X9nXI3kGahfXadQ50I_V1dqr9rMXIV336WaVYtcTVMzWr9R2KZqd0yKCMg3D09AIVA9b8NpGyujfTW0PGG9AnSlTcTc3vfQVndXUN5YpVSMZOn4S_m8LJxjv7N05GVCrkXABPYeBGH_ExGV4YeH3DDdLatUDmo3RAoAZksy3tA0cX-LaVczFcokLiojJa1L7Dgv0wH0D04Gqsh7qDQaoU1kejIeuinyzxSy_YDweBcl4x6tuueSPLt3dtLdzuo_qRK1Wn93MQdYly9oFvwYDgfpy95CPTg%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. name: Riley Gaines, Leadership Institute
subject: Do you have your copy yet?
body:
I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up."

| Friend, You may have heard my story. I'm the swimmer from the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against a man at the women's NCAA championships.
But I'm not speaking out because of what happened to me. Rather, I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up." They're told men deserve women's trophies. That men deserve their scholarships. And that men should use women's locker rooms. **Well, I disagree. And I will not shut up.** [I won't sit by and let other women and girls have their accomplishments erased and their safety put at risk. ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=078f924f9d1543c1be1417620f662679&_e=aZqEBl3Iui2Tsd2UdJ3_Yq0cYReZ8wcz0ex9-P3u5vAyppsR78BUdCdIACdwImUolv0yySfdoYg19gJ6HDbzzynTHAHurmeZx6iKVSuBgklY6kLCkSpV9jRsiCXRVC85J-lpkubEyCxUhnkM9mbRqgMqqRfXkx7xyFF3q0SsvFN-D3rMZfFdQod5bAw4EcJwQaE9A74YfwcoIe6R4cV6kLjnWhklpki1qOLAp7C2Kmc%3D) I joined the **Leadership Institute** to educate, activate, and mobilize thousands of young women and men to fight for their rights. The Leadership Institute organized and funded my speaking tour on college campuses all over the country. My colleagues and I start conversations, recruit ambassadors, and help others make a big difference in their communities. My team at the Leadership Institute and I plan to go back on the road this fall, speaking out across the country. [ Will you donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even $50 to support this most urgent effort?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=078f924f9d1543c1be1417620f662679&_e=aZqEBl3Iui2Tsd2UdJ3_Yq0cYReZ8wcz0ex9-P3u5vAyppsR78BUdCdIACdwImUolv0yySfdoYg19gJ6HDbzz9_W-JR8xhYmarKhLKugkfTpkYAIgvNCvt7cckuueHGOMH_9b5xcdEaEA_m5rcBBWR3cJgqyVkVRkIyEQ99BsDXYVIZT3lrWmQ-ub4w3QUHuD3IL8zc4Zoqeq5grt5atdaTNho3e8Ee5azgkbTErCLc%3D) If you donate at least $100 you will get a copy of my new book! [Friend, please donate as generously as you can right now! And remember, if you give $100 or more, you'll get a copy of my new book. ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=078f924f9d1543c1be1417620f662679&_e=aZqEBl3Iui2Tsd2UdJ3_Yq0cYReZ8wcz0ex9-P3u5vAyppsR78BUdCdIACdwImUolv0yySfdoYg19gJ6HDbzz_of05UOHqWCXY7633PFxgmg-AeMFcR9XFCjwl-dhgmhnYI9TQyF-emls66vDysS3P-WFHUnz18HbrEvlt2HgAM8jnwVc9BM2EZtLPExtEdCvwWQBJNTa_FmcUqLRLiPgujUeIcw2PR7jNHJib9lX5A%3D) Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

If Dr. Geetha Ramaswamy's name sounds familiar, it should. Her son and my friend is the former Presidential candidate, Vivek Ramaswamy. Dr. Geetha joins me to discuss the changing age rates of depression, and how other fields of medicine have improved, but the mental health has deteriorated. She also details how mental health issues are compounded through ideas like thinking you should be something or like someone else vs. who you really are. Dr. Geetha then discussed her personal experience with that thinking and offers a special Father's Day message to all dads.
Listen here:

subject: 👶 𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗯𝗮𝗯𝘆 𝗽𝗶𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Happy Fathers Day
Growing up, our dad dedicated most of his time and energy to serving others. He would rise before the sun, return home late, and spend his days delivering babies, caring for the sick and dying, and saving lives.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Bob%20Lorinser%20for%20Congress.png]
He's dedicated his life to the people of Northern Michigan and the UP advocating for all of us, and now, to continue his fight in US Congress, Bob Lorinser needs you in his corner.
If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aboutbob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aboutbob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aboutbob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aboutbob]
Friends,
Despite his demanding schedule, he made it a priority to attend our games, recitals, and meets. We can only imagine the challenges he faced, rushing from the ER to a hockey game in his scrubs, just to show us he cared.
He was even on-call during the birth of his daughter, but as you can see in the picture above, he still showed up.
Our dad taught us that serving the community is a way to create a better future for our generation. And now, he's taking that same philosophy to a higher level by running for Congress. He wants to create a better future for our children. He's running for his grandchildren's generation.
Our dad is a man who shows up.
He's dedicated, hardworking, and committed to making a difference in the lives of others.
Today, we're reaching out to ask for your support in celebrating our dad, Bob Lorinser. He has critical fundraising goals to achieve. Most politicians would be “dialing for dollars” — even on Fathers Day — asking for money from ultra-wealthy donors and PACs.
But, Dad goes to the people he knows best, straight to the community he served all his life. His campaign is entirely grassroots-funded and fueled by individuals like you. We're so grateful.
We believe in our dad, and hope you do, too. Friends, can we count on you to contribute today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aboutbob] Every amount, no matter how small, will make a difference.
Thank you and happy Fathers Day to you and yours.
Peter, Andrew, and Amy
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blairbob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blairbob]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aboutbob]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

Democrats have no choice left but to HIDE from the truth so they just deemed President Trump America's "persona non grata" and launched a COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH against his allies in the House. _I 'm afraid to admit it but we're running out of time to stop them!_

So I'm taking it upon myself to usher in the GREATEST LANDSLIDE VICTORY for Republicans that our nation has ever seen.

clean_body: Today reminds me of the importance of family and the values we hold dear. | | It’s Father's Day, friend. Today we honor and celebrate the incredible fathers and father figures in our lives. I hope you are able to spend this day with loved ones, reflecting on the impact these remarkable men have had on shaping our view of the world. Father's Day reminds me of the importance of family and the impact of role models in our community. Thank you for your unwavering support, and together, I know we can create a brighter future for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Your dedication and support are what keep us going. With gratitude, — Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Dr. Carson equips us to understand some of the most important forces shaping our country today and offers his best solutions on how our nation can return to our biblical, Conservative values, just as our Founding Fathers envisioned.

Here's what you'll learn from Dr. Carson after reading **_The Perilous Fight_** :
* **What caused the breakdown of the family**
* **How faith led our nation to unprecedented freedom and prosperity**
* **The fresh ideas and policy options that could save America.**

This is **NOT** a book for the faint of heart. It's a call to action for those willing to **STAND UP** and **FIGHT** for our values.

name: Riley Gaines, Leadership Institute
subject: My New Book: Swimming Against the Current
body:
I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up."

| Friend, You may have heard my story. I'm the swimmer from the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against a man at the women's NCAA championships.
But I'm not speaking out because of what happened to me. Rather, I'm speaking louder because there are thousands of young women and girls who are told they need to "shut up." They're told men deserve women's trophies. That men deserve their scholarships. And that men should use women's locker rooms. **Well, I disagree. And I will not shut up.** [I won't sit by and let other women and girls have their accomplishments erased and their safety put at risk. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de652353b7b448d1837451e845fd91fc&_e=yKAD2h9omnuiLBEm7QipPIrQlw9RzmmXbsGywedk2qYbV0_237oe9hAu1XUWD1QXwfszRafuz5xddXB-Vcu2sBNtcvhsGSMop0JHWT5KCCdvfuyKqjrWgOqMH0co435-SXGKh_Ik78lThMzVe0pMq_fhQeQvarjsU8mgF-WLHWvtQRojNDa0C7nwcKwaK_KV-sW9B-8VMOF3HaHVM6uIEl0kBMRrdWj-RVgRTrIrU6I%3D) I joined the **Leadership Institute** to educate, activate, and mobilize thousands of young women and men to fight for their rights. The Leadership Institute organized and funded my speaking tour on college campuses all over the country. My colleagues and I start conversations, recruit ambassadors, and help others make a big difference in their communities. My team at the Leadership Institute and I plan to go back on the road this fall, speaking out across the country. [ Will you donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even $50 to support this most urgent effort?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de652353b7b448d1837451e845fd91fc&_e=yKAD2h9omnuiLBEm7QipPIrQlw9RzmmXbsGywedk2qYbV0_237oe9hAu1XUWD1QXwfszRafuz5xddXB-Vcu2sDBP7BYMWaV333EEMhvJHpHN2zPtttXnzxyM6iW_tHiQBHUMC3pZVyvTZ_ZKJ0l_0bfdUi41EFzlBOEgHMvgrUsH7GJhZlCA7_pB5Q4xkjveNNH58_Y5nIoojAq2ipEnNb273Nc941Hn_RJN6RCVlAA%3D) If you donate at least $100 you will get a copy of my new book! [Friend, please donate as generously as you can right now! And remember, if you give $100 or more, you'll get a copy of my new book. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de652353b7b448d1837451e845fd91fc&_e=yKAD2h9omnuiLBEm7QipPIrQlw9RzmmXbsGywedk2qYbV0_237oe9hAu1XUWD1QXwfszRafuz5xddXB-Vcu2sM2ou2SC4INFzPH0ZfrwXus2tbsIOaWP1ZeEqjCHjQIzkCsmnyLAOD7GqvYT6K1qE-hIntxplufSbzK2n5wPb4-A8lbSZculp2HCL6Ou6GShntVu-n5zR60HlWwnT-zemKAySX3qHvKxnqEqdH9VLIA%3D) Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

name: John Kennedy
subject: I haven’t scratched my head this much since Law School
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
This is it.

| [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3200d919cf34728b0ec28532735a976&_e=98ZWfpn0tDcDBWkHrLQznLvXSwVVipjt2qjRJDzxxLn_Xw5R8sShSXWtYiWzKIhcOPl-6ZCA2w1Let-XX0WMGXL15EBtRiRLep1eypUXz_mgRKU5Glv7volQJElvcvZNaQIChcWpj8ynvbsNneibrzx8PDQSaEEQ9oEGk0GP3sl16O40_Fl4PZ8jOFIM6gK2-SrwRK-NQosetLkaug5KZkcnSlJ5BxqGQbCZBvB0VsbNk0f0JnlEuWz7R8OTpoGBkSKFQmFhk6mA2XImYM6esfV_EggWcQjb4basEBNn60b1EolF4pzY9ky0w7zNfrztbI-u5LdqmrjHfdqtuHoqjNKNZT3aYIkZ4dzbaGzVgihiEOoXn6GnazNG59CLmYjYZtdXgejzdRt3Ns7cIYruLQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

**This is it for today. I 'm going to be honest with you. Right now - I'm drawing a blank.

I haven't scratched my head this much since Law School, and I feel like a dog chasing its tail because no matter what I do, nothing's working.**

Democrats have just about whipped the Red Wave back to where it started - and everything that we've built in this nation is in danger of being dismantled, scrapped, and forgotten. [**I need your help, and I need you to listen.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3200d919cf34728b0ec28532735a976&_e=98ZWfpn0tDcDBWkHrLQznLvXSwVVipjt2qjRJDzxxLn_Xw5R8sShSXWtYiWzKIhcOPl-6ZCA2w1Let-XX0WMGXL15EBtRiRLep1eypUXz_mgRKU5Glv7volQJElvcvZNaQIChcWpj8ynvbsNneibrzx8PDQSaEEQ9oEGk0GP3sl16O40_Fl4PZ8jOFIM6gK2-SrwRK-NQosetLkaug5KZkcnSlJ5BxqGQbCZBvB0Vsbtee3J5s2JlhB6zElyLkAIYWx1T8aDQy3rH3nz1n5AV-M6T17gF-8bAd2txl6buIWFwtRRQHzGSBb5u_FDcBl8ms_D3Plt8rzahm8hdv03aheqN4r06FrHUUE8XKzxN8sOSo5J3jXBYwVDzeJMXcyMkmIivZ4uSdt1LxB9p38Jgg%3D%3D)

**I 've tried and tried again to ensure that we've got everything we need to Take Back the Senate in November, but everything I've done has proven about as useful as a football bat. Our fundraising is plummeting.

I'm getting phone calls from my staff hounding me to get back to work because they're saying that fundraising has halted entirely in the past few hours.**

Usually, I'd worry about more pressing matters on a Friday evening, but then I looked at the headlines and saw how much money the Democrats are raising. I had to heat up a pot of coffee and get to work.

**[I can't put my mind at ease until I've seen one more showing of support from EVERYBODY on Team Kennedy before Midnight.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3200d919cf34728b0ec28532735a976&_e=98ZWfpn0tDcDBWkHrLQznLvXSwVVipjt2qjRJDzxxLn_Xw5R8sShSXWtYiWzKIhcOPl-6ZCA2w1Let-XX0WMGXL15EBtRiRLep1eypUXz_mgRKU5Glv7volQJElvcvZNaQIChcWpj8ynvbsNneibrzx8PDQSaEEQ9oEGk0GP3sl16O40_Fl4PZ8jOFIM6gK2-SrwRK-NQosetLkaug5KZkcnSlJ5BxqGQbCZBvB0Vsbz5doAiOqBpFh8Y5V8FWs1rbhp1C8WsvUQWQ3tp7EwrOwFDEt6x1c47lflCXmWIGOBYN-gCduoDLCchBxI-j_5kj5AssDE8MJaYfkYSpWxg9EcM7rviaM8y1mWNqfsd7_SCbV7imi5_FLOINjD3EmcCqlPheYooDA1axN6aTaSmQ%3D%3D)**

**_ We WON'T WIN the Senate in November without your help!_**

clean_body: This is it. | Friend, This is it for today. I 'm going to be honest with you. Right now - I'm drawing a blank. I haven't scratched my head this much since Law School, and I feel like a dog chasing its tail because no matter what I do, nothing's working. Democrats have just about whipped the Red Wave back to where it started - and everything that we've built in this nation is in danger of being dismantled, scrapped, and forgotten. I 've tried and tried again to ensure that we've got everything we need to Take Back the Senate in November, but everything I've done has proven about as useful as a football bat. Our fundraising is plummeting. I'm getting phone calls from my staff hounding me to get back to work because they're saying that fundraising has halted entirely in the past few hours. Usually, I'd worry about more pressing matters on a Friday evening, but then I looked at the headlines and saw how much money the Democrats are raising. I had to heat up a pot of coffee and get to work. We WON'T WIN the Senate in November without your help! | I 've got to hit the phone and call in some favors, but I hope this message reaches you well. Best, A Tired & Worried John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Wishing all the dads out there a GREAT day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville Victory Fund
body:
I’m a grateful son and proud father – these are among my greatest blessings.
| | | Peter,

I know it’s Sunday morning and I’m sure you have a busy day, so I’ll keep this quick.

I just couldn’t let today pass without reaching out to wish all of the dads out there a GREAT Father’s Day 2024!
---
---
My father was an amazing man, a World War II veteran and true patriot who taught me so much about life and the world to help make me the man I am today. I am a grateful son.

It has also been among the greatest joys of my life to raise two truly outstanding sons with my wife, Suzanne. I am so proud of them and proud to be their father.

_These are among the greatest blessings ANYONE can be fortunate enough to have!_

Happy Father’s Day to all the dads out there and all those celebrating them.

\- Coach
---
| | Paid for by Tuberville Victory Fund.
---
| | id: 2024-06-05-20:10:44:134t
---

Folks,

I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs.

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself.

A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not.

My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend.

If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: **[[LINK]](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=7b8917dd6ca3404d94fbd16d1708456c&_e=H98vvulaHMRe-boMMLGpaLGueqKUCTDRkA9YlHVyjo84Zufvki_IBTSnv7F5BXF7abSxbJMhowftmBlB6Y1RKwNEC5r5IDZTJEyUEco2A15PMUFYjnM8w_m3hwQH10glUY8l3IFDsv7wqv8HpFW8IVGnvKNHhV9JBxNXxwDWez7S1Lz5pOZPB4BfVXx3prV5i6jrQwPj-G2wvwBqoFVlcPXGbEUNKC5exeIyuPUMdp5El-D3bAMFWV-1VpSJqYnUG5SJNtwXePlruFPT_yaUARA4uIFK1gAUTIdXm5NZnZjBRBj-ksHfpUubX8dYlkYuzviEO7JSyR7TAv5NT_wwQEqMFawdT1x2rAhvEoZZECYGhcRFEqGC5bXkbe5Ps11O)**

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

Senator Kennedy

Before I share what he said about me, I need to underscore this:
**Donald Trump poses a unique and dangerous threat to our democracy. We are at risk of seeing a convicted felon, who has no regard for the rule of law, elected as President of the United States — a position from which he could do unspeakable damage to our democracy here at home, and democracies around the world.**

In an hour-long softball interview with Dr. Phil, Trump attacked the judge in the New York trial, President Biden, and the jury of 12 Americans who unanimously ruled he was guilty of 34 felony counts. **He came after me as well.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86994305/479693200/-309686741?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240616_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNGFlOTc1LWRiMmItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WbvDzqW0K3Xa1CTtAh7O91SYEieWfE95uK2UwDMNVC8=)
_“**I call him watermelon head.** He’s got the thinnest neck I’ve ever seen. Very unattractive guy, both inside and outside. **These are bad people.** "_
Friend, trust me — I’ve been called a lot worse by Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies.
**What concerns me far more is how Trump, in this very interview and numerous other recent campaign events, has explicitly called for revenge against his political rivals._Rivals like me. Like his call to prosecute me and other members of the January 6 Committee._**
God forbid Trump makes it back to the White House, he will use his powers to seek retribution against the people who have held him accountable for his crimes and disgraceful behavior. Including me.
He tried to do this during his first term, and he lashed out at his former attorney general for not going after rivals with baseless investigations and lawsuits. **But if he’s president for a second time, he’ll only appoint cabinet officials who do exactly what he wants.**
Donald Trump has promised to be a dictator on day one. He admires leaders like Vladimir Putin and Kim Jong Un. That’s the risk he poses to our country.
[_**While the attacks start with schoolyard names like “watermelon head,” they will only escalate from here, friend. We need to do everything we can to make sure Donald Trump does _not_ take back the White House. Please pitch in a split contribution between Upset the Setup and my campaign to support Democrats and to continue holding Trump to account. It’s vitally important.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86994306/479693201/-309686741?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240616_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNGFlOTc1LWRiMmItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WbvDzqW0K3Xa1CTtAh7O91SYEieWfE95uK2UwDMNVC8=)

clean_body: In a surprise to no one, friend, Donald Trump attacked me in a bizarre hour-long interview with Dr. Phil. Before I share what he said about me, I need to underscore this: Donald Trump poses a unique and dangerous threat to our democracy. We are at risk of seeing a convicted felon, who has no regard for the rule of law, elected as President of the United States — a position from which he could do unspeakable damage to our democracy here at home, and democracies around the world. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = In an hour-long softball interview with Dr. Phil, Trump attacked the judge in the New York trial, President Biden, and the jury of 12 Americans who unanimously ruled he was guilty of 34 felony counts. He came after me as well. = “I call him watermelon head. He’s got the thinnest neck I’ve ever seen. Very unattractive guy, both inside and outside. These are bad people. " Friend, trust me — I’ve been called a lot worse by Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies. What concerns me far more is how Trump, in this very interview and numerous other recent campaign events, has explicitly called for revenge against his political rivals.Rivals like me. Like his call to prosecute me and other members of the January 6 Committee. God forbid Trump makes it back to the White House, he will use his powers to seek retribution against the people who have held him accountable for his crimes and disgraceful behavior. Including me. He tried to do this during his first term, and he lashed out at his former attorney general for not going after rivals with baseless investigations and lawsuits. But if he’s president for a second time, he’ll only appoint cabinet officials who do exactly what he wants. Donald Trump has promised to be a dictator on day one. He admires leaders like Vladimir Putin and Kim Jong Un. That’s the risk he poses to our country. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for your support. While I could spend some time coming up with jokes about the orange man calling me watermelon head, I’m instead going to focus on holding him to account and protecting our democracy. — Adam | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. name: DUE @ MIDNIGHT (via FFR)
subject: Jamie Raskin’s bold plan to save democracy
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21547%2E4449941%2EWEoUyi)
---
**THE BAD NEWS:** Justices Alito and Thomas are far too biased to deliver an impartial ruling on Donald Trump’s January 6 case – Alito flew a flag in support of the Stop the Steal movement and Thomas’ wife was directly involved.

**THE GOOD NEWS:** Jamie Raskin has a plan – the Department of Justice can FORCE Justices Thomas and Alito to recuse themselves. | _But we need EVERY SINGLE Democrat to step up and demand it, so we’re launching an emergency poll to see what top Democrats think:_

**[_Do you think the Justice Department should force Justices Thomas and Alito to recuse themselves from Trump’s case?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240616_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21547%2E4449941%2EWEoUyi)** | **[YES, OF COURSE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240616_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21547%2E4449941%2EWEoUyi)**
---
**[NO, THEY SHOULDN’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240616_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21547%2E4449941%2EWEoUyi)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240616_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21547%2E4449941%2EWEoUyi)**
**POLL CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT, RESPOND NOW**
We all have to use our voice if we’re going to make this happen!

– FFR

# **_DOUGLAS LINCOLN BRUNCH_**
**June 29, 2024, 10:00am
Southbrook Town Center Banquet Hall
1212 E. Shelby Dr, Memphis, TN 38116**
**Come hear how two trailblazers overcame major obstacles in their lives to realize success, and you can, too.**

Our guest speaker is the former Washington County **Judge Joseph Wood**. He was elected by the Republican Party of Arkansas to serve as the Arkansas GOP Chairman and was backed by Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders. His role is similar to our own Tennessee GOP Chairman Scott Golden.

Chairman Wood was born in Chicago, Illinois. He earned a bachelor's degree from Iowa State University in 1987 and a graduate degree from Ecclesia College in 2016. Chairman Wood's career experience includes working as a County Judge and as the Arkansas Deputy Secretary of State.

Chairman Wood was not born into riches. For as long as he can remember, he always felt just a little bit different from the people around him. Adopted into a large family, at times he felt as a stranger growing up among siblings. Attending college in diversity-starved Iowa only reinforced how few black and brown faces there were to mirror his. Even his political philosophy — a conservative of color — earned him a place in an exclusive club that began in his 20s. Chairman Wood presents as a modern-day Frederick Douglass!

_**SPONSORS NEEDED**_
We are looking for sponsors to purchase tables to allow more Whitehaven residences, college students, and church leaders to attend this Brunch. Please help us spread the message of freedom and liberty to a community that has only received liberal messages year after year.

name: Kevin Lata, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Why this summer could decide what happens in November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
There’s one thing that’s remained consistent no matter which campaign or organization I’m working for.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240616-1&t=1&akid=817%2E587540%2EnObNco)
Hi Peter, it’s Kevin from Leaders We Deserve.
Before my friend David Hogg and I started this adventure together, I worked on a few different campaigns, and I learned a lot from each of them.
There’s one thing that’s remained consistent no matter which campaign or organization I’ve worked for, though: **fundraising _always_ slows down during the summer.**
**[Pitch in $5 to help »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240616-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240616-1-817&refcode2=817_587540_nObNco&akid=817%2E587540%2EnObNco)**
It seemed kind of weird to me at first, but it makes sense if you think about it. Summer’s when kids are out of school, a lot of families go on vacation, and people are just generally a little less tuned in.
**But that doesn’t mean our work slows down — far from it!** In fact, we’re actually ramping up our operations to elect 12 of our Leaders We Deserve endorsed candidates across the country.
That work takes resources, however, which makes the prospect of a summer fundraising slowdown a little stress-inducing on my part!
So Peter, that’s why I’m reaching out to you. With so many candidates counting on our support to win their elections this November, we need your help to make sure we have the resources to do it.
**[Will you pitch in $5 today to help us get ahead of the summer slowdown, meet our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and elect all 12 of our Leaders We Deserve endorsed candidates this November?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240616-1?refcode=em20240616-1&amount=5&refcode2=817_587540_nObNco&akid=817%2E587540%2EnObNco)**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Black Pastors Revive School Voucher Issue | Free Library Friction ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and happy Father’s Day! Welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a09cb3c158&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Black pastors call on Shapiro to enact Lifeline Scholarships](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=94cbd49bca&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_

Black pastors from across the state held a [press conference](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a05714e207&e=b7b3eddce2) at the Capitol this week, calling on Governor Shapiro to “courageously lead us beyond the toxic, bipartisan politics and preferences that undermine a quality education for every child in Pennsylvania.” Led by the[ Black Pastors United for Education](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e445a44ad4&e=b7b3eddce2), a network of non-sectarian, bipartisan pastors and congregations, the group’s founder, Reverend Joshua C. Robertson, presented an open[ letter](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e9b96c6790&e=b7b3eddce2) to the Governor, signed by sixty pastors across the Commonwealth. The rotunda was filled with pastors, parents, and students for the press conference where Rev. Robertson passionately called on lawmakers to put politics aside and focus on children and their education.

**Why It Matters**. Almost a year ago, Governor Shapiro[ declared](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=449bb0b210&e=b7b3eddce2), “every child of God deserves a quality education.” Despite his sentiments, he yielded his power to[ veto](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3e30d43493&e=b7b3eddce2) the Lifeline Scholarships, newly branded as the Pennsylvania Award for Student Success (PASS). Speculations remain whether Shapiro and other Democrats were beholden to the special interest groups that Robertson mentioned. Now, the governor has another opportunity to fulfill his campaign promises, and more importantly, ensure that every child has access to a quality education regardless of their zip code.

**Quotable**. “Lawmakers should not be beholden to unions, school districts, special interest groups, lobbyists, and beyond. We need lawmakers to put Pennsylvania students at the center of their decision,” Rev. Robertson said. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1b7115fe93&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Friction and fiction at the library](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=53f1544108&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Richard Koenig_
May and June have been difficult months for several Philadelphia universities and cultural institutions: The closure of the University of the Arts, Cabrini University and a heap of trouble at the Free Library of Philadelphia.

The Free Library scenario is a case that might have been lifted from an Agatha Christie plot, since it highlights a host of systemic problems there that apparently have been seething under the surface for months — if not years — before an implosion occurred around the abrupt and unexplained termination of the Author Events staff.

The official story that went out to the media concerned friction between the tiny Author Events staff — Andy Kahan, Laura Kovacs, Jason Freeman and Nell Mittelstead — and the Foundation Board of the Free Library that runs the day-to-day operation of the Library. The exact nature of that “friction” was never explained. Readers of the news reports could only assume that the “friction” had to do with some general underlying tension, a secret that only those “in the know” would have an inkling of.

**Why It Matters**. Kahan, I think, is not without blame. My experience as an author is that through the years Kahan and his events crew became a kind of clique with authors they tended to favor and celebrate — and to blazes with the rest. Jennifer Weiner comes to mind; she became a Central superstar, appearing over and over again to the point of, “Not her again!”

The Author Series under Kahan’s direction also became a very woke enterprise; one almost never saw a conservative author but there was always rooms for an anti-Trump pundit, a George Stephanopoulos or a Stacey Abrams. This is not to say that the Board Foundation isn’t on the same page, yet with Kahan and company there was certainly no “equity and inclusion.”

One tell-tale sign of the friction between Kahan’s crew — who may have been perceived by Foundation leaders as white elitists — and the powers that be can, I think, be seen in recent videos of authors events there.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cbb081b31e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **3. Don’t let politicians & lobbyists mess with YOUR credit card!**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b1363d3f6c&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
_Sponsored Partner Content_ – Electronic Payments Coalition
| **DON’T LET BIG BUSINESS AND POLITICIANS TAKE AWAY YOUR CHOICE!**

Electronic payments allow for the speed, the convenience, and the fraud protection you’ve come to expect and enjoy. Changing the system puts all that at risk.

Draft proposals are being promoted by certain interest groups in Pennsylvania that would prohibit financial institutions from collecting interchange on the sales tax portion of credit and debit card transactions. Interchange is the fee merchants pay to transmit their payments electronically.

Guard Your Card and tell politicians that Pennsylvania families lose when they choose.

Learn more [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=01d101d0e0&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
|

* **[Kitchen Table Politics: Five Months to Go – Polling Pennsylvania](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=46ad82af7b&e=b7b3eddce2)**

|
# **5\. Lightning Round**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: A feminist victory — men gain rights to the ladies room](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=17913bf352&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ben Mannes: Contradiction in federal job numbers further erodes trust in government](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bd1eabce81&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thomas C. Mandracchia: “I’d like to correct the record, Your Honor.” A response to Andy Bloom on Trump’s guilty verdict.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c15eb5422e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Gabriel Li: In Philadelphia, child welfare workers desperately need support](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0540b6f8bf&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Delco Dem defends deficits, reveals county credit downgraded](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3afced348f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **6\. What we're reading**
Texas Children’s Hospital said that they would no longer perform “gender transition treatments” on minors, but one doctor there, Eithan Haim, found that the hospital was still secretly doing so. So he told the truth, revealing his employer’s duplicity, while making sure the patient’s names and other personally identifying information were redacted. The feds sprang into action — against him, not the hospital. As Emily Yoffe reports for _The Free Press_ , [Haim now faces felony charges](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7e2f30c32d&e=b7b3eddce2) for the crime of telling the world an inconvenient truth. There are plenty of abuses of government power, big and small, but this one is so blatant that it is hard not to be outraged.

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning and happy Father’s Day! Welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Beth Ann Rosica Black pastors from across the state held a at the Capitol this week, calling on Governor Shapiro to “courageously lead us beyond the toxic, bipartisan politics and preferences that undermine a quality education for every child in Pennsylvania.” Led by the, a network of non-sectarian, bipartisan pastors and congregations, the group’s founder, Reverend Joshua C. Robertson, presented an open to the Governor, signed by sixty pastors across the Commonwealth. The rotunda was filled with pastors, parents, and students for the press conference where Rev. Robertson passionately called on lawmakers to put politics aside and focus on children and their education. Why It Matters. Almost a year ago, Governor Shapiro, “every child of God deserves a quality education.” Despite his sentiments, he yielded his power to the Lifeline Scholarships, newly branded as the Pennsylvania Award for Student Success (PASS). Speculations remain whether Shapiro and other Democrats were beholden to the special interest groups that Robertson mentioned. Now, the governor has another opportunity to fulfill his campaign promises, and more importantly, ensure that every child has access to a quality education regardless of their zip code. Quotable. “Lawmakers should not be beholden to unions, school districts, special interest groups, lobbyists, and beyond. We need lawmakers to put Pennsylvania students at the center of their decision,” Rev. Robertson said. | | 2. By Richard Koenig May and June have been difficult months for several Philadelphia universities and cultural institutions: The closure of the University of the Arts, Cabrini University and a heap of trouble at the Free Library of Philadelphia. The Free Library scenario is a case that might have been lifted from an Agatha Christie plot, since it highlights a host of systemic problems there that apparently have been seething under the surface for months — if not years — before an implosion occurred around the abrupt and unexplained termination of the Author Events staff. The official story that went out to the media concerned friction between the tiny Author Events staff — Andy Kahan, Laura Kovacs, Jason Freeman and Nell Mittelstead — and the Foundation Board of the Free Library that runs the day-to-day operation of the Library. The exact nature of that “friction” was never explained. Readers of the news reports could only assume that the “friction” had to do with some general underlying tension, a secret that only those “in the know” would have an inkling of. Why It Matters. Kahan, I think, is not without blame. My experience as an author is that through the years Kahan and his events crew became a kind of clique with authors they tended to favor and celebrate — and to blazes with the rest. Jennifer Weiner comes to mind; she became a Central superstar, appearing over and over again to the point of, “Not her again!” The Author Series under Kahan’s direction also became a very woke enterprise; one almost never saw a conservative author but there was always rooms for an anti-Trump pundit, a George Stephanopoulos or a Stacey Abrams. This is not to say that the Board Foundation isn’t on the same page, yet with Kahan and company there was certainly no “equity and inclusion.” One tell-tale sign of the friction between Kahan’s crew — who may have been perceived by Foundation leaders as white elitists — and the powers that be can, I think, be seen in recent videos of authors events there. | | 3. Don’t let politicians & lobbyists mess with YOUR credit card! | Sponsored Partner Content – Electronic Payments Coalition | DON’T LET BIG BUSINESS AND POLITICIANS TAKE AWAY YOUR CHOICE! Electronic payments allow for the speed, the convenience, and the fraud protection you’ve come to expect and enjoy. Changing the system puts all that at risk. Draft proposals are being promoted by certain interest groups in Pennsylvania that would prohibit financial institutions from collecting interchange on the sales tax portion of credit and debit card transactions. Interchange is the fee merchants pay to transmit their payments electronically. Guard Your Card and tell politicians that Pennsylvania families lose when they choose. Learn more . | | 4\. Podcasts | | 5\. Lightning Round | | 6\. What we're reading Texas Children’s Hospital said that they would no longer perform “gender transition treatments” on minors, but one doctor there, Eithan Haim, found that the hospital was still secretly doing so. So he told the truth, revealing his employer’s duplicity, while making sure the patient’s names and other personally identifying information were redacted. The feds sprang into action — against him, not the hospital. As Emily Yoffe reports for The Free Press , for the crime of telling the world an inconvenient truth. There are plenty of abuses of government power, big and small, but this one is so blatant that it is hard not to be outraged. | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. | MANAKIN SABOT, VA \-- 100% Pro-Trump 5th Congressional District candidate, former Navy SEAL, Virginia Senator, and business owner John McGuire today announced that he has been endorsed by Congressman Warren Davidson, a member of the U.S. House Freedom Caucus.
Congressman Davidson is the first member of the Bob Good-chaired Freedom Caucus to endorse McGuire. Davidson served as an officer in the Old Guard, the 75th Ranger Regiment, and the 101st Airborne.
---
|
---
| McGuire said: "I appreciate Congressman Davidson's support. I also appreciate him recognizing that I'm the America First candidate in this race. I've been with Trump since he came down the escalator, and Bob Good backstabbed Trump when it counted. We can do better than Good, so please get out and vote McGuire!"
McGuire is running against Never Trumper Bob Good in the VA-05 primary.
Along with [Donald J. Trump](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoXL_OspDTXIRMZRssR9_cAGbMpvi2voGng_I0bzSvqUck1j6DG9r0sfxBqkw_IXSw7r0fJEmzej2xzFsQDMEe8iByXSdnnHQLNBhGYGCkK8uPBJgDWuxH4k0G0KM4ZD4R7MA8JJ6SOM5tDq_gfdCxDTXzEJXkqv4erjY2yKT444QTwwXHZnAgcmVkTVs5BL7DE4dT46RS8=&c=05j8KtlWuSM_jBS3TBx9lhxXUt8u_wS34bUGrl-FBz9K7O1ML8mHFg==&ch=b8wBGjInxOBsK530tvgI_Yc2orHEN326ezPx1XfB4XGfcGCtBbEUBQ==), McGuire has been endorsed by prominent conservatives like [Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoXL_OspDTXIRMZRssR9_cAGbMpvi2voGng_I0bzSvqUck1j6DG9r5LegDAXlGClKxi6f4RpSm4Q5Iq0PxQk5T9k8Xz6L1zGYcgYrlqNUSl66jewAsYSfKN-QN1Cy7J3vu3qc95cgP-osasnam17xTH8lI4srr5FzYMsRy7GrjjTx7nOkKhitxgqZY_9mpm0KBGcIk0LIREzTvYkZ6kiGZE58IJVZDU83MQXIXoDJIZchUXB_BLmgcJ878zouiZS5jMphlLtg2NcxIDU67ozp2v6L4aBUZlshcvtyO1IMN11z6gCyNQ1xRT0BqBjMZCbC4CAQEdme0GtDjmxtJYldA==&c=05j8KtlWuSM_jBS3TBx9lhxXUt8u_wS34bUGrl-FBz9K7O1ML8mHFg==&ch=b8wBGjInxOBsK530tvgI_Yc2orHEN326ezPx1XfB4XGfcGCtBbEUBQ==), [Congressman Derrick Van Orden](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoXL_OspDTXIRMZRssR9_cAGbMpvi2voGng_I0bzSvqUck1j6DG9r5F00zTfLvbOo0SJONr3_Zd8kfZmIzIV-KO-rVd7MQOTNsrH-eSIACxnrFrGOtLMLgVcyJCfHa5Iau7k2mSFbfNnZSnwKYSJIY7GQtFK9JUzERfiJsBA81LXzmVaBKdVuXCDtymxpjvBsKD7zTWGyyaFfDDID0kEqw==&c=05j8KtlWuSM_jBS3TBx9lhxXUt8u_wS34bUGrl-FBz9K7O1ML8mHFg==&ch=b8wBGjInxOBsK530tvgI_Yc2orHEN326ezPx1XfB4XGfcGCtBbEUBQ==), and former [Speaker Newt Gingrich](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoXL_OspDTXIRMZRssR9_cAGbMpvi2voGng_I0bzSvqUck1j6DG9r5k6id_mTPF4xe6ANmm-zvVlC2zR6uy8_M7xHbfh-F5HJs91Y0UvFe9OZcHkXKeH8lyD2xp12hqL89DDuGoUsQOIbE4cAYMEnNHzj26ren3jwLK7gAi7_H5zqPa7voYK0LRirhQTG8I74ilthNEb0BEHTGiVZJrmjw==&c=05j8KtlWuSM_jBS3TBx9lhxXUt8u_wS34bUGrl-FBz9K7O1ML8mHFg==&ch=b8wBGjInxOBsK530tvgI_Yc2orHEN326ezPx1XfB4XGfcGCtBbEUBQ==). body:
You are invited to join Michael DiManna at his official campaign kickoff event at the Lakewood Country Club on June 26th, see email for details...
| | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012WF8Ij0NnxKhSMaHzR5tgmL-klhnkWnEcI2z86nPofzwA1UfeWzAtvMCAWSpfsbfS8K5_C5PQNRNQkOsUf7Bj-AJjE6l6Alf0HKnqid1pWba2aoq_5VLzHN1fEUCJ853jmdQri9hbWXPbrqNgV3mbrDFedAh3qIdq_GxTEg-8xvISIJNNKyAsb6IsZqnlzxgm2Z8jbQ9t35qnr44L8Wx4w==&c=YH7sSZFrNoMQQljlpaZ2AsPmW9oTMzs859Ef2NNEKlSAp7BLiFyMYg==&ch=8Lua3usGjfswLTbLjtdX0cu9KIYYQYdOCSpdJuO8Yi5Wqj7DEnUxBQ==)
---
| Fellow Republican, My name is Michael DiManna, and I am proud to be your Republican Nominee in Colorado's 2nd House District.
I am the candidate leading the fight against the radical democrats here in the State of Colorado.
I have been a practicing Lawyer in the Denver area for over 50 years, and I am sick and tired of seeing crime go unpunished in our city at the hands of the left, who doesn't believe in prosecuting offenders.
Here in Colorado, we have seen not only crime go unanswered but also inflation, homelessness, illegal immigration, encampments all over our once beautiful city, and multitudes of other issues go unchecked year after year.
We need a representative in the State House who will bring real solutions to our government, leading to a better, safer, and stronger city and state.
I will be holding my campaign kick-off event on Wednesday, June 26th, at the Lakewood Country Club, and I would be honored if you would attend and help us kickstart our mission to beat the Democrats here in Colorado.
Please see the attached invitation below:
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012WF8Ij0NnxKhSMaHzR5tgmL-klhnkWnEcI2z86nPofzwA1UfeWzAtvMCAWSpfsbfhTVny148rykgEeCIKycp7GqIQQtVBA0sGhavBWVIQO0dVd-6Kgjd5bFKMjF1WJQtgdWYxu5frGPga4QJhpbmdPiA85viApaij5ypPUThako0b4wLfcG0xw2-VJmD4Es2fh0Heo444Vg72widaSUAxE987HImQ4NZ&c=YH7sSZFrNoMQQljlpaZ2AsPmW9oTMzs859Ef2NNEKlSAp7BLiFyMYg==&ch=8Lua3usGjfswLTbLjtdX0cu9KIYYQYdOCSpdJuO8Yi5Wqj7DEnUxBQ==)
---
| | [RSVP for Team DiManna's Kickoff](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012WF8Ij0NnxKhSMaHzR5tgmL-klhnkWnEcI2z86nPofzwA1UfeWzAtvMCAWSpfsbfhTVny148rykgEeCIKycp7GqIQQtVBA0sGhavBWVIQO0dVd-6Kgjd5bFKMjF1WJQtgdWYxu5frGPga4QJhpbmdPiA85viApaij5ypPUThako0b4wLfcG0xw2-VJmD4Es2fh0Heo444Vg72widaSUAxE987HImQ4NZ&c=YH7sSZFrNoMQQljlpaZ2AsPmW9oTMzs859Ef2NNEKlSAp7BLiFyMYg==&ch=8Lua3usGjfswLTbLjtdX0cu9KIYYQYdOCSpdJuO8Yi5Wqj7DEnUxBQ==)
---
| I hope that you, your friends, and family can join us on June 26th as you join me in my mission to be Your Voice For a Better Colorado. Without your help and support we cannot win in 2024.
This race is an uphill battle, but with your help, we can give a real fight to my democrat opponent, who has spent far too long in our capitol aiding in the destruction of our state.
If you cannot attend our kickoff event, I ask that you consider contributing to our campaign by clicking the button below. I know times are tough, and we are all struggling, but we need your help to maintain this campaign's full-steam-ahead approach to November election day.
---
| | [Donate to Michael's Campaign NOW!](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012WF8Ij0NnxKhSMaHzR5tgmL-klhnkWnEcI2z86nPofzwA1UfeWzAtvMCAWSpfsbfS8K5_C5PQNRNQkOsUf7Bj-AJjE6l6Alf0HKnqid1pWba2aoq_5VLzHN1fEUCJ853jmdQri9hbWXPbrqNgV3mbrDFedAh3qIdq_GxTEg-8xvISIJNNKyAsb6IsZqnlzxgm2Z8jbQ9t35qnr44L8Wx4w==&c=YH7sSZFrNoMQQljlpaZ2AsPmW9oTMzs859Ef2NNEKlSAp7BLiFyMYg==&ch=8Lua3usGjfswLTbLjtdX0cu9KIYYQYdOCSpdJuO8Yi5Wqj7DEnUxBQ==)
---
| I hope to see you on the 26th at my kickoff, and I appreciate your support in this race. When you answer this call to action, I am confident in our chances to win in November!
See you soon!
---
| Best,
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012WF8Ij0NnxKhSMaHzR5tgmL-klhnkWnEcI2z86nPofzwA1UfeWzAtvMCAWSpfsbfS8K5_C5PQNRNQkOsUf7Bj-AJjE6l6Alf0HKnqid1pWba2aoq_5VLzHN1fEUCJ853jmdQri9hbWXPbrqNgV3mbrDFedAh3qIdq_GxTEg-8xvISIJNNKyAsb6IsZqnlzxgm2Z8jbQ9t35qnr44L8Wx4w==&c=YH7sSZFrNoMQQljlpaZ2AsPmW9oTMzs859Ef2NNEKlSAp7BLiFyMYg==&ch=8Lua3usGjfswLTbLjtdX0cu9KIYYQYdOCSpdJuO8Yi5Wqj7DEnUxBQ==)

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Meeting between this governor and Donald Trump could have massive consequences on the 2024 election
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 16, 2024

Leftist Governor
spits in the face of Trump supporters by making this deranged
statement

Democrats despise former President Donald Trump. Because
of that, they also loathe those who support him.

And a Leftist Governor spat in
the face of Trump supporters by making this deranged statement.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden's
involvement in attack on Secret Service has Republicans outraged

The president has
been known to make life difficult for those who work with him.
But no one ever expected this.
➞ Continue Reading

What Jill Biden just
did to U.S. citizens will have you sick to your stomach

The Biden family is
full of bad actors. And that includes the first lady.
➞ Continue Reading

Border Patrol
uncovered this disturbing reality that is spinning heads

We all know the
southern border is a mess. But the latest discovery is downright
scary.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.
