name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: This week we're highlighting LGBTQ+ progress and calling out theGOP’s anti-LGBTQ+ agenda.
body:
Welcome to the LGBTQ+ Pride Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter, June 16th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhnpYEDC1zCy_aVhTCXGaPnndepaL01a8jp-GXmOTuiDk8c3wREJnfo9XuqPEn__cET0jlQ7LBvM4jI8eeFcEZasbk854cq9i1K9hPCWfZKqRnGQVE-569N3lQ0bxLAhCtsTXHSSYAg5DDN7Q0hj0IoTLlht6r6R9NpOwuFwLjIvqgPZ6KBu9ZmfTXxUdf7tmexslEoIQqo1uskWGB5f3rm4JftsqaP5hI7KdzUoSf9Mk_6Nnrg4h61tqR5AwKxIYLpNHhCJyFqB6-QTvAlfhaVWkj6bZYDNYbzKHS4e8JxJ51cxqrDrEr_xt0_7tpPj0HuqBjdyTJ-Cgcq6x1wbM3Q/479/eqFqe577Tkq0Nt0WwiaX0g/h0/h001.etSuBZ_V6rrfCV-LogWhWbMHUtKVVFeS5GMWf2zScH0)
---
**Here’s what you need to know this week for Pride month:**
* * *
🌈 **_History of Pride:_ What is Pride Month? **
June is Pride Month, a month celebrating LGBTQ+ culture and rights. [**Click here to learn more about the month's origins, LGBTQ+ history, and the stakes of the protests →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1ReW7l9EKoZODga9G1o77pikMls4mtnxOGZ3OfGpk9ezry0lp4J6F283syua7o2W5fwb69CPtCY05Scx9cSfKsGw3QaYYLLM1rCKdTg7KWR08n91SVvv4gjKLMyVEtykgtZmegSaCqaDFOVuD_t0ccEwQU9G7ukNVxGLNhYLYZxK_0RQ-3fV-BRhNCqBF1uRBaB9kxsmNx8NAsVJ5z56_dhS5TpHW1Nc4kFHSBBsVbipunzO0iVdMbchpXhuiV-djBiVtg9lMqTGLtGFeUB0DP4XNlEsfLT0iOUYH_ygfBpdkL047q76H9eOJN-V8GnZAD_rqI9QP6n_857mZJRSBhn2j55cl_nerLm1Pt64ZTURns5KsohjxDKAH4PinEcIcz4svy4XLwdNIcRxImJxurQCxlWlKaQSH4HO_eRprkNGLdZmV-VBrHhBhCVD9MHAIsinAbmgO-i5aOLiUgP2dEzLTVYucjhSIdLLXm3XPipYA/479/eqFqe577Tkq0Nt0WwiaX0g/h1/h001.fICmdy6wOXD5kn9sXhaJoHa4lSa5jrAW9cVng6mm9ic)
* * *
**👏 State Democrats are working to protect LGBTQ+ rights**
**❤️ In Colorado,** the state’s Democratic trifecta passed a Bill of Rights for Foster Youth, which includes protections for children in foster care to express their gender identity freely.
**🧡 In Virginia,** the Democrat-controlled legislature passed a bill enshrining same-sex marriage into state law.
**💛 In Washington,** Democrats passed a law requiring LGBTQ+ history to be taught in schools.
**💚 In Florida,** Democrats are working to repeal the state’s anti-LGBTQ+ laws, including those that restrict access to gender-affirming care and ban gender identity and sexual orientation from being discussed in public schools.
**💙 In Wisconsin,** Democrats worked to remove language in the state constitution that defines marriage as between one man and one woman. They also tried to amend the state constitution to include protections for equal rights on the basis of gender identity, race, sexual orientation, and more. **Republicans blocked both efforts.**
* * *
**While Democrats fight for LGBTQ+ freedoms, Republicans continue attacking them, here’s just one example:**
🚨 **Colorado Republicans call for the burning of Pride flags**
After the state’s Republican party sent an email with the subject line “God Hates Pride,” the party posted on X calling for the burning of pride flags. [**The GOP is relentlessly targeting the LGBTQ+ community during a month designated to celebrate equality and queer visibility →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoQpJA28XKhBdolVwpWmQ3tjOriYKpPClQC1xJXcoi1f1W4xT37wnLtBVvTl93GCHwdmx-stvoxzrWvz_6PVrbuK7oclFXHfPWC0V6esiIGWlA-KtTdD33Occ03xkP1yobV-A3HQIizFL7kxleseXjzcE8CXubkMmuUiI7mZDOJraw_sDTGeX2tDvHEES0dxfHIhRiRJPuH3DrrP0VQfUQZOuUaHpK6ZFr9allnyNlyBk3-MkU9_lMFBXAPvNZDqC1T8MOpWv2SrEEtnax06jisNYpX6zLV1Hc-fvWTdP4W1q65LVVVm0jU3bsSgybpDq-p9GIwiR7Xe7ylBBOyZMSQbg_8cH0HAxxwKNPlYu89NvVQ2KBfo26VD0sCeUVcwLz6wK-ji4BDouZOjXCYNlEPHK9CAD1Xkb1m6-78YttbhHIAHIsq6XKxivt37wcT1Uap7pEbGq5QCn4kSrG7vi1y9Ekv-DFLxpwrRE12k7nXa5bfAptogHzJBxhN_AAr50SAEFbYvvq0sFMw96W39P9_g/479/eqFqe577Tkq0Nt0WwiaX0g/h2/h001.CzpoePf0Fo9DMQGFzKXxHplao-98x9vWrxu0gIYaBpA)
* * *
**Two things you can do to help support the LGBTQ+ community:**
🏳️🌈 **_Learn:_ LGBTQ+ Equality by state **
The Movement Advancement Project (MAP) tracks over 50 different LGBTQ-related laws and policies. Check out their interactive map to find out about the policies affecting the LGBTQ+ community. [**Click here to see the map →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMcc8my652L6ruuRc12PXU7ZIEsQjRxjjmh3ncLFC4IAMMPzJbczZ5noVmn2akrVvbIMZ9MVdpDflwUW3tYllNxjPnjYrkwNS9Kp4gSt3jV9lvyePU8FVPUi80y4ajNK4RdeZIrnP1-OO1_EKbzmFaLuQPosGlV-oQ6xroSQb7WwhzzNbiNM9amy0f38SfGd5itiAobAGjV2v6dWlPboa96KSiqAXuL-Lc2i9emY7SMRAkiNTCiQJ7vNgWQ9leC75ERBSwBaJkyBgZAqtIbnaRoEBA8n90KhPJaxjpWlSp0CHSf3ySvrkLbU3yPAtpN1St_iAnqFVKHMkaTz_2Np01l9KrG4-IxDjj0spKStNfGI5tP-it1FRLhT1Nu9wFg-5IuDAR7wGLwo6s8bZ6ZXsBAME5WGTMmw8wDR9tj-QsUpCjZnSRRLxFEACQmBAqja03g/479/eqFqe577Tkq0Nt0WwiaX0g/h3/h001.O2ZKUMR6L19SFRRvxg56slKneA8DNqjpaUps_T50yPc)
**🗳️ _Make a difference this Pride Month:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races**
Electing Democrats to state legislatures is the most impactful way to defend LGBTQ+ rights and freedoms, which are on the line in states across the country in 2024. So, [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to invest early and help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDt4Do6vyPJ50F6Afq3NtvRFlUrbhk7oawNRVJIKmEDBeHZH2XzkniAEXb5JQYT9s-7jbUYolsIFeXnqFivV8g9tinAP_KenIlGBLThmTbsDns37L9GBXVZmNsDJuDk8-Z2vwzDj-F_ymSs2RICxlSqhJDmRq72igEqcuEaG1LtVYKGUsPup1PEgKYQozm4SZPK679zhvV5XBxgJTfnZd4UQfveDJ2Pyj826YAUyweekHQPcwq86775NvhKMilEra4Qf3H-UBr9j_ccSOog32ChiK8K8BaVjNcTIF2QSU4TRCchiyztUqdVuRh1vc9j3CgQtbD-ryTsdwqByq6eQx9pJ75N5pXzVh8MIKuOqokryyaFzm5Id84mT2chVOFkoJSu7GNqEfIPfpUd2HgBg8eZyC-LizUTKHmlbO8lKxGZBfPSa22lxgmP2FDQ17PbJ1g/479/eqFqe577Tkq0Nt0WwiaX0g/h4/h001.u2BIzO8PCXf533m2scMfvnbGASg4--yAbTJ8-iHeQpg)

clean_body: Welcome to the LGBTQ+ Pride Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter, June 16th, 2024 | | | | | Here’s what you need to know this week for Pride month: 🌈 History of Pride: What is Pride Month? June is Pride Month, a month celebrating LGBTQ+ culture and rights. 👏 State Democrats are working to protect LGBTQ+ rights ❤️ In Colorado, the state’s Democratic trifecta passed a Bill of Rights for Foster Youth, which includes protections for children in foster care to express their gender identity freely. 🧡 In Virginia, the Democrat-controlled legislature passed a bill enshrining same-sex marriage into state law. 💛 In Washington, Democrats passed a law requiring LGBTQ+ history to be taught in schools. 💚 In Florida, Democrats are working to repeal the state’s anti-LGBTQ+ laws, including those that restrict access to gender-affirming care and ban gender identity and sexual orientation from being discussed in public schools. 💙 In Wisconsin, Democrats worked to remove language in the state constitution that defines marriage as between one man and one woman. They also tried to amend the state constitution to include protections for equal rights on the basis of gender identity, race, sexual orientation, and more. Republicans blocked both efforts. While Democrats fight for LGBTQ+ freedoms, Republicans continue attacking them, here’s just one example: 🚨 Colorado Republicans call for the burning of Pride flags After the state’s Republican party sent an email with the subject line “God Hates Pride,” the party posted on X calling for the burning of pride flags. Two things you can do to help support the LGBTQ+ community: 🏳️🌈 Learn: LGBTQ+ Equality by state The Movement Advancement Project (MAP) tracks over 50 different LGBTQ-related laws and policies. Check out their interactive map to find out about the policies affecting the LGBTQ+ community. 🗳️ Make a difference this Pride Month: Democrats prepare for upcoming races Electing Democrats to state legislatures is the most impactful way to defend LGBTQ+ rights and freedoms, which are on the line in states across the country in 2024. So, ****** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Happy Father's Day!
On this special day dedicated to celebrating the extraordinary men who have shaped our lives, I want to take a moment to extend my heartfelt wishes to each and every father.
In every corner of the world, fathers serve as beacons of strength, wisdom, and unconditional love. Your guidance, support, and sacrifices pave the way for our success and happiness.
As a proud father and grandfather, this day always reminds me of the greatest blessings in my life.
---

| May this Father's Day be filled with laughter, joy, and cherished moments with your loved ones.
Thank you,
Russell Prescott

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

clean_body: | | | | == | Happy Father's Day! On this special day dedicated to celebrating the extraordinary men who have shaped our lives, I want to take a moment to extend my heartfelt wishes to each and every father. In every corner of the world, fathers serve as beacons of strength, wisdom, and unconditional love. Your guidance, support, and sacrifices pave the way for our success and happiness. As a proud father and grandfather, this day always reminds me of the greatest blessings in my life. | == | May this Father's Day be filled with laughter, joy, and cherished moments with your loved ones. Thank you, Russell Prescott | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. name: Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena
subject: Celebrating our dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3269%2E552475%2EnNYKVX)
Hi Peter, it’s Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena — Bob’s daughters.
In honor of Father’s Day, we want to take a minute to celebrate our dad.
Many know him as Senator Casey or Bob, but to us, he’s just Dad, and we couldn’t be more grateful to be his daughters.
Whether it was coaching our basketball games, coming up with the most elaborate bedtime stories, or being the constant cameraman for all our home videos, he always showed up for us with love, joy, and compassion.
One of our favorite things about our dad is that his compassion extends beyond our family. Every day, he’s fighting for the future of Pennsylvanians — whether that’s working to lower costs for working families, advocating for seniors and people with disabilities, investing in our children and their futures, or ensuring our communities are safe. Our dad cares deeply about individuals and families across our state and country.
We can’t afford to lose his leadership in the Senate, but he’s in the toughest Senate race of his career. National Republicans know that if they flip PA, they can flip the Senate — and they’re spending millions to do it.
**[If we’re going to keep Pennsylvania blue, our dad needs your help. Will you make a donation to his re-election campaign today? Any amount will go a long way in a race this competitive.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-1?refcode=em20240616-1&refcode2=3269_552475_nNYKVX&akid=3269%2E552475%2EnNYKVX)**
Thank you, and happy Father’s Day to all the dads and father figures across Pennsylvania.
— The Casey Family
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-1?refcode=em20240616-1&refcode2=3269_552475_nNYKVX&akid=3269%2E552475%2EnNYKVX)

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=3269%2E552475%2EnNYKVX)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3269%2E552475%2EnNYKVX)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Sam Brown
subject: I have 3 things to say to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Dear friend, we just won the Nevada Senate GOP Primary, and I wanted to talk to you directly.
Dear friend,

clean_body: Dear friend, we just won the Nevada Senate GOP Primary, and I wanted to talk to you directly. Dear friend, This is Captain Sam Brown and I have three things I need to say to you after winning the Nevada GOP Senate Primary: Just under a year ago, I set out to build an unstoppable movement focused on putting Duty First. I view it as my sacred duty to fight with every ounce of heart and dedication I can muster to preserve and protect this great and beautiful American experiment. Today, I'm looking back on the last 11 months of campaigning with pride. Not because of anything I've done - but because I'm so proud of the work that people like you have done to fight for this country's future. You're the lifeblood of this movement. You're the reason I'm running. And you're the reason I have hope for the future. ****************************************************************************************************** Duty First, CPT Sam Brown P.S. - Onward to November. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden are about to double-down on destroying me. ** Once again, THANK YOU!

body:
My father was a proud union member – an active member of the Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers, Local 71 – who instilled in me the values of hard work and public service.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001259/479704614/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzJhZGQ5MS1lMzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwjUgzGsMwlbvsCg4kelS6k3dZ8n3EO2rcinGyENqvo=&emci=7256a584-752a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=672add91-e32b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=30237190)
---
| This Father's Day, I am grateful for my dad and all the incredible dads across Maryland.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001260/479704615/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzJhZGQ5MS1lMzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwjUgzGsMwlbvsCg4kelS6k3dZ8n3EO2rcinGyENqvo=&emci=7256a584-752a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=672add91-e32b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=30237190)
My father was a proud union member –– an active member of the Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers, Local 71 –– who instilled in me the values of hard work and public service. His unwavering support has been a cornerstone throughout my journey to becoming a public servant.

He inspires me to continue fighting for what matters most to the folks in our community. It’s why I am dedicated to ensuring that every father can provide their daughters and sons with the best life possible.

Happy Father's Day to all the fathers and father figures!

–Sarah Elfreth

### Don't slink around like a coward
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jun 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=145693535&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1NjkzNTM1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcxODU0NDI5NiwiZXhwIjoxNzIxMTM2Mjk2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.u6GSdEUUb9Q58zR7FSxJsGk_DK28SMihZFMCRA6Hu30&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=145693535&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1NjkzNTM1LCJpYXQiOjE3MTg1NDQyOTYsImV4cCI6MTcyMTEzNjI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-ITeS65jfim5MbD7hdLM8ncOZYv6DQ8xNzNlmBtmPn0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=145693535&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1NjkzNTM1LCJpYXQiOjE3MTg1NDQyOTYsImV4cCI6MTcyMTEzNjI5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-ITeS65jfim5MbD7hdLM8ncOZYv6DQ8xNzNlmBtmPn0)

I wanted to write a response to two readers' Op-Eds that appeared in [The Post Star](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/abcfd629-19c1-480d-aa1d-5d4cf0439944?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As you might imagine, my loquacity exceeds the 300-word limit. I submitted something, but I am aware that they might not print it due to policies about letters from candidates.
The following is what I would have liked to have written to The Post Star. Apologies if this is somewhat repetitive of my [substack column of June 12, 2024](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/854978ad-4fb5-4439-9392-129cd20404b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Dear Editor: I was recently mentioned by name by two of your readers. I hope that you will allow me to share my reflections.
An interesting aspect of the incident last week with my campaign was that the person who recorded the Zoom Town Hall on Wednesday, June 5, 2024 had neither the courage nor the ethics to present themselves on the screen, identify themselves by name, and indicate that they were recording the call. They also deleted the real essence of my immediate retraction, as well as the laughter by all on the call in response to my clumsy choice of words. Everyone present on the call, including me, perceived the remark to be dark humor, and a poorly-phrased joke, immediately acknowledged and clarified. But that part of the comment wasn't aired on national media.
When I uttered the word, "camps", it was not top-of-mind that the presumptive Republican nominee had in fact established camps at the southern border. So much has happened - the January 6 riots, the indictments, the convictions - I need reminding of the estimated [1,400 children who remain separated from their families](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7859bca6-4280-4d3c-b0d1-9278ca29ddba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) all these years later as a result of the Trump immigration policies. Trump promises mass deportations this time, instead of the camps.
In any case, on proper reflection, I can understand the jumpiness by devotees of Fox News and social media. The images of the camps established by Donald Trump are in recent memory. Combine that with current threats from the former President that his next administration will be one of "retribution", and I see how the expression might have inspired fear. And, as mentioned above, the clip is edited to eliminate any indication that the comment was intended to be humor.
For me personally, the nationwide attention that my comment received follows the old saying about public relations: say what you want about me, just spell my name right, which one of The Post Star Op-Ed writers did not do.
Quite frankly, I'm honored to be spoken of in the same breath as Hillary Clinton, as Fox News and the NY Post did last week. In that sense, the person who lacked the courage to identify themselves as they recorded the Zoom Town Hall meeting did me a tremendous favor and elevated my campaign in such a way as to save me literally hundreds of thousands of dollars. Thank you very much! Call me up, state your name, and own up to being the person who unleashed the ensuing Battle of the Bots, and I will buy you a cup of coffee at a diner in Queensbury.
As indicated on the Fox News clip that ran, I am not alone in identifying a need to fix the gaps in information and understanding that abound in our current political scene.
Just yesterday, at the Flag Day Parade in Gouverneur, a veteran shook my hand and made a remark that the Trump supporters are in a "cult" and will need to be "reprogrammed." His statement was unsolicited. He had not heard of the remark I had made in the Town Hall that was played on Fox News; he was speaking of his own accord. Thus, I am not alone in my concerns about the blind loyalty of many Trump supporters - loyalty that exceeds the normal range of admiration that political figures might enjoy, and which formed the basis for my now-famous remark.
News of the comment I made on the Zoom Town Hall aired nationwide at 5:00pm on Thursday, June 6, 2024, by Fox News. By 5:30pm, my social media and websites had been invaded by bots - postings made by internet accounts for which there was no genuine human profile. By 10:00pm, the humans followed the bots, and began repeating the remarks made by the fake accounts. It was later discovered that only a small number of the contacts were from people within New York State. The vast majority were from western states, with a high number from Oregon, Washington, and Colorado.
Throughout the night, I received threats of physical harm via phone calls, texts, emails, social media postings, and direct messages. Auto-dialers rang my phone incessantly for hours on end. By morning, live humans who were reacting to the posts made by the bots were calling the phone numbers of other Democratic Party leaders.
Let this sink in: thousands of humans followed what appear to be internet trolls, also known as bots. They were not following a genuine news story. They were following rantings posted online by an anonymous source that had created fake social media account holders in coordination with a dubiously-obtained recording edited and played on a news outlet that has been fined billions for questionable practices in journalism. The evidence strongly suggests that the bots were ready to go in tandem with the release of the news piece.
To come full circle, the comment itself generated a lesson in the truth of the statement: many people in our country have lost the ability to critically interpret the information they hear or read. They will follow a post generated by a fake social media account and carried by a fake-news-generating media outlet, become incensed and enraged, and then act upon that adrenaline without understanding that they have not been given all of the necessary facts. In this case, people from all over the country did something I personally have never done: I have never heard something online or on television and then picked up the telephone to call a little-known candidate in another state to curse at them or hurl expletive-laced descriptions of genitalia at them. I gotta hand it to them: that is next-level political activism.
Two readers of The Post Star wrote last week to express their perceptions of the story that aired on Fox News about the Virtual Town Hall Meeting. I can find little online information about Cassandra Lavarge, of Gansevoort, who appears to be in her 40s. David Zientak, of Queensbury has a LinkedIn profile that reveals that he graduated from high school in 2020 with an emphasis in Criminal Justice/Police Science. He worked on a contract basis for the Elise for Congress campaign from August 2020 until November 2020, before working as a Field Operator for the National Republican Senatorial Committee from November 2020 until January 2021. He is currently working for remote work, "at least $25 an hour."
Zientak parroted Stefanik henchman Alex Degrasse in his Op-Ed with his suggestion that Stefanik would "clean her clock" in the upcoming election. Well sir, I currently have no clock; I rely on my phone to inform me of the time. Taken literally, your comment is - pardon the pun - anachronistic. Taken figuratively, you should note that it is a phrase used to imply physical attack. Funny how a phrase can simply slip out and carry meaning that you might not have intended. Or were you launching an actual threat of physical harm? Which is it, Mr. Zientak?
Zientak goes on to say, "Let's not forget what's going on with President Trump and now Stephen Bannon." Did Zientak refer to the felon with 34 guilty counts to top off his 91 indictments and multimillions in court-ordered fines, for which his campaign donations will be used for his legal representation? And there is no "now" in the Steve Bannon case. The man is going to jail - a sentence imposed literally years ago for his contempt of Congress charge related to the January 6, 2021 attacks on the nation's Capitol.
Zientak caps his Op-Ed with the statement: "This is not the America I want to live in or my family to live in." We are fortunate in that New York borders another country, and has several international airports for efficient transport. Before Zientak buys a ticket, I encourage him to explore the legal challenges of immigrating to another country. He will find that the process is expensive, uncertain, and a protracted, multi-year endeavor. We are not the only nation needing to develop practical pathways to legal immigration.
I wish that our election would be determined by informed voters who had ample opportunity to explore the issues and the characters of the designated candidates. Sadly, the current political environment is plagued with misinformation and disinformation, and elections are determined by sound bytes that may not capture the full intent of the speaker.
Think before you link. Check sources before you comment. Verify the profile of someone's post before you copy, paste, or let your hackles rise. If you click on someone's name and they have no schools, no photos, and no other posts, they are not real humans; they are bots. Someone who launched that fake profile is attempting to manipulate you. Don't let them do it.
And for goodness sakes, don't slink around like a coward. If you're going to attend a Zoom Town Hall or any kind of meeting where ideas are exchanged, step into the light of day and be forthcoming about who you are and why you are there.
As my high school students used to say, "Man up."
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

clean_body: Don't slink around like a coward | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race * Don't slink around like a coward | | | Jun 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | I wanted to write a response to two readers' Op-Eds that appeared in . As you might imagine, my loquacity exceeds the 300-word limit. I submitted something, but I am aware that they might not print it due to policies about letters from candidates. The following is what I would have liked to have written to The Post Star. Apologies if this is somewhat repetitive of my . Dear Editor: I was recently mentioned by name by two of your readers. I hope that you will allow me to share my reflections. An interesting aspect of the incident last week with my campaign was that the person who recorded the Zoom Town Hall on Wednesday, June 5, 2024 had neither the courage nor the ethics to present themselves on the screen, identify themselves by name, and indicate that they were recording the call. They also deleted the real essence of my immediate retraction, as well as the laughter by all on the call in response to my clumsy choice of words. Everyone present on the call, including me, perceived the remark to be dark humor, and a poorly-phrased joke, immediately acknowledged and clarified. But that part of the comment wasn't aired on national media. When I uttered the word, "camps", it was not top-of-mind that the presumptive Republican nominee had in fact established camps at the southern border. So much has happened - the January 6 riots, the indictments, the convictions - I need reminding of the estimated all these years later as a result of the Trump immigration policies. Trump promises mass deportations this time, instead of the camps. In any case, on proper reflection, I can understand the jumpiness by devotees of Fox News and social media. The images of the camps established by Donald Trump are in recent memory. Combine that with current threats from the former President that his next administration will be one of "retribution", and I see how the expression might have inspired fear. And, as mentioned above, the clip is edited to eliminate any indication that the comment was intended to be humor. For me personally, the nationwide attention that my comment received follows the old saying about public relations: say what you want about me, just spell my name right, which one of The Post Star Op-Ed writers did not do. Quite frankly, I'm honored to be spoken of in the same breath as Hillary Clinton, as Fox News and the NY Post did last week. In that sense, the person who lacked the courage to identify themselves as they recorded the Zoom Town Hall meeting did me a tremendous favor and elevated my campaign in such a way as to save me literally hundreds of thousands of dollars. Thank you very much! Call me up, state your name, and own up to being the person who unleashed the ensuing Battle of the Bots, and I will buy you a cup of coffee at a diner in Queensbury. As indicated on the Fox News clip that ran, I am not alone in identifying a need to fix the gaps in information and understanding that abound in our current political scene. Just yesterday, at the Flag Day Parade in Gouverneur, a veteran shook my hand and made a remark that the Trump supporters are in a "cult" and will need to be "reprogrammed." His statement was unsolicited. He had not heard of the remark I had made in the Town Hall that was played on Fox News; he was speaking of his own accord. Thus, I am not alone in my concerns about the blind loyalty of many Trump supporters - loyalty that exceeds the normal range of admiration that political figures might enjoy, and which formed the basis for my now-famous remark. News of the comment I made on the Zoom Town Hall aired nationwide at 5:00pm on Thursday, June 6, 2024, by Fox News. By 5:30pm, my social media and websites had been invaded by bots - postings made by internet accounts for which there was no genuine human profile. By 10:00pm, the humans followed the bots, and began repeating the remarks made by the fake accounts. It was later discovered that only a small number of the contacts were from people within New York State. The vast majority were from western states, with a high number from Oregon, Washington, and Colorado. Throughout the night, I received threats of physical harm via phone calls, texts, emails, social media postings, and direct messages. Auto-dialers rang my phone incessantly for hours on end. By morning, live humans who were reacting to the posts made by the bots were calling the phone numbers of other Democratic Party leaders. Let this sink in: thousands of humans followed what appear to be internet trolls, also known as bots. They were not following a genuine news story. They were following rantings posted online by an anonymous source that had created fake social media account holders in coordination with a dubiously-obtained recording edited and played on a news outlet that has been fined billions for questionable practices in journalism. The evidence strongly suggests that the bots were ready to go in tandem with the release of the news piece. To come full circle, the comment itself generated a lesson in the truth of the statement: many people in our country have lost the ability to critically interpret the information they hear or read. They will follow a post generated by a fake social media account and carried by a fake-news-generating media outlet, become incensed and enraged, and then act upon that adrenaline without understanding that they have not been given all of the necessary facts. In this case, people from all over the country did something I personally have never done: I have never heard something online or on television and then picked up the telephone to call a little-known candidate in another state to curse at them or hurl expletive-laced descriptions of genitalia at them. I gotta hand it to them: that is next-level political activism. Two readers of The Post Star wrote last week to express their perceptions of the story that aired on Fox News about the Virtual Town Hall Meeting. I can find little online information about Cassandra Lavarge, of Gansevoort, who appears to be in her 40s. David Zientak, of Queensbury has a LinkedIn profile that reveals that he graduated from high school in 2020 with an emphasis in Criminal Justice/Police Science. He worked on a contract basis for the Elise for Congress campaign from August 2020 until November 2020, before working as a Field Operator for the National Republican Senatorial Committee from November 2020 until January 2021. He is currently working for remote work, "at least $25 an hour." Zientak parroted Stefanik henchman Alex Degrasse in his Op-Ed with his suggestion that Stefanik would "clean her clock" in the upcoming election. Well sir, I currently have no clock; I rely on my phone to inform me of the time. Taken literally, your comment is - pardon the pun - anachronistic. Taken figuratively, you should note that it is a phrase used to imply physical attack. Funny how a phrase can simply slip out and carry meaning that you might not have intended. Or were you launching an actual threat of physical harm? Which is it, Mr. Zientak? Zientak goes on to say, "Let's not forget what's going on with President Trump and now Stephen Bannon." Did Zientak refer to the felon with 34 guilty counts to top off his 91 indictments and multimillions in court-ordered fines, for which his campaign donations will be used for his legal representation? And there is no "now" in the Steve Bannon case. The man is going to jail - a sentence imposed literally years ago for his contempt of Congress charge related to the January 6, 2021 attacks on the nation's Capitol. Zientak caps his Op-Ed with the statement: "This is not the America I want to live in or my family to live in." We are fortunate in that New York borders another country, and has several international airports for efficient transport. Before Zientak buys a ticket, I encourage him to explore the legal challenges of immigrating to another country. He will find that the process is expensive, uncertain, and a protracted, multi-year endeavor. We are not the only nation needing to develop practical pathways to legal immigration. I wish that our election would be determined by informed voters who had ample opportunity to explore the issues and the characters of the designated candidates. Sadly, the current political environment is plagued with misinformation and disinformation, and elections are determined by sound bytes that may not capture the full intent of the speaker. Think before you link. Check sources before you comment. Verify the profile of someone's post before you copy, paste, or let your hackles rise. If you click on someone's name and they have no schools, no photos, and no other posts, they are not real humans; they are bots. Someone who launched that fake profile is attempting to manipulate you. Don't let them do it. And for goodness sakes, don't slink around like a coward. If you're going to attend a Zoom Town Hall or any kind of meeting where ideas are exchanged, step into the light of day and be forthcoming about who you are and why you are there. As my high school students used to say, "Man up." If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
**Hey Derek, can you keep a secret?** [**I want to surprise Chris with a Father’s Day card from his favorite supporters! You can add your name here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001905/479706667/279723990?refcode=email_061624_fathersday&utm_campaign=email_061624_fathersday&source=email_061624_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMxZmE4Zi1lNDJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqZzgP0xyYk2EX7c4uzZGpByuutrmBiSMXDEXnzy2ZI=&emci=e3572280-6b2a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e331fa8f-e42b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13185894) | | [Sign the card →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001906/479706668/279723990?refcode=email_061624_fathersday&utm_campaign=email_061624_fathersday&source=email_061624_fathersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMxZmE4Zi1lNDJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqZzgP0xyYk2EX7c4uzZGpByuutrmBiSMXDEXnzy2ZI=&emci=e3572280-6b2a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e331fa8f-e42b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13185894)

I’m Zoe, Chris’s wife, and mom to our three amazing young children.

I met Chris in law school over a decade ago, and I never could have imagined the journey we would take from there.

We've built this family and are proud to be raising our kids (along with our adorable pup, Yankee Doodle) here in Western Pennsylvania. On top of watching Chris grow as an incredible father, it’s been an honor to watch him grow as a leader and public servant too. In the midst of juggling busy lives, family, and career, service has always stood at the forefront of his character.

In everything Chris does, he demonstrates his compassion, honesty, and determination. He never loses sight of what matters the most for our family, and for other families here in Western Pennsylvania.

I also know what *your* support means to him. He’s a fearless advocate for you, and I know that when he sees your support in return, it continues to light the fire in him to fight for you.

subject: Our dad, Eugene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001899/479706659/492515676?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDMxZmE4Zi1lNDJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1p4qfO7vNFidojFYUXAdT-pqMhENPkgTJSPIeOBPafg=&emci=292be83a-5d2a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d431fa8f-e42b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10203249) Hi everyone! Ben and Sarah DePasquale here. We’re reaching out because today is Father’s Day, and we wanted to tell you all about the commitment, generosity, and selflessness we’ve seen firsthand from the next Attorney General of Pennsylvania, our dad, Eugene! Growing up, we saw our dad roll up his sleeves and get to work every single day for his constituents — all while being an incredible, caring, supportive father to the both of us (Honestly, we’re really not sure how he managed to juggle all of it 🤷). While our dad was serving as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, he worked to take action on gun safety, protect our environment, and crack down on greedy corporations. And even when he worked long nights, we knew that he was getting things done for families just like ours all across Pennsylvania. Not to mention he did make time for a couple of Star Wars marathons too. Last year, we were so proud when our dad told us he was running for Attorney General. We know he’ll work nonstop to protect our rights – and yours! We know our dad has what it takes to become Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General, and if you’re with us – we know a great way you can show him your support! [_**We’re surprising our dad with a Father’s Day card tonight, and we’re hoping you’ll sign it! We know he would love to see your name next to ours →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001900/479706661/492515676?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDMxZmE4Zi1lNDJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1p4qfO7vNFidojFYUXAdT-pqMhENPkgTJSPIeOBPafg=&emci=292be83a-5d2a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d431fa8f-e42b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10203249) | | [SIGN THE CARD →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87001901/479706662/492515676?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDMxZmE4Zi1lNDJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1p4qfO7vNFidojFYUXAdT-pqMhENPkgTJSPIeOBPafg=&emci=292be83a-5d2a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d431fa8f-e42b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10203249)

## Happy Father's Day
---
Father's Day is dedicated to celebrating and honoring fathers everywhere. It is a time to show appreciation for all the love, care, and support that fathers provide to their families. Whether it's a small gesture or a grand celebration, Father's Day reminds us to cherish the fathers in our lives. So on this day, take the time to express your gratitude and love for the father figures who have made a positive impact on your life. Happy Father's Day!
|
---

We are dedicated to addressing crucial societal issues such as healthcare, education, climate change, and social equity. 🤝Inclusivity and Unity: We are firm believers in the power of our differences and our capacity to unite as a country. Left-Wing Legal Org Guts Staff To Allow Greater ‘Focus’ On Racial
Justice, Union Says
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4c0cc2sqbb5mqik6f2nikjukpmil37gj8ppvbn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr8dhheirr7ctl6tr779hnmmrq6d9k65qn4t9h6uh60oj1cug66pt4cdjq3d9j65qqet5jmsqq3d9n6gorb9tiesqqedbhepqqcsbk6cpjb8bnmmi33cdnmtqqecjl6gonacjlkcrrcdbmemjr7dd2egr39d1hmmhbatjheir3add5eeqbfctlkpq39tjnk8gq48bi4bh28pr4c3imap70c5i649fg

The Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC) is laying off more than a

subject: Trump team calls Judge Cannon a ‘godsend’????

body:
respond before midnight

|
---
**FIRST:** Donald Trump appointed Judge Aileen Cannon to be a federal judge.

**THEN:** Judge Cannon indefinitely postponed Donald Trump’s criminal trial for mishandling classified documents.

| | Peter,I'm wishing a Happy Father's Day to all the dads in America.Fathers play an important role as more than just role models, but also as protectors.After serving for 27 years in the Army Reserves, I am proud to be a protector of not just my family but also of America. Thank you, dads, for your wisdom, your love, and all the sacrifices you make to give your children a better tomorrow.Happy Father's Day!Sincerely,Scott Fitzgerald

Hello,
$3.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign before midnight to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $3.
$3 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country.
$3 because we scared off Boebert, but now this race is going to be a lot harder to win.
$3 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely _can_ win this seat.
And $3 because the Super PACs are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.
I know $3 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we can take on the corporate PACs and special interests. We cannot stop here or let up.
We’ve set a goal to raise another $15,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short.

clean_body: I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this seat. Hello, $3. That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign before midnight to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $3. $3 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country. $3 because we scared off Boebert, but now this race is going to be a lot harder to win. $3 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely can win this seat. And $3 because the Super PACs are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win. I know $3 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we can take on the corporate PACs and special interests. We cannot stop here or let up. We’ve set a goal to raise another $15,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It means the world to know I have the support of people like you on this journey again. Thank you so much in advance. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Friend, I just got a text from my campaign manager, and listen, it's not good news: **We fell just short of our $500,000 mid-month fundraising goal yesterday. **
Here’s the thing:**It's never good to miss a goal, but this is a particularly worrisome time.** Donald Trump is personally attacking me every chance he gets, and the GOP is spending recording-breaking amounts to flood the airwaves with attack ads against me. Right now, they're planning on spending more money in Ohio this fall than in any other race, including the presidential – and we're at risk of being outspent and drowned out.
The GOP knows that control of the Senate hinges on what happens in Ohio, so they're putting everything they have into defeating me this fall.**That's why we really need to dig deep and put everything we’ve got into defending my must-win seat and keeping the Senate blue. **

It might be hard to believe, but the resources we raise now – not in November – will have the biggest impact on our ability to win this race. That makes hitting our fundraising goals so important, and falling short could be so costly.

name: Gloria Steinem
subject: We need to stand by leaders like Jacky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
She needs our help to defeat her far-right, anti-abortion opponent
She needs our help to defeat her far-right, anti-abortion opponent
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87006334/479720755/-1278658170?&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3985-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQ0ZjcyMy1lYTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYXAt8eCsJ4nA7ifaOK-7tF6ZZ0lIqCAL9bHQvFP2uE=)
Hello friend,

I’m very grateful for the courageous leadership of women like Jacky Rosen, who advocate for reproductive freedom as an essential human right. This vision, embraced by the majority of women nationwide, demands our collective effort and determination.
That’s why we need a leader like Jacky in the Senate, friend. Over the past few years, unprecedented attacks on abortion access have set our country back decades. Jacky has fought to defend and restore abortion rights. She recognizes that equality between men and women is crucial to the success of our nation. If we can’t make decisions over our own reproductive lives, we are not living in a democracy.
Right now, Jacky is the most vulnerable woman in the Senate and a top target for anti-abortion GOP extremists in Washington. The latest _New York Times_ poll shows her TIED against her far-right opponent, and _The Cook Political Report_ has downgraded her race to a "Toss Up."
With Republican dark money groups like the Koch network flooding Nevada with millions of dollars, it’s crucial that we do everything we can to help Jacky defend her must-win Senate seat – and fast.
Remember, the last Senate race in Nevada was decided by only 7,928 votes, and Jacky’s race is shaping up to be just as close. This means that every single dollar of support makes a difference in ensuring that we don’t put the future of abortion rights in the hands of the GOP.

**_[With Nevada’s general election underway, will you join me in chipping in $5 now to Jacky’s campaign to help her win in Nevada, defend Senate control, and protect our reproductive rights? This is an investment in our future and our freedom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87006335/479720756/-1278658170?&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3985-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmQ0ZjcyMy1lYTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYXAt8eCsJ4nA7ifaOK-7tF6ZZ0lIqCAL9bHQvFP2uE=)_**

clean_body: She needs our help to defeat her far-right, anti-abortion opponent She needs our help to defeat her far-right, anti-abortion opponent | | | = Hello friend, I’m very grateful for the courageous leadership of women like Jacky Rosen, who advocate for reproductive freedom as an essential human right. This vision, embraced by the majority of women nationwide, demands our collective effort and determination. That’s why we need a leader like Jacky in the Senate, friend. Over the past few years, unprecedented attacks on abortion access have set our country back decades. Jacky has fought to defend and restore abortion rights. She recognizes that equality between men and women is crucial to the success of our nation. If we can’t make decisions over our own reproductive lives, we are not living in a democracy. Right now, Jacky is the most vulnerable woman in the Senate and a top target for anti-abortion GOP extremists in Washington. The latest New York Times poll shows her TIED against her far-right opponent, and The Cook Political Report has downgraded her race to a "Toss Up." With Republican dark money groups like the Koch network flooding Nevada with millions of dollars, it’s crucial that we do everything we can to help Jacky defend her must-win Senate seat – and fast. Remember, the last Senate race in Nevada was decided by only 7,928 votes, and Jacky’s race is shaping up to be just as close. This means that every single dollar of support makes a difference in ensuring that we don’t put the future of abortion rights in the hands of the GOP. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Gloria Steinem | * By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. name: NDRC HQ
subject: Something of a Father’s Day tradition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Help make sure our democracy survives for future generations.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87006486/479721306/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjZDRmNzIzLWVhMmItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaG4gjxvzUeiWHNaE0TH6fA__TbPT1PBRFaPd_l_N0w=&emci=6e07ef70-c729-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bcd4f723-ea2b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, This morning, I woke up excited to celebrate my second Father’s day as a dad. Through the ups and downs, the potty training and the 100th episode of whatever’s on kids TV, I can’t think of a job more rewarding than watching my little boy grow into a confident, caring kid. Days like today remind me that becoming a dad is the greatest — and most exhausting — thing I’ve ever done. And they remind me of the kind of world I want my son to grow up in, where democracy prevails and our freedoms are protected. [**That’s why I hope you’ll join me in making a donation to the National Democratic Redistricting Committee this Father’s Day to help make sure our democracy survives for future generations.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87006488/479721310/1762736337?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_junefun_email_20240616-NDRC-Tier1-FathersDay_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240616-NDRC-Tier1-FathersDay_&utm_campaign=junefun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjZDRmNzIzLWVhMmItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaG4gjxvzUeiWHNaE0TH6fA__TbPT1PBRFaPd_l_N0w=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Help make sure our democracy survives for future generations. | Peter, This morning, I woke up excited to celebrate my second Father’s day as a dad. Through the ups and downs, the potty training and the 100th episode of whatever’s on kids TV, I can’t think of a job more rewarding than watching my little boy grow into a confident, caring kid. Days like today remind me that becoming a dad is the greatest — and most exhausting — thing I’ve ever done. And they remind me of the kind of world I want my son to grow up in, where democracy prevails and our freedoms are protected. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Happy Father’s Day to all the dads out there! —Biz John Bisognano President of the NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
| | | Peter, I want you to know that I’m praying for you.

We must trust in God during these scary times, Peter.

Joe Biden has turned this country upside down...

He’s pushed an agenda that allows men to compete in women's sports.

He's made us look weak to our enemies. He's made it easier for illegal immigrants to live in America than American citizens.

And he’s using the courts to target his political opponents.

**We need to all pray that we re-elect Trump!**

This is going to be the most important election of our lifetime, and America is counting on us to come through.

Hi folks, I’m reaching out to wish you a Happy Father’s Day. Today I want to celebrate all the Dads out there who mean so much throughout our lives. They’re our protectors, our biggest advocates, our first dance, and so many other roles that make them so important to us. But for many of us, our Dads are no longer with us. So Father’s Day is also a day of reflection and appreciation for what they contributed to who we are today. As you may know, my Dad, Ted Blunt, passed away six months ago. He was — and still is — my hero, and I miss him so much. **But I feel his spirit with me every single day, even in the little moments.** On the campaign trail, people up and down the state have shared how much Dad meant to them. And it’s special because I know he lives on in so many Delawareans. He lives on in the young educator who came up to me and said: “Your Dad saved my life.” He lives on in the local government official from Sussex County who said: “Your Dad’s leadership taught me to stand up for my constituents.” He lives on in his family. His children, grandchildren and his great-granddaughter. He lives on in all of us who knew and loved him — and he leaves an example and legacy for my son, who is now a dad himself. To all the fathers and father figures out there, we love you and wish you an incredible day! Warmly, \- Lisa
* * *

subject: Response requested: Personally endorse Ruben Gallego for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’ve had hundreds of thousands of people join Team Gallego over the last year. And today, we are hoping you will add your name to the list of people personally endorsing Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate.
#

Peter,
It’s going to take a lot of work to win in Arizona, and Kari Lake isn’t going to lose this race all by herself. We’ve got to stay focused and build a massive grassroots team to do it.
We’ve had hundreds of thousands of people join Team Gallego over the last year. And today, we are hoping you will add your name to the list of people personally endorsing Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate.
It’s a small act, but it speaks volumes about the kind of campaign we are trying to build.

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Marsha Blackburn's Backwards Policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
This MAGA Senator's track record is frightening to say the least, take a look...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=long)
---
| | |
---
|
## Marsha Blackburn: MAGA Extremist
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn)
---
| Team Dems: We're standing at a pivotal moment in our country's history. Republican extremists dominate that side of the Senate, not to mention the disgrace of having Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House. Today, we’re reaching out because your voice and support are absolutely critical in our battle for a more inclusive and equitable America. Let’s oust these aging bigots from our Senate!
---
| [ Chip In & Fight Back→](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn)
---
| As a Democratic PAC committed to progress and equality, we cannot turn a blind eye to the damaging impact of Senator Marsha Blackburn's conservative policies. Her stance on LGBTQ rights, abortion access, immigration, and healthcare represents a dangerous leap backward for our nation. **Let's unpack this.** Senator Blackburn has a track record of opposing fundamental rights for LGBTQ+ individuals, completely contradicting our core belief in equality for all. Her outright opposition to gay marriage and work to repeal Title VII of the Civil Rights Act demonstrate her support for bigotry, in its purest form. **But that's not all.** Her relentless opposition to the Affordable Care Act (ACA) has created severe repercussions, limiting crucial healthcare access for countless Americans, especially those from marginalized backgrounds. The ACA has been a lifeline for many, and Blackburn’s stance is entirely unconscienable given that two-thirds of Tennessee voters oppose its repeal. **Let's talk about reproductive rights.** Senator Blackburn's anti-abortion stance and her spreading of misinformation regarding reproductive healthcare directly jeopardize the autonomy and rights of women. Her tweets about Planned Parenthood selling ‘baby parts’ and her vocal opposition to Roe v Wade are deeply troubling and represent the worst our senate has to offer. **Now, onto something concerning beyond measure.** Her support for baseless conspiracy theories, such as the debunked claims about President Obama's birthplace, is an attack on the very fabric of our democracy. It creates divisions and distracts us from urgent matters. And let's not overlook her support for Trump’s 2017 Muslim ban – a blatant endorsement of discrimination based upon race and religion. We envision an America that celebrates diversity, champions inclusivity, and guarantees equal opportunities for everyone. Together, we must vehemently oppose this toxic bigotry and fight for a fairer, more compassionate society. [**Your contribution to our cause empowers us to amplify the voices that need to be heard, advocate for policies that uplift marginalized communities, and pave the way for a senate we can be proud of. Please chip in today to defeat MAGA Senators like Marsha Blackburn→**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn)
---
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: SCOTUS Decision DOES NOT Defend Reproductive Rights
body:
| | | | | |
---
**SCOTUS decision does NOT defend reproductive rights**
---
| [](http://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2tpwu4-dtxvbe-kyd76rh4/)
---
| | | | This past Thursday's Supreme Court decision that plaintiffs lack standing to challenge the FDA's defense of abortion pills is **NOT** a permanent win for reproductive rights. Not only does it leave the door wide open for a legal challenge at a future date, but it highlights the looming threat to reproductive rights of a second Trump presidency. We cannot allow Trump to re-make the FDA in his image. To do this, it is crucial to defend Democrats up and down the ballot. [**You could help right now by donating $24 to 4 Democratic candidates!**](http://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2tpwu4-dtxvbf-kyd76rh5/) The extreme rightwing SCOTUS has cleverly kicked the issue down the road, they are trying to minimize the electoral blowback for Republicans this November. We must keep the FDA independent from authoritarians who seek to control American bodies. This crucial access is vitally important for the many Americans in the 17 states that are attacking reproductive freedom. Ensuring the FDA remains science-driven and not politically manipulated is critical. The stakes are high, and the fight for reproductive rights continues. Time is running out. The November election is less than 5 months away and we have a lot of work to do. [**Stand with No Dem Left Behind as we help Democrats DEFEND and RESTORE REPRODUCTIVE FREEDOM for ALL AMERICANS.**](http://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2tpwu4-dtxvbg-kyd76rh6/)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Happy Father's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Celebrating all the dads out there — including my husband, Robert
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87008785/479727650/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1363-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZhZTI2YTEtZWQyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pHEFrbVb9iol6nfVxLN2CNZVjZHlhyqt0tdvaaD93Ro=)
Friend — to all the dads and father figures out there, I want to wish you a very happy Father's Day!
Here, at home in Florida, my kids and I are celebrating my husband, Robert, who I affectionately refer to as "my love" (that's how he's saved in my iPhone contacts, actually 🥰).
Being a parent is one of the most rewarding roles life has to offer. But it's equally rewarding to co-parent and see Robert be the amazing father that he is. Our family is what it is — our children have grown up with so much love and care — because of Robert. _Gracias, mi amor. Por todo._
To each and every dad and family reading this, I hope you have a wonderful, rewarding day in whichever way you choose to celebrate. To every father figure, thank you for all you do.

— Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87008788/479727654/-31196584?refcode=jtk1363-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZhZTI2YTEtZWQyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pHEFrbVb9iol6nfVxLN2CNZVjZHlhyqt0tdvaaD93Ro=)
---

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| | Peter, **Happy Father's Day!****🎉** **On this Father's Day we want to take a moment to celebrate and honor all the fathers in our community who play such vital roles in the lives of their families and loved ones.** Fatherhood is a journey filled with love, sacrifice, and endless devotion. Being a father has been my greatest joy and biggest challenge, and I’m grateful for the opportunity every single day. From the countless late nights spent comforting a crying child to the everyday moments of guidance and support, fathers are helping shape the future generation. _Today, we recognize and appreciate the dedication of fathers everywhere._ _Whether you're a biological father, a stepfather, a grandfather, or a father figure, your presence and influence make a profound impact on those around you._ As your representative here in the Hudson Valley, **I will always strive to ensure we’re implementing policies that support ALL families.** _To every father out there, we say thank you. Thank you for your strength, your love, and your unwavering commitment to your families. You are valued and you are appreciated._ Thank you, Mike Lawler

| [ ](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=89e75a689e45460e87ae73a778b0897e&_e=Rgy8sYBV3B-yXzYgiV0JDviyQpdsDy856wOOhVYexu3pqYXMloRyYnUpz9-DKRrSIf5XWssJpbdyp5bHvssqogn0snUgMiY5C6TVdADjFqPoajRskQEZVtvLEhFG1LHmh7VabmerMYnpG8ZT_FbKQmcoDr6-kr_MAnR8knUTEeG811ljdh4sUaX2yDdZfRyAeGQ58dDJpuMflMgIPFt-dPDIZzPof07KHzkEaR_jglMzhtlIWtfjL9qRg6hUcGk5ntw1BWMvqna_Lcqug4wJKGrMMCMXmdE1DzOHiXBZTzEHHOImNxPc_AIkGB00CKAeOpJ9MO1MfS8erCjH4JTr_TLDIDO2Nou-5d09-hycpiv-ESj_Z2CfrI1jmre-I22RCrCy-akfn2tSSY8OdOCSxhL5KMwB6G8D3_9FnsL7g6A%3D)
---
Friend,

I don't think I need to tell you what's been going on lately. From the dishonest hit pieces sent by the Fake News and the slanderous attacks from my opponent, I'm finally getting a moment to send you a message.

Election Day is less than 5 months from today.

If you have sat there for the past few months thinking, "there's no possible way the Democrats could win again. Look at what they've done to the country!" **I don't think you realize how desperate the left is to destroy this great nation.**

My radical opponent is getting so desperate that he's taking money from anyone and everyone as long as they will help him buy this Senate seat. **Ruben Gallego doesn't care about how many favors he owes; he's only interested in power.** R

**If you're unsure who Ruben Gallego is, let me give you a refresher. I promise after reading this, you'll know just how important it is we win this election >>>**

*** Ruben supports "gender transition" surgeries and "puberty blockers."

*** He wants to protect the interests of Hamas terrorists and stop Israel from fighting back.

*** He wants to keep our Southern Border wide open, playing into the interest of dangerous cartels and human traffickers. He even said immigration is not a genuine concern to Arizona voters, saying "The border, people talk about, is not as important" as in other states.

*** He calls President Trump and his supporters a "Threat to Democracy," even going so far as to "Thinking about trying to stab a person."

**Ruben Gallego is much, much more dangerous than you could ever imagine.** **He would be worse than bad for this nation; he would be CATASTROPHIC.**

**It's not enough to tell you that Ruben has voted with Joe Biden 100% of the time. He's not just a bad legislator. He's a horrible person and a total tool to the swamp.**

When we say Ruben is in bed with the same people who tried to bribe me and force me to stay away from politics, we mean it literally. He divorced his NINE-MONTH PREGNANT WIFE to be with a superstar DC Lobbyist. He even ripped off taxpayers to pay for his Washington D.C. townhouse and did shady dealings with a bank that allegedly defrauded immigrant families and Latinos (the very people he claims to fight for.)

**The only thing Ruben will do in the Senate is pay back the favors he owes his financial backers.**If he had any interest in helping the people of Arizona, his district wouldn't have the fastest-growing homeless population in the entire country.****

**You probably know by now how bad Ruben Gallego would be for Arizona and the entire country. The problem is, as of right now, he's more than two points ahead of me in the polls, he has a campaign war chest FILLED to the brim with dirty money, and almost FORTY MILLION DOLLARS pledged towards TV ads before the election.**

I'm fighting SO HARD to stay competitive with Ruben Gallego because I won't let my kids, Ruby and Leo, live in the left's planned Socialist Paradise. [**It's now or never to stop, Ruben Gallego, and I need your help.**](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=89e75a689e45460e87ae73a778b0897e&_e=Rgy8sYBV3B-yXzYgiV0JDviyQpdsDy856wOOhVYexu3pqYXMloRyYnUpz9-DKRrSIf5XWssJpbdyp5bHvssqogn0snUgMiY5C6TVdADjFqPoajRskQEZVtvLEhFG1LHmh7VabmerMYnpG8ZT_FbKQmcoDr6-kr_MAnR8knUTEeG811ljdh4sUaX2yDdZfRyAeGQ58dDJpuMflMgIPFt-dPDIZzPof07KHzkEaR_jglMzhtlIWtfjL9qRg6hUcGk53e_uD_MXMB_OEofCgGbt2it-cSlv2B7PFvb--qPSFrz86TVT05ZEXLJpal95GpVn8njC9C8PUu4NDDPOgCRMr-l_IxeSRwVNkEQFe5ADWk0jXHt7fyA_Ik9ZZKleMBC0ogRwyg-V_UoYNWcjnh7KcqV8vCBcslUw0r1EehG2e74%3D)

I don't owe favors to corporate entities or make promises to leftist elites. I have only ever asked for help from patriotic, grassroots Americans like yourself, and ONLY if you can spare it.

[**_There's a lot of ground to cover before the election, but if we can get the funds we need RIGHT NOW, we can build the momentum and secure the votes we need to have an AMERICA FIRST VICTORY on Election Day._**](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=89e75a689e45460e87ae73a778b0897e&_e=Rgy8sYBV3B-yXzYgiV0JDviyQpdsDy856wOOhVYexu3pqYXMloRyYnUpz9-DKRrSIf5XWssJpbdyp5bHvssqogn0snUgMiY5C6TVdADjFqPoajRskQEZVtvLEhFG1LHmh7VabmerMYnpG8ZT_FbKQmcoDr6-kr_MAnR8knUTEeG811ljdh4sUaX2yDdZfRyAeGQ58dDJpuMflMgIPFt-dPDIZzPof07KHzkEaR_jglMzhtlIWtfjL9qRg6hUcGk5zodn7LGN9FyTcaWMipwdNsW9HeePnpYBuI5xJ14Ns10V2YyBjFO3XiCy1q2NhMd93dD_um9hhQf6GJUnyeNPzDkeILer20VFz4Xudy2bFP8sbHaAVWib_LxN_KUO7faByy9hFakzUCUFrjODPBXVv_WxQnfe7G6xApwJnAK1ivg%3D)

**IF you've never donated before, or you're skeptical your donation will make a difference,** **I want you to trust me when I tell you every single cent counts.**

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009547/479730479/-112884332?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240616_ew_fathers_day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDRkMGZkNDYtZjAyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y6Urhyq5Y5Ciky0MtVepXVGQYZ04m4CeH-fqxWrw7Xs=)

Hi Peter! For Father’s Day, I wanted to send out a little bit of a different note – one that I personally wrote to my Dad: **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009548/479730480/1938203091?refcode=240616_ew_fathers_day_img1&ms=240616_ew_fathers_day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDRkMGZkNDYtZjAyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y6Urhyq5Y5Ciky0MtVepXVGQYZ04m4CeH-fqxWrw7Xs=)**_Me and my dad, Lon_ Today, I’m taking time to celebrate and remember just how important a role you have played in shaping me into the person I am – proudly running for Congress to fight for our neighbors across Western Wisconsin and stand up for the values you instilled in me. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009549/479730481/1938203091?refcode=240616_ew_fathers_day_img2&ms=240616_ew_fathers_day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDRkMGZkNDYtZjAyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y6Urhyq5Y5Ciky0MtVepXVGQYZ04m4CeH-fqxWrw7Xs=)**_Proud dad_ You taught me the value of hard work, compassion, and dedication. These are the values I hold close to me and live by daily. Right-wing extremists like Derrick Van Orden could learn a thing or two from you about manhood – love your child no matter who they love. Show EVERYONE decency no matter your differences. ALWAYS treat women with the utmost respect. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009550/479730482/1938203091?refcode=240616_ew_fathers_day_img3&ms=240616_ew_fathers_day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDRkMGZkNDYtZjAyYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y6Urhyq5Y5Ciky0MtVepXVGQYZ04m4CeH-fqxWrw7Xs=)**_My Dad and I_ I am so grateful for you, Dad. Thank you for being a supportive, caring, and loving father. _**[My Dad taught me many life lessons that have made me the man I am today. clean_body: | | | Friend, with just TWO days until the June 18 primary in Virginia’s battleground 7th District, here’s what momentum looks like. Momentum is votes being cast ... Momentum is canvassers knocking doors ... Momentum is ads being seen thousands of times a day... But we’re not done yet. Not even close. There are still thousands of texts to voters to be sent, and we need your help to make our last get out the vote message as big as possible. In these final days, we’re being outspent by corporate SuperPACs - but together, I know we can fight back. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Now, she's running to continue the fight in Congress. To donate by check, send to: Guzman for Congress P.O. Box 1818 Woodbridge, VA 22195 \- \- Paid for by Guzman for Congress. | | **Happy Father's Day! ** Today, we celebrate the incredible fathers and father figures who play such a crucial role in our lives. I have seen the profound impact that a loving father can have on the lives of their children and those around them. I hope you join me in gathering with family to honor and reflect on all fathers and recognize their importance in our lives. Sincerely,**Glenn Grothman**

| | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d20d9a589e8d45759774f3069642cb4a&_e=NbmSIYkFUU6_HfEIBHSoCAtryVH3d-pVQ2iq1cjp9HqdA5m_uEWMLjsBFPApIFdMXZ75FntBGcFDiK1gE0e3kAsWzebvvHkEjGr6bEEcEFcXJ65Wd_QFPax_pF7GirSaUqCCzwYbs5AGhBOArL7HQm7KVolclSmDU4ADPTCbj3mDS01sFutE95lXA4V80kaPodRC6mZ9uqrG_3jm4jmal13WnDQK1gCiJvmi2KvPtpBzuBom-sDSZGbs0Dl-Foe5Rr7vemNU2azeJzt5D2UvGL4nirg12k81ajgNyYioZrK-Q2OZO-rhYzRjH5YgIxielrMFV2Wp38gqv6j2x_tiXaLB8gw286J_PSp4B7GoPlPiop1pJgQjqxR_7GC0etFav5rH7HxgXgoTHNOyKA9gNQ%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d20d9a589e8d45759774f3069642cb4a&_e=NbmSIYkFUU6_HfEIBHSoCAtryVH3d-pVQ2iq1cjp9HqdA5m_uEWMLjsBFPApIFdMXZ75FntBGcFDiK1gE0e3kAsWzebvvHkEjGr6bEEcEFcXJ65Wd_QFPax_pF7GirSaUqCCzwYbs5AGhBOArL7HQm7KVolclSmDU4ADPTCbj3mDS01sFutE95lXA4V80kaPodRC6mZ9uqrG_3jm4jmal13WnDQK1gCiJvmi2KvPtpAXWr1KS24VaT1dx0F8UbJ1yefWg6aIWy02ezx0sUY3JM7SzEp2fB8oJTxM1mY89kV4w86G3xIWO7EyOjOGadIfjkYw6lYrwzuhq7aRb2C8vSoXZra9UKOPDjIuJ3Xy3Cbcbuqp0-cvd7RF6FbxDRrMsgkgWsVpd4ZKQdta33WW9w%3D%3D)**
