clean_body: The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. | | | | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. | | Sincerely, | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

body:
**[_Peter, I’m about to ask you for $14 before Father’s Day ends at midnight. But first, please allow me to explain what’s at stake. >> _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009983/479732260/-1810142050?refcode=20240616_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRhYTUyMi1mMTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2jOIUdtrxwduKLVJtJQI4Kb4hHsggLM2C6YUMvaOI4=)** I’ve held many titles throughout my life. Small businessman. Public servant. Congressman. [**But first and foremost, I’m “Dad” to these three beautiful kids.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009985/479732262/-1810142050?refcode=20240616_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRhYTUyMi1mMTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2jOIUdtrxwduKLVJtJQI4Kb4hHsggLM2C6YUMvaOI4=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009987/479732264/-1810142050?refcode=20240616_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRhYTUyMi1mMTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2jOIUdtrxwduKLVJtJQI4Kb4hHsggLM2C6YUMvaOI4=)

My greatest mission is for my kids to grow up in a world that is better, more just, and filled with more opportunity than mine was.
If you’re a parent, I have no doubt you feel exactly the same way.
And frankly, I refuse to sit by and do nothing knowing that extreme Republicans are fighting to cut the programs that support our families.
I refuse to settle for a system that too often defines our kids’ future by their zip code, their economic class, or their skin color.
I believe every kid should have the opportunity to succeed, no matter what circumstances they’re born into.
That’s exactly why I first ran for Congress — and why I’m running again to keep up the fight.
**[_Peter, I’m running for my family, and yours. I’m fighting for your family as though it were my own. But I can’t do it alone. I set an ambitious goal to raise 500 gifts before Father’s Day ends at midnight, and it would mean so much if I could count on your $14. Will you step up? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009988/479732266/-1810142050?refcode=20240616_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRhYTUyMi1mMTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2jOIUdtrxwduKLVJtJQI4Kb4hHsggLM2C6YUMvaOI4=)**
Peter, I don’t like asking for money, but this isn’t about me.
It’s about doing everything in my power to create a better future for our kids.
That means I need to plug every budget gap, fund every corner of this campaign, and give our vision the chance it deserves to succeed.
[**I hope I can count on your $14 before midnight tonight:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87009989/479732268/-1810142050?refcode=20240616_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRhYTUyMi1mMTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2jOIUdtrxwduKLVJtJQI4Kb4hHsggLM2C6YUMvaOI4=)

name: Biden-Harris 2024
subject: Can we count on you to give $25 today, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
You probably didn’t wake up this morning and say, “Today is the day I am going to make my first donation to Joe Bide | | |
---
Peter, Every gesture -- no matter how big or small -- can make a difference. Taking a moment to share a positive message or even giving someone a hug can change the trajectory of their day. **Today, we’re asking you to do something small for our campaign -- but it is something that will have a huge impact.** As we get closer and closer to the election, we are expecting more and more over-the-top attacks from Trump and his MAGA supporters. And the only way we can fight back and _win the battle for the soul of this nation_ is with the support of grassroots folks like you. Now, we know you probably didn’t wake up this morning and say, “Today is the day I am going to make my first $25 donation to Joe Biden’s reelection!” But that’s what we are about to ask you to do. **It would mean a lot to Joe to know you have his back today. Especially today.** [So please, can we count on you to use this link to make your first contribution to reelect Joe and Kamala and defeat Trump? $5, $10, or anything you can spare will add up fast when lots of people are chipping clean_body: You probably didn’t wake up this morning and say, “Today is the day I am going to make my first donation to Joe Bide | | | Peter, Every gesture -- no matter how big or small -- can make a difference. Taking a moment to share a positive message or even giving someone a hug can change the trajectory of their day. Today, we’re asking you to do something small for our campaign -- but it is something that will have a huge impact. As we get closer and closer to the election, we are expecting more and more over-the-top attacks from Trump and his MAGA supporters. And the only way we can fight back and win the battle for the soul of this nation is with the support of grassroots folks like you. Now, we know you probably didn’t wake up this morning and say, “Today is the day I am going to make my first $25 donation to Joe Biden’s reelection!” But that’s what we are about to ask you to do. It would mean a lot to Joe to know you have his back today. Especially today. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | No matter how big or small, your contribution means everything to our campaign. Team Biden-Harris

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87010121/479732756/569902138?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.16_FathersDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZmNjRkMC1mMTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCK19WMQAFet1_iWRvdAJGpoJRWCl7a78hB4RUpjfMU=) Folks, I’m wishing you and your family a very Happy Father’s Day. To my fellow fathers: I hope your day is filled with the love and appreciation that you deserve. I’m spending my day getting some relaxation time in (if the kids allow) and cooking a nice meal later. 👨🍳 My two boys mean everything to me, and being their dad is one of my greatest joys. The work that I do in Congress is often with them in mind, too. It’s important to me that our country is the best possible place for them to grow up and live in. I’m off to go spend time with my family! I hope you have a great Father’s Day. Warmly, \- Jared

name: John Padora
subject: Today is a special one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Today is Father’s Day! I want to extend my warmest wishes to all the amazing fathers and father figures out there – your commitment, compassion, and unwavering support truly make a difference in the lives of those around you. Whether you are a biologic
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=f7120cbae72d4d0695a205ba03cdecb8&_e=d7WQYz_LVTsFrCxMx1WsIOqp6KgbuCK4ieVnUEpwLsQDQkjqLfljL7M_ijocFTLTgIH-7jIMdUw6uZFe0gjlNGGGi5xKE57zLQziWlYc86PVSuFPIkWzJefc1LmxCwPuD-u9LjIHAC96n4HO8TZzgQ2C1tzIPysNpZ7DHqBJYfQS1kOg9QMJgpuLEEL_qdERAkigbz8iCmYBTr5rld1Tk_STIra_-kbUOm-IY7GHmJMv0Tq14_wpVz6bYXp0Te-4iOzuHkWpUiIcX_G9i6Kqp2Ivm3ChUrX0SS-MPQ1KfRPUweqsFbBPIkb-PXwcVXS6qT2S6OHOpzmJTF6xKNcwPEJpzUVuGwpKF0pBXzQMWeZrqt6a0ZM4SRUsRJfXZv_hrFkfax2GeCFma3yWjgokDA%3D%3D) Folks, Today is Father’s Day! I want to extend my warmest wishes to all the amazing fathers and father figures out there – your commitment, compassion, and unwavering support truly make a difference in the lives of those around you. **Whether you are a biological father, a stepfather, a grandfather, or a mentor, your impact cannot be overstated.** Father's Day is an opportunity for us to reflect on the values we hold dear, the lessons we have learned from our father figures, and the legacy we strive to leave behind for our children. My children are the reason I’m in this race in the first place, and I know many of you can relate to wanting to improve your children’s futures. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=f7120cbae72d4d0695a205ba03cdecb8&_e=d7WQYz_LVTsFrCxMx1WsIOqp6KgbuCK4ieVnUEpwLsQDQkjqLfljL7M_ijocFTLTgIH-7jIMdUw6uZFe0gjlNGGGi5xKE57zLQziWlYc86PVSuFPIkWzJefc1LmxCwPuD-u9LjIHAC96n4HO8TZzgQ2C1tzIPysNpZ7DHqBJYfQS1kOg9QMJgpuLEEL_qdERAkigbz8iCmYBTr5rld1Tk_STIra_-kbUOm-IY7GHmJMv0Tq14_wpVz6bYXp0Te-4RNXTK-1KqOhh_k0ySjJ0gEXOSfsj056N9uJ-Diya_-j6d1cBfob6KFDEU9rfRZiRA4ife4UIlUd5v-l-_3CTkqWHGScYNApmgzc8EH8snVaKSZIE5KkcrWIGr4sKma7iCrpHmZmtuqDuP6bnt1WbHQ%3D%3D) And of course, I miss my father today. He was my political mentor and really sparked that interest from a young age. He would always say to me when we would talk about hardships "we’re always bailing out the big banks, corporations and politicians - but when's the last time they ever bailed out the American people"? [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=f7120cbae72d4d0695a205ba03cdecb8&_e=d7WQYz_LVTsFrCxMx1WsIOqp6KgbuCK4ieVnUEpwLsQDQkjqLfljL7M_ijocFTLTgIH-7jIMdUw6uZFe0gjlNGGGi5xKE57zLQziWlYc86PVSuFPIkWzJefc1LmxCwPuD-u9LjIHAC96n4HO8TZzgQ2C1tzIPysNpZ7DHqBJYfQS1kOg9QMJgpuLEEL_qdERAkigbz8iCmYBTr5rld1Tk_STIra_-kbUOm-IY7GHmJMv0Tq14_wpVz6bYXp0Te-4RSdqyX7GSvAEnHcxxinbEUfk0-brAFpEuRrAGlWcgCuzzV0VgGoIEBI9fBxYuJjjrz7w6yKFhoh0gOoXjJDDobksRGwJAmbCtb_UkHaQbhFIbt72z9bfiG0V-Joym1kVHFo_YP4ET0QvgI9zsP4I1Q%3D%3D) That thought has stuck with me through the years, and it’s what has motivated so much of this campaign. He was right then, and he’s still right today. So here’s to dads. However you spend father’s day, I hope it’s peaceful. Best,

clean_body: Today is Father’s Day! I want to extend my warmest wishes to all the amazing fathers and father figures out there – your commitment, compassion, and unwavering support truly make a difference in the lives of those around you. Whether you are a biologic | | | Folks, Today is Father’s Day! I want to extend my warmest wishes to all the amazing fathers and father figures out there – your commitment, compassion, and unwavering support truly make a difference in the lives of those around you. Whether you are a biological father, a stepfather, a grandfather, or a mentor, your impact cannot be overstated. Father's Day is an opportunity for us to reflect on the values we hold dear, the lessons we have learned from our father figures, and the legacy we strive to leave behind for our children. My children are the reason I’m in this race in the first place, and I know many of you can relate to wanting to improve your children’s futures. And of course, I miss my father today. He was my political mentor and really sparked that interest from a young age. He would always say to me when we would talk about hardships "we’re always bailing out the big banks, corporations and politicians - but when's the last time they ever bailed out the American people"? That thought has stuck with me through the years, and it’s what has motivated so much of this campaign. He was right then, and he’s still right today. So here’s to dads. However you spend father’s day, I hope it’s peaceful. Best, John Padora I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Re: Washington… we have a problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This may be our final chance to ward off any impending challenges to our movement.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240616-3989-footer&t=1&akid=3989%2E420207%2E7_wlw_)
Peter,
**Here's the situation:** Pramila is working overtime in Congress to fight back against the cruel and corrupt GOP.
**Here’s the problem:** Republican billionaires and Trump megadonors have been waiting in the wings to find any weaknesses to exploit in our grassroots campaign. **And they’re looking to use our third quarter FEC fundraising numbers to determine how hard they want to hit our campaign to unseat Pramila.**
**Here’s the answer:** We need the **full power** of the grassroots behind us to protect Pramila from the far right so she can continue to stand up for our rights and freedoms.
This month marks the end of the quarter and our official FEC fundraising deadline. This may be our**final chance** to ward off any impending challenges to our movement.
[**Can we count on you to make a donation of $3 or more to kick off our June fundraising and strengthen our resources for the road ahead?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240616.Z7CCbJ&refcode=em20240616-3989&t=2&akid=3989%2E420207%2E7_wlw_)

Together,
Jayapal HQ

clean_body: We want to make this Father’s Day extra special for Matt. | Peter, To all those who celebrate, Happy Father’s Day! Whether you’re a father, stepfather, or even a father figure, this day is meant to celebrate all you do for those you love. For us here at Cartwright HQ, we want to make this Father’s Day extra special for Matt, so we created a card for all his top grassroots supporters to sign! For Matt, becoming a father was one of his proudest moments. And we want to celebrate all he does for his children every day. We hope you and your loved ones have a Happy Father’s Day, Cartwright HQ | In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

name: John Fetterman
subject: To my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
To Fathers across the nation, Happy Father’s Day.
#
To Fathers across the nation, Happy Father’s Day.
Here’s a photo strip of me and my dad 43 years ago. 33 years later, we re-created the strip with my kiddo:
Being a parent is the honor of a lifetime and I am so thankful for my dad on a day like today.
Best. Dad. Ever. ❤️
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240616-9116-footer&t=1&refcode2=9116_434096_ZOQZOR&akid=9116%2E434096%2EZOQZOR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

This is Amy Brown – my husband Sam Brown just won the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate in Nevada. I first met my husband in the burn unit when he returned from Afghanistan after a roadside bomb exploded under his vehicle. There was one thing about Sam that caught my attention immediately. It wasn't the burns on his body, it wasn't the scars on the face. His vibrant faith in God glowed brightly even in his darkest days. Everyone who encountered him could see Sam is different. Sam likes to say his life is not his own. Sam's life changed when he was injured in Afghanistan, but his identity did not. His faith never wavered. His hope never left him. His dedication to lead a life of service to others only grew stronger. Sam has an uncanny ability to relate and connect with people. He's able to talk about hard things. And he's not afraid of confrontation. **[We need your help to send Sam to the U.S. Senate because he's the one man who will NEVER back down from WHO HE IS no matter what.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef509c16a6e34c16810b60d51dc1dcbd&_e=kKBDIb4mIPjb01dGKuFvORqdc2RmFu6jTdtaC7x3iQSkC_7xAZpnBiw4Fqu6S7Xx15yRARu36DPwixEPPwzI-rSMKQCxtpcLNveVGIKxPG-1XnTRtME_eJWtM17tt948hws4Jy-2gEORV6tJtlXUMZ5xhilqnBaWxjqCUFtc8u0O7V8P7d-uQCEnJE6U6K3t3dBuZTiQu97YP1vg1K6pB61UPUP5637V1CAcpWZigD-A8sZIJy6CLTLcuiTMI_6Vxa0G61VrYZZT0AWl6S7mzBY8t4CJEWhM59Q1L0RP8w78g31aQYGZD4OTzMotvc1nTJolf8iEgsnnf2BWwz8wvAiM1btNG2iD3zXEWyshwOqJpX09MDon1bCKTuadTqu_hYK0eT-5ioUQenx4PBu0zKXvGojhqacJTAa3dbIv7BqbFLsjypSxwW2aJ8cMXU6E)** **[Will you please consider making a donation of any amount to Sam's campaign?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef509c16a6e34c16810b60d51dc1dcbd&_e=kKBDIb4mIPjb01dGKuFvORqdc2RmFu6jTdtaC7x3iQSkC_7xAZpnBiw4Fqu6S7Xx15yRARu36DPwixEPPwzI-rSMKQCxtpcLNveVGIKxPG-1XnTRtME_eJWtM17tt948hws4Jy-2gEORV6tJtlXUMZ5xhilqnBaWxjqCUFtc8u0O7V8P7d-uQCEnJE6U6K3t3dBuZTiQu97YP1vg1K6pB61UPUP5637V1CAcpWZigD-A8sZIJy6CLTLcuiTMI_6Vxa0G61VrYZZT0AWl6S7mzBY8t4CJEWhM59Q1L0RP8w4J6bYCd1oTWo4Sx2XkMhvWlNhDmbCtbdKjBXhDsEe818FC5liPpqkNIztRaKm_CAHQGRhIOVy_xMKjYoQWqWuH60UPafx_1V3yfHY8ZLrVDsePfzioCH0idV0yEnIkawn3tbCNaXQCPXW2L_XwfLBO)** Thank you in advance for your time, your consideration, and your support. And he's not afraid of confrontation. Thank you in advance for your time, your consideration, and your support. Sincerely, Amy Brown | | | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I don’t have to fake it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |

Hey there, it’s Jon Tester. The general election has officially begun in Montana, and one thing is already clear: **My opponent and I couldn’t be more different.**
* Tim Sheehy grew up in a multi-million dollar lake house in the big city suburbs. I’m a third-generation dirt farmer, born and raised in Montana.

* Tim Sheehy supports a national abortion ban. I'm fighting to protect personal freedoms.

* Tim Sheehy will be a mouthpiece for Mitch McConnell’s agenda. I always take my cues from Montanans.

**[This race will be decided by a mere handful of votes, so every action we take could be the difference between victory and defeat. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to help power us to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87011009/479735905/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5123-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmQ1ZjhlZC1mMzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYrdKZJSJkxwf5LG62e4Cf_V6Yro5Dd7C6m5h0r_1Ds=)**
Whether he’s playing cowboy or pretending he grew up surrounded by farmland, Tim Sheehy is shamelessly lying when it’s clear he doesn’t understand a lick about what makes rural America so special.
**Montana deserves a senator that appreciates everything that makes our state the Last Best Place – that’s why we have to win this race.**
This seat is on track to become the most expensive and competitive Senate race in the country. Outside groups are spending nearly $65 million on attacks trying to turn me into someone I’m not – because they can’t beat who I am. I need your help to fight back, so I’m asking:
**[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to send this seven-fingered dirt farmer back to the United States Senate so I can keep fighting for Montana?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87011010/479735906/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5123-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmQ1ZjhlZC1mMzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYrdKZJSJkxwf5LG62e4Cf_V6Yro5Dd7C6m5h0r_1Ds=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87011016/479735912/1575385346?refcode=jtk5123-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmQ1ZjhlZC1mMzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYrdKZJSJkxwf5LG62e4Cf_V6Yro5Dd7C6m5h0r_1Ds=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87011017/479735913/1575385346?refcode=jtk5123-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmQ1ZjhlZC1mMzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYrdKZJSJkxwf5LG62e4Cf_V6Yro5Dd7C6m5h0r_1Ds=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Giffords.org
subject: Bad news...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal
#

We never like sharing bad news with you, but we need to let you know that we fell short of our mid-month goal.
To be honest, this has us worried.
We’ve set some of our highest goals **ever** this month. The end of this month is our next quarterly fundraising deadline. After this deadline, our numbers get reported publicly, meaning that both allies and adversaries will be able to see how much we’ve raised this quarter.
Gabby and all of us here at GIFFORDS PAC know that our movement to end gun violence is stronger than ever. Now, it’s up to us to raise the resources to prove our strength to those who say otherwise.
That’s why we’ve set a new goal to raise **$10,000** by the end of the day today to help us reach the goal we missed last night.
[**Can we count on you to rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC? Your support right now would make a HUGE difference.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240616-1-30&t=1&akid=8317%2E3935704%2Ep1GJn5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june24.51eOFU&amount=3&refcode=em240616-1-30&t=20&akid=8317%2E3935704%2Ep1GJn5)**

| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this letter because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email - isn't about baseball in fact, it's an email I never thought I'd be writing to you. **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b01bad0ed1aa43628022e74c02336604&_e=HNBNAP7LhHowPRzN2XUK3mcFX9OU0O68Ru-R8sIIIkHGmXZQT18_pQKtMIY04s9FyJeRH6nwrbedMZJYsVb2RTdSeNmxbqyIo3M_On2e_W9zgSPeK5Q5c-y8cQADew2_R-yyS4rFBrsh2J521GI0MBaeKRSzbSUSea_HTQiZU3mKNyLk6KL-RiX-Ij3JrMba6u1wnBhJeBrphHh6UdbQsreudG_4ZKpW87EcZhZ1s0Fm1dtTM-nUt2HW4JCZLRob1PHgPiJgX7KsmJhi6NbGmw3eCZMeZA1A9Aoi43VFkYGsAIUmxVfyq9gYyrf2TrJBQUZBcgYujWvfcUWrgoA0mui2M2d9LWY9stfY6qcj3FP770JmF0Yf6mYaVGbx6Dh-NO4ipAUgaObWcoo9c6JcoA%3D%3D)** Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. _**Remember?**_ ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. _**Remember?**_ Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... **_We_ _Republicans_ pulled our country out of that 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. ** **We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.** **And America became a shining city upon a hill once more.** **_We_ _can_ _do_ _that_ _again._** **It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.** **But there's no way I can pull it off without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to rush back your _Garvey for Senate_ contribution of $35 or more right away. **](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b01bad0ed1aa43628022e74c02336604&_e=HNBNAP7LhHowPRzN2XUK3mcFX9OU0O68Ru-R8sIIIkHGmXZQT18_pQKtMIY04s9FyJeRH6nwrbedMZJYsVb2RTdSeNmxbqyIo3M_On2e_W9zgSPeK5Q5c-y8cQADew2_R-yyS4rFBrsh2J521GI0MBaeKRSzbSUSea_HTQiZU3mKNyLk6KL-RiX-Ij3JrMba6u1wnBhJeBrphHh6UdbQsreudG_4ZKpW87EcZhZ1s0Fm1dtTM-nUt2HW4JCZLRob4S23zY1zVSGu4--RSX7dnkMHYXWKnP26yXd83PkogykOzrVD5uXmfuYNzLqnJhHuFcP9ptUh3M4RXBo1YO3EAmpraMFVydtH-9vck77XA3ElDwJvSEBo1tX5BJT8utL9AHnuNotzaqAjp_Vw_OkERw%3D%3D) I'm sorry for the urgency but Election Day is just six months away... And in that time, we need to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff who has ActBlue allies and a war chest he's assembled during his two decades in Washington, D.C. That may seem daunting, but I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the _one_ _thing_ a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this letter, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -- a very real shot -- in the general election. But we only have six months. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. [**When you rush your _Garvey for Senate_ campaign contribution of $35 or more... **](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b01bad0ed1aa43628022e74c02336604&_e=HNBNAP7LhHowPRzN2XUK3mcFX9OU0O68Ru-R8sIIIkHGmXZQT18_pQKtMIY04s9FyJeRH6nwrbedMZJYsVb2RTdSeNmxbqyIo3M_On2e_W9zgSPeK5Q5c-y8cQADew2_R-yyS4rFBrsh2J521GI0MBaeKRSzbSUSea_HTQiZU3mKNyLk6KL-RiX-Ij3JrMba6u1wnBhJeBrphHh6UdbQsreudG_4ZKpW87EcZhZ1s0Fm1dtTM-nUt2HW4JCZLRob0wyNlHoCFLPum4XHiYPH1O4cEnoihiQM8T4Pp8siLBwnzfnSOwVu0b_UaeD_Hfcvsu9PzJjcNoQ_iVMd7Mdg4xp42Jvx6c8ZngkIhubEPxP1CM9gXzpP7r2CUPLPAu0mHURMR1K9pvTDd2n1XHjQKA%3D%3D) ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make _all of us_ less safe, less prosperous, and less free. _ This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. When we win here... when we rip this seat out of the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the _nationwide_ Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on the choice you make in the next 48 hours. You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of victory. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America.
---
| | Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b01bad0ed1aa43628022e74c02336604&_e=HNBNAP7LhHowPRzN2XUK3mcFX9OU0O68Ru-R8sIIIkHGmXZQT18_pQKtMIY04s9FyJeRH6nwrbedMZJYsVb2RTdSeNmxbqyIo3M_On2e_W9zgSPeK5Q5c-y8cQADew2_R-yyS4rFBrsh2J521GI0MBaeKRSzbSUSea_HTQiZU3mKNyLk6KL-RiX-Ij3JrMba6u1wnBhJeBrphHh6UdbQsreudG_4ZKpW87EcZhZ1s0Fm1dtTM-nUt2HW4JCZLRobSGdio6zoTEZS7ld28YsfX7UxddR2If3vlyxKmkt0Pjmya0cOVpIm17QtGAaYvBZKa3JdQw-b-hLYb3hQS5MlPyVep-Di2UE3qEJlmzliaPY_Jz6jNUcqQrLb_XqEdcho8gvuEmMOIvFpl2KODZAbWA%3D%3D)

Steve Garvey #6

With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. [**But Election Day is just six months away. \--Steve

| | Hey Peter,

It’s Felicia, the GA Dems’ finance director. I have a meeting with Chair Nikema Williams in one hour to discuss where we are ahead of our end-of-quarter goal at the end of month, and I want to give her good news, but we fell short of where I wanted to be last night.

[**_Can you rush a donation within the next hour so I can tell her that you pitched in and helped us turn things around?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87012180/479740115/710125701?refcode=20240616.1_FA_6W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjc3YTBlMi1mNTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpPCmhjl-XRcWzxMyO97-4xA5t3-58bdRHqRBi0ohfY=)

The most important metric that we look at, even more than dollars raised, is how many supporters are pitching in. That’s why I’m asking every member of our team to pitch in today!

The bigger our grassroots movement, the more confident we are that we can mobilize our ENTIRE team to defeat Donald Trump and keep Georgia blue this November.

[**_Are you with us, Peter?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87012181/479740116/710125701?refcode=20240616.1_FA_6W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjc3YTBlMi1mNTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpPCmhjl-XRcWzxMyO97-4xA5t3-58bdRHqRBi0ohfY=)

Thanks for being a part of our team,
—Felicia Felicia Agostini
Finance Director
Democratic Party of Georgia

name: Andy Cohen
subject: If Josh Hawley had his way, the government would not let me be a father.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Peter — I’m a born-and-raised
Missourian.

And if Josh Hawley had his way, my kids would not be alive today.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]Photo of Andy with his kids.

I know that might sound dramatic, and this is a long email. But if you
give me just a couple minutes of your time to explain, I know you’ll agree
— [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]and I hope you’ll then chip in to help Lucas Kunce defeat Josh Hawley
this November.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]CHIP IN NOW

It might be easy to assume I’m talking about Hawley’s continued opposition
to marriage equality. He even voted against it in 2022. While Josh Hawley
does seem to care a lot about what happens in my bedroom, I’m actually not
married — just gay.

While it’s safe to assume Hawley’s opposition to civil rights protections
for gay Americans means he doesn’t want me to be a parent anyway, his
assault on my right to build and raise a family has a lot more to do with
reproductive freedom — something that matters to each and every one of you
reading this.

Like many Americans — women, men, gay, straight — I had to rely on IVF to
build my family. I’m so incredibly thankful for the doctors, donors, and
rockstar surrogates who helped bring my kids into the world. Those women
gave me life. They gave me the chance to have a family. And I will be
forever indebted to them.

My son Ben was born in 2019, and my daughter Lucy was born in 2022 — just
a few months before the Dobbs decision. As any parent with IVF kids can
tell you, it isn’t easy. It’s expensive, takes time, and often fails.
Fertilized embryos will almost inevitably be lost, and the costs
associated with indefinite storage means extra embryos are almost always
either donated to research, donated to family, or discarded. It’s an
immense privilege to be able to build a family with IVF, when it should be
a right.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]St. Louis Public Radio headline: 'No protection for IVF' Missouri
advocates sound alarm after IVF safeguards stymied in legislature.

Now, two years after Dobbs, we’re living in an America that has less
freedom than it did before — from a total abortion ban in Missouri and IVF
shutdowns in Alabama, to “fetal personhood” laws (which Missouri also has)
that threaten reproductive freedom in its entirety.

And no U.S. Senator is more personally responsible for it than Josh Hawley
— who is now up for his first election since everything changed.

You might already know about Josh Hawley’s extreme anti-choice views and
how he’s used his taxpayer-funded office to support his wife's legal work
in the Dobbs case and in the case to ban the abortion pill nationwide —
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]and if that’s reason enough for you to want to help Lucas Kunce defeat
Hawley in November, then add a donation to help Lucas get it done.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]CHIP IN NOW

But if you didn’t already know about Josh Hawley’s deep personal
involvement in every single part of the nationwide assault on reproductive
freedom, then keep reading.

It all started when Hawley led the Hobby Lobby case in front of the
Supreme Court, which gave employers the power to refuse coverage for birth
control for their workers. He even said contraceptives “may induce an
abortion by preventing implantation of a fertilized egg” — which, to be
clear, is not true or what an abortion is according to virtually every
medical professional.

Once Hawley got to the U.S. Senate, he did everything he could to push his
extreme anti-reproductive freedom agenda forward: Putting campaign donors
as well as anti-IVF and anti-surrogacy extremists on our courts. Using his
taxpayer-funded office to support his activist-lawyer wife's cases to
overturn Roe, enacting Missouri’s total abortion ban, and even trying to
ban the abortion pill nationwide. And sponsoring extreme “fetal
personhood” bills at the national level.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]On the left, a headline from The Guardian: Hawley's anti-abortion
arguments echoed in AL IVF case. On the right, a headline from the
Washington Post: Nominee who is anti-IVF and surrogacy was deemed
unqualified. Hawley: 'I was proud to recommend her.'

Then, last week, Hawley made it clearer than ever how he feels about IVF
and our right to build a family: He voted against a bill to guarantee
access to IVF and make it more affordable. His reason?

Hawley told the media the Right To IVF Act was really part of an “abortion
agenda.”

I’m sorry, but that’s CRAZY.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]CHIP IN TO FIGHT BACK

His ultimate goal here is obvious — Josh Hawley doesn’t just want Big
Brother politicians like himself to control us in our bedrooms and our
doctor’s offices. He wants to control OUR bodies, and even how we choose
to build and raise OUR families.

And if he gets another six years to finish what he’s started, then the
ability to build a family like mine — or even likely a family like yours —
could be made impossible.

Josh Hawley poses a unique and existential threat to reproductive freedom,
and this is our one chance to put a stop to his crusade against our
freedoms. [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]We can’t afford to give him another six years in the U.S.
Senate — so, I'm asking: Can you please add a donation to Lucas Kunce’s
campaign today so we can secure our freedoms?

contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52580?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1010&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]Contribute $10

I warned you already this was a long email, so you can’t blame me for
wanting to tell you a bit more about Lucas Kunce and why I know he can
defeat Josh Hawley — but only if he has your help. Lucas is the Marine
veteran and born-and-raised Missourian taking Hawley on this November.
He’s built a record-breaking movement and is drawing huge crowds at events
across the state.

And he’s even sharing the ballot this November with a referendum to end
the Hawley-backed abortion ban in Missouri, which will be a huge boost for
Democratic turnout just as it has been in red and purple states across the
country in recent elections.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1017&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]New York Times headline: Abortion Rights Fuel Big Democratic Wins, and
Hopes for 2024

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1018&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]CHIP IN TO ELECT LUCAS

Not long ago, Missourians came together to defeat Todd Akin after his
extreme views on abortion came to light, but that didn’t happen overnight.

Akin exposed himself in August of that election year, and a poll that same
month showed him with an 11% lead. It took weeks and MONTHS of hard work,
advertising, and organizing to expose Akin’s extremism to Missouri voters
— and because we all came together, Missourians rejected Akin on Election
Day by a 15% margin (a total change of 26% from August).

And while you might be surprised to hear about Democrats doing that well
in a red state, that kind of result isn’t rare in Missouri.

In our last U.S. Senate race that took place in a presidential election,
Jason Kander outperformed the presidential ticket by 16%, nearly defeating
incumbent Roy Blunt, who had the entire GOP establishment behind him. In
fact, the race against Blunt got close with almost identical timing to the
race against Akin — Kander was polling by as much as 14% behind Blunt, but
after pushing hard on ads and organizing starting in the fall, the race
was neck-and-neck.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]On top, a Spectrum News headline: Recent poll found Hawley was the
least popular GOP senator up for reelection among voters. In the middle,

the needed signatures to get on the ballot. On the bottom, a quote from
Jason Kander in the KC Star: 'Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley. Anyone
who cares about democracy, reproductive freedom, and working families,
this race should be a priority.'

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52579?refcode=em20240616-5775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=5775%2E614464%2EU5gol2 ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY

Now I’m going to say something you may not want to hear, but it is true

objectively has the worst record on reproductive rights of any U.S.

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Happy Father's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87012652/479741917/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20240616_ST_Father'sDay_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_Father'sDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWI5Yjc2Ny1mNzJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fwtXNiiHjJdj3DFIxuYj8AOULu8SY49UwH-uKoIJWtA=&emci=b8633b92-702a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c1b9b767-f72b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

**_Happy Father's Day!_**

Today, we honor all those who fulfill the role of fathers, whether they are dads, grandfathers, stepfathers, uncles, brothers, friends, or educators.

Fathers play a vital role in the foundation of our families, our communities, and our society. Join me in taking this opportunity to celebrate the men who raised us and those who continue to support us daily through their sacrifices, words of wisdom, and unconditional love.

Father’s Day allows us to set aside essential time to consider and reflect on the impact of fathers in our lives. As a father, I take great pride in working together with my wife to be an essential guiding force in our daughters' lives and each day learning more about ourselves through them.

From my family to yours, Happy Father’s Day, Peter. I hope you take time to rest and enjoy a day honoring **_all_** fathers.

Thank you,

Jimmy Panetta
---

name: Team Sheri Biggs
subject: Join Us to Secure a Runoff Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHERI BIGGS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Your unwavering support and dedication have brought us this far, and we need you again to secure a victory in the runoff election.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://cgnb9.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0cEbC62mBi3KJrKWON/q1CFF6jqKZNi)
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters, I hope this email finds you well. We are thrilled Sheri Biggs has secured her position in the runoff for South Carolina's 3rd Congressional District! Your unwavering support and dedication have brought us this far, and we cannot thank you enough. But the journey is not over yet. We need to come together again to secure a victory in the runoff. Your involvement is crucial in ensuring that we bring strong conservative leadership to Congress by electing Sheri Biggs. ** _How You Can Help_** **Volunteer:** Your time and effort are invaluable. Here’s how you can get involved:
* **Call Nights:** Join us for phone banking sessions to reach out to voters and remind them of the importance of this runoff.
* **Super Saturday:** Participate in our major canvassing event to knock on doors and engage with our community.

**Donate:** Contributions are vital to our campaign’s success. Your donations will help fund crucial outreach efforts and campaign materials. [Click here to donate.](https://cgnb9.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LKR1aS8hLy79hgJG6R/NAMMzFw0klw6) **Spread the Word:** Share our message with friends, family, and neighbors. Follow us on social media and share our updates to amplify our reach. **Display Support:** Put up yard signs, bumper stickers, and attend local events to show your support. Every little bit helps in spreading the word about our campaign. ** _Key Dates_** **Early Voting:** Wednesday, June 19th - Friday, June 21st, 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM **Call Nights:** Monday, June 17th at 5:30 PM; Tuesday, June 18th at 5:30 PM; Thursday, June 20th at 5:30 PM; Monday, June 24th at 5:30 PM - Campaign Headquarters, 129 North Main Street in Anderson (or call from home!) **Super Saturday:** Saturday, June 22nd at 9:00 AM - Campaign Headquarters, 129 North Main Street in Anderson **Runoff Election Day:** Tuesday, June 25th, 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM _Thank you once again for your incredible support. Together, we can achieve a great victory for our district and our nation. Let’s continue this journey and bring the change we need to Washington._ Sincerely, Team Biggs
---

name: Jesse James Mullen
subject: What I’m most proud of
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State
body:
I’m not that old just yet, but even still I have done many things in my life that I’m proud of. I’m proud to run for Secretary of State to serve the people of Montana and I’m proud to have started my own newspaper business and built it from the ground up. | | | [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=5c49c86109844fa4991ec2a275627fd7&_e=pnLCxjJqdcEYML6vxP2ftVPZfatc4Kj-gIbAUBcnqIaWhLrwRyP2FkoWxMnUyg6gGIj2-jcPLLBsdL0cjP-1zpqUrjD6gBxyu8l7AGyoC4gwfDAPwGxTRJrtFgIzh24KAMTOxL5ZzX4lCH1xvlGegEaw7_67W14L3mWgqfL3wq5I_p-ZwrjjXGQrCmzHho0JCqrhdL7xhsrkJ1pKq5j9CnQ9WYFhJ1SfFcZg-S-RIdg2GRosFVgVSuWLpQLtD4McPL79lJhPbWOp_DCgwYv8kuFzdZzFdKBd-B6YQGKcHfCgV6aJVgQN3de2qyB3Fxxs59-bIy7s4dhZEa2pSnF2k02BFQx6_aS35x_57hOMLQ2qezPaBABFJyU_XNNH1RhbAkZGkHcvchyPCvw5S4cDcA%3D%3D) Friends, I’m not that old just yet, but even still I have done many things in my life that I’m proud of. I’m proud to run for Secretary of State to serve the people of Montana and I’m proud to have started my own newspaper business and built it from the ground up. **But I will never be prouder of anything than I am of being a father.** My children are the great joy of my life. They’re the reason I get out of bed in the morning, the reason I worked so hard to build my business, and they’re the reason I want to serve our state. I want to leave them with a better world than the one I grew up in. [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=5c49c86109844fa4991ec2a275627fd7&_e=pnLCxjJqdcEYML6vxP2ftVPZfatc4Kj-gIbAUBcnqIaWhLrwRyP2FkoWxMnUyg6gGIj2-jcPLLBsdL0cjP-1zpqUrjD6gBxyu8l7AGyoC4gwfDAPwGxTRJrtFgIzh24KAMTOxL5ZzX4lCH1xvlGegEaw7_67W14L3mWgqfL3wq5I_p-ZwrjjXGQrCmzHho0JCqrhdL7xhsrkJ1pKq5j9CnQ9WYFhJ1SfFcZg-S-RIdg2GRosFVgVSuWLpQLtD4Mcj2K4O2cVV_oIHUNdt-iAGhCwFKp1pOslq2oFiViQvhzlwMWN98lySZAYfkRyaSN7wgjbJuM2o16l_hVDdJz4nRhKotj3BO1ofdlV_TdQGN885bjZUQ6sWb5SM0jBJ36Kj1M2peVo-behG2t5qQIBQw%3D%3D) I know that many fathers feel such pride and joy today, and so I want to take a moment to wish a Happy Father’s Day to all the dads, step-dads, bonus dads, soon-to-be dads, and father figures out there. We don’t always get the most credit in the world as parents, but we don’t need it. One day to recognize the work that we do to raise our children as best we can is good enough for us. Raising children is never easy, and I want every dad out there to know that I see you and I know what you go through for your kids. Not a day goes by that I’m not proud to be a dad. So to all the dads out there – Happy Father’s Day. Best, Jesse James Mullen [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=5c49c86109844fa4991ec2a275627fd7&_e=pnLCxjJqdcEYML6vxP2ftVPZfatc4Kj-gIbAUBcnqIaWhLrwRyP2FkoWxMnUyg6gGIj2-jcPLLBsdL0cjP-1zpqUrjD6gBxyu8l7AGyoC4gwfDAPwGxTRJrtFgIzh24KAMTOxL5ZzX4lCH1xvlGegEaw7_67W14L3mWgqfL3wq5I_p-ZwrjjXGQrCmzHho0JCqrhdL7xhsrkJ1pKq5j9CnQ9WYFhJ1SfFcZg-S-RIdg2GRosFVgVSuWLpQLtD4Mc22IvOuFZYGkZJ_e16eiLzHaEwMul2efQeHsMOcsXvEtUpeISBcdNLTXVgHYXM-o0MAULtDcRIiyPK4kX7ghvX8WUUcIcaq1Uj35AkOLVgLkUxVazHjqN7CXJ8BDf5UuZMQNu-thz2BX2tSfhjt-WxA%3D%3D) Montana needs your help to defeat the Far Right and protect our values of caring, community, and free and fair Elections. Your donation will protect election integrity, and public land access and build a friendlier secretary of state office for Montanans! [DONATE](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=5c49c86109844fa4991ec2a275627fd7&_e=pnLCxjJqdcEYML6vxP2ftVPZfatc4Kj-gIbAUBcnqIaWhLrwRyP2FkoWxMnUyg6gGIj2-jcPLLBsdL0cjP-1zpqUrjD6gBxyu8l7AGyoC4gwfDAPwGxTRJrtFgIzh24KAMTOxL5ZzX4lCH1xvlGegEaw7_67W14L3mWgqfL3wq5I_p-ZwrjjXGQrCmzHho0JCqrhdL7xhsrkJ1pKq5j9CnQ9WYFhJ1SfFcZg-S-RIdg2GRosFVgVSuWLpQLtD4Mcf5eZJao6X1UJjL3d3O2HvrhlG0ypJf4NWjYhdcKhDRXflfFejjBoc4nyYSvdQZrvTKPfmADgodh-zz38wTq99WxFbsnGi0ZoYZfhD7YPOZPHrpcH3iHYmIbjLui0WATQvZPZOZN7n7wWSUgTCZO6aw%3D%3D) Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State

Your donation will protect election integrity, and public land access and build a friendlier secretary of state office for Montanans! Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State

name: Kristin Lyerly
subject: Learn more about my long drive:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I take a long drive to practice reproductive health care. Come with me. _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Kristin Lyerly. Kristin is running for Congress in Wisconsin's 8th district, and I'm proud to support her campaign. I hope you'll read her update and[chip in, if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kl.ic7YJD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi)_
* * *
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kl.ic7YJD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi) Peter, **We’ve just released our campaign launch video –[and I want you to be the first to see it.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kl.ic7YJD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi)** [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kl.ic7YJD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi) Multiple times a month, I take a long drive to Minnesota, where I practice reproductive health care and care for patients. I do this because of anti-abortion restrictions that took effect in Wisconsin after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Those restrictions severely impacted my ability to care for patients, but I didn’t just sit back and allow politicians to dictate how I provide care. I fought back, and in Wisconsin, we won: My name is on the judgment that overturned Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban. Now, I’m running for Congress because I’m sick of watching politicians play games with the needs of my patients and my community. **[Please, take a moment to watch my video – and then chip in $10 to my campaign to help us share it with the world.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kl.ic7YJD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kristin Lyerly and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-kl.RmVPwU&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi)
---

---
| [SPLIT $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-kl.gC6LP2&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi)
---
[SPLIT $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-kl.FqZC4k&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=2801%2E35263%2EdchTKi)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Could I ask you to raise your voice today?
body:
You and I both know that every life is a precious gift.
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=c3d3843e93eb4eef900a63ced68a52dc&_t=3t-tz8JieU1stoZhLcdeijRolfwYEasXLXw7gVFk409hDvP6FebN4rxjW6V3pMZXzX6vOqXkiM8eAQppypDd8oGAiySe7GuwnBp8xAHDfRO325fm1EY3thKfBpZFoV2I)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c3d3843e93eb4eef900a63ced68a52dc&_e=ljF1ehtk7rPQnw1GRVHC8j_c8qQTGQD6Yn6GRvnHOLNwR9Iv0AsiDgCgzYbDcUZLybK2iPTfApTH3lCLRyKsNus-cgTr42hsAJwEiPs1WO0OifV4mTr2TVmFFqnvnt-83YkfLbrIgzwoD5IEiMsoOyDZKVugtILyf_JdfN7A8yASQEGbjqOfYQ_dxm4Ya-0utrdkoY7OmQMFnJyykMIHkPSkoIiVEronz82QOL_lIFUIRjqYj5p2mDOHjgZreDSspZF6tVrGeBB2n9vDmSb0QgeEZy8kSIQZghvKlzf_paZoaJVSxyrg-033LvGV1g76ppCIzRIUEdfShoM1GKJS1O_wyxrP_Fiy3SEWWgL7cg9RXeoIqrMLUDpmWbM2vw8-)

---
| |
Dear Fellow American,

It's Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Governor of Arkansas.

You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Yet, the Biden Administration continues to threaten the innocent and the voiceless under the guise of reproductive rights.

Every day, they press ahead with policies that expand access to dangerous abortion drugs and allow abortion-on-demand, resulting in countless, unthinkable losses of innocent life. The danger to future generations, the heartbreaking impact on families, and the erosion of our most fundamental values as Americans are at stake.

But we don't have to accept this reality. There is a solution, and you are a key part of it.

I am proud to join forces with SBA Pro-Life America, the most principled and effective organization fighting to end abortion in our country. By advocating for legislation that serves women and saves babies, SBA Pro-Life America stands at the forefront of this battle for life.

**But our effectiveness relies on dedicated individuals like YOU. YOUR voice matters. YOUR actions matter.**

That's why I'm personally inviting you to join us by signing the Stand For Life Pledge. This is a powerful way for us to demonstrate that, together, we form a strong, nationwide coalition poised to protect life, challenge policies that devalue it, and promote a culture that cherishes the value of every human life.

As a pro-life American, would you step forward today and sign our Pledge for Life? You can do so at the link below:

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/sarah-huckabee-sanders](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c3d3843e93eb4eef900a63ced68a52dc&_e=ljF1ehtk7rPQnw1GRVHC8j_c8qQTGQD6Yn6GRvnHOLNwR9Iv0AsiDgCgzYbDcUZLybK2iPTfApTH3lCLRyKsNus-cgTr42hsAJwEiPs1WO0OifV4mTr2TVmFFqnvnt-83YkfLbrIgzwoD5IEiMsoOyDZKVugtILyf_JdfN7A8yASQEGbjqOfYQ_dxm4Ya-0utrdkoY7OmQMFnJyykMIHkPSkoIiVEronz82QOL_lIFVblLBOUmF4FFF1jvxAXDv8lQoCUxDD0W0FFnKIBqpXlgl-U-Lxq7JNe9dDFEvRTmnzYyeHU4nx4Jaz_lbIbS0oyVTgtQbhasuuP7OPcHHQk7Gq84jqMCrNSZYUy_wr-XYQxiV55hJjMzOptHMWDOLc)

Together, we can protect the future and build a pro-life America. Thank you for standing with us and for acting on your beliefs - because it's in these actions that change truly begins.

God bless you,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders
Governor of Arkansas

clean_body: You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this - | | Dear Fellow American, It's Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Governor of Arkansas. You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Yet, the Biden Administration continues to threaten the innocent and the voiceless under the guise of reproductive rights. Every day, they press ahead with policies that expand access to dangerous abortion drugs and allow abortion-on-demand, resulting in countless, unthinkable losses of innocent life. The danger to future generations, the heartbreaking impact on families, and the erosion of our most fundamental values as Americans are at stake. But we don't have to accept this reality. There is a solution, and you are a key part of it. I am proud to join forces with SBA Pro-Life America, the most principled and effective organization fighting to end abortion in our country. By advocating for legislation that serves women and saves babies, SBA Pro-Life America stands at the forefront of this battle for life. But our effectiveness relies on dedicated individuals like YOU. YOUR voice matters. YOUR actions matter. That's why I'm personally inviting you to join us by signing the Stand For Life Pledge. This is a powerful way for us to demonstrate that, together, we form a strong, nationwide coalition poised to protect life, challenge policies that devalue it, and promote a culture that cherishes the value of every human life. As a pro-life American, would you step forward today and sign our Pledge for Life? You can do so at the link below: Together, we can protect the future and build a pro-life America. Thank you for standing with us and for acting on your beliefs - because it's in these actions that change truly begins. God bless you, Sarah Huckabee Sanders Governor of Arkansas | | | | | | | | Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 .

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87014062/479747386/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZiODc4Mi1mOTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQVvuErD9Q_2ziGZ3mHSfNai9T5Wo9gfss01GONPduk=&emci=be95249a-cb29-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=fd6b8782-f92b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
Domestic workers have been organizing for generations to win the pay, protections, and respect they deserve.
Today is International Domestic Workers Day, which marks the anniversary of the **2011 passage of the International Labor Organization (ILO) Convention 189 for Decent Work for Domestic Workers** — which established international labor law for domestic workers.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87014063/479747387/-886428516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZiODc4Mi1mOTJiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQVvuErD9Q_2ziGZ3mHSfNai9T5Wo9gfss01GONPduk=&emci=be95249a-cb29-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=fd6b8782-f92b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)
Over the past 13 years, domestic workers have used this date to honor the leadership of care workers in the global workers movement.
[**_Today, we’re reaching out to ask you to join us as a 2024 Care in Action member. name: China Kerr
subject: This Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Kerr for Congress
body:
https://www.joekerrforcongress.com [https://www.joekerrforcongress.com]
Hi there - I’m China Kerr, Joe's wife.
This Father’s Day, I’d like to share a few thoughts with you.
Due to our personal journey to become parents, Father’s Day has always held special significance for us. This year, it feels particularly meaningful as the GOP continues to erode women's rights to reproductive freedom following the Dobbs decision.
Twenty-one years ago, we embarked on the challenging and costly journey of in vitro fertilization, a medical miracle that enabled Joe to become the incredible father he is today (look how cute they are together!).
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
Thanks to IVF, safeguarded by Roe v. Wade, Joe and I have our son Joey, who will turn 21 this year and is our greatest gift.
Yet, Republicans across the country are determined to strip future families of this same joy. Just this week, Senate Republicans blocked legislation that would guarantee nationwide access to IVF and other fertility treatments. It’s infuriating!
So, this Father’s Day, the best gift I can give Joe is to ask you to support his campaign to flip CA-40 blue. Joe has a plan to counter the GOP’s extremist agenda. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
Joe will be our fiercest defender in Congress, fighting tirelessly to enshrine reproductive rights at the federal level. Without women's healthcare and reproductive freedom, Joe wouldn’t be a dad, and he’s committed to protecting and ensuring these rights for everyone.
Will you join me in celebrating Joe and supporting his mission by donating to his campaign? Your support will help us deliver real solutions for reproductive justice, climate action, and our economy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
I’ve had enough of Young Kim and other Republicans stripping away our rights. This is our chance to say enough is enough.
Thank you for reading, and Happy Father’s Day to all the incredible fathers in our lives!
China Kerr
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday] "For the last three decades, I've been running toward the problem... inside burning buildings, putting out fires, responding to disasters, and saving lives. Now, I'm running for Congress because we need a Democrat who will run toward the problems facing our nation – and solve them, not ignore them. Washington, D.C., is riddled with gridlock, corruption, divisive rhetoric, lack of civility, and too much grandstanding. Career politicians like Young Kim are only adding fuel to the fire, and I know how to put those out." - Joe Kerr
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftjoekerr?refcode=X_061624_fathersday&recurring=1]
https://www.facebook.com/joekerrforcongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/joekerrforcongress/] https://twitter.com/joekerrcongress [https://twitter.com/joekerrcongress] https://www.instagram.com/joekerrforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/joekerrforcongress/]

Joe Kerr for Congress
PO Box 5012
Orange, CA 92863
United States

name: =?utf-8?B?UmFxdWVsIFRlcsOhbg==?=
subject: Happy Father’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
Happy Father’s Day to all the father figures in our communities!
Today is a day of mixed emotions. I miss my father, as I do every single day, but on Father’s Day I miss him even more. He was my first great example of what a community servant looks like, and he was passionate about taking care of the most vulnerable, especially children and unhoused elders.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
He was unapologetic about fundraising for the “Asilo Casa Hogar La Divina Providencia” (a group home and senior housing for unhoused children and seniors). He would always repeat a phrase from a poem “En vida Hermano en Vida” - in life my sibling, in life, meaning that we need to take actions when we are alive.
Thank you, Papá, and although you are not here, your presence continues to guide me every day.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
My husband, Eddie, was also fortunate to have an amazing and selfless father, and I get to see that love he experienced in the way that he loves and cares for our son EJ: his patience when he coaches EJ on his baseball skills, to the deep conversations they have about sports, star wars, and life in general. Eddie works hard to provide the best he can, and he models to our son what is to be an amazing man.
Eddie has also been an amazing partner during this entire campaign. At our headquarters, he's known as the MVP, and he truly is!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
We are so lucky, and today, more than any day, it is important that we remind ourselves that we must work on policies that help families stay together, from access to health care to paid family and medical leave to comprehensive immigration reform.
With love and respect for all father figures!
Raquel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_061624_fathersday]
https://www.facebook.com/teranforarizona [https://www.facebook.com/teranforarizona] https://twitter.com/RaquelTeran [https://twitter.com/RaquelTeran] https://www.instagram.com/teranforarizona/ [https://www.instagram.com/teranforarizona/] https://www.raquelteran.com/ [https://www.raquelteran.com/]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> June 16, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-vj-wkavPw)
---
| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** **[NEW: As Russian Navy Conducts Drills Off The US Coast, Sen. Cruz Goes Off On Biden's Appeasement Of Putin:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "A submarine, a frigate, and two support ships from the Russian Navy are currently in Cuba, participating in military drills. While, as our Jim Thompson noted, the Russian Navy isn't the frightening behemoth it was in the "Hunt for Red October" time frame, and the Russians claim there are no nuclear missiles on the sub or the frigate, there are hypersonic missiles and having part of the Russian Navy just a few miles off of the U.S. coast isn't an optimal situation. Sen. Ted Cruz..." **[CRUZ: 'INSULTING’: Senate Republicans Say Biden Won’t Enforce Border Security Order:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "President Joe Biden’s upcoming executive order on the border is a political ploy to get more votes in the 2024 presidential election, Republican senators said at a press conference Tuesday morning. Biden is expected to announce executive actions on Tuesday to address the southern border crisis, though his previous orders have promoted open borders and allowed more than 8 million illegal migrants to enter the country. Biden had his entire presidency to secure the border, yet he waited to act until right before the election, Sen. Ted..." **[NICOLE RUSSELL: Ted Cruz Is Right—Men Must Be Kept Out Of Women's Prisons:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "To the left, codifying gender identity into laws like Title IX seems progressive and even altruistic. What about when it clashes with real-world scenarios that harm women? Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) pointed out this real-world question during a recent confirmation. The Biden administration nominated Judge Sarah Netburn to the Southern District of New York. Cruz questioned Netburn about why she chose to approve the transfer of a 6’2′′ male to a women’s prison after the criminal identified as transgender. The prisoner had been convicted of molesting..." **
** **[Sens. Cruz, Kaine Introduce Bipartisan Bill Ensuring Military Officers Receive Training On Constitution:](http://trk.tedcruz._BDcpamQ)** "U.S. Sens. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) and Tim Kaine (D-Va.), members of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, introduced the Constitutional Orientation Military Mandate Amplifying National Duty (COMMAND) Act, which ensures newly commissioned U.S. military officers receive training on the Constitution before reporting to their first operational assignment. Upon introduction, Sen. Cruz said, “Our military officers swear an oath to support and defend our Constitution. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The greatest lessons came from my father
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Happy Father’s Day,
Derek —

Today we honor our fathers and other figures who shaped us into who we are
today.

I want to take this moment to honor my greatest role model, my father, Ed
Schiff, aka “Boca Eddie.” He recently passed away at age 96. I’m missing
him a lot today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]Adam posing in a photo with his brother and father

I want to tell you about my dad. And I hope you’ll read along.

Originally from Boston, my father left high school early to join the Army
at the end of World War II. After his service, he used the GI Bill to
attend the University of Alabama but left early to get started in
business.

He chose the schmata — or clothing — business. Later, he got out of the
schmata business and bought a lumber yard, where he put me to work in the
summers.

My father taught me so much. When my dad was raising my brother Dan and
me, he taught us to believe that even when times are tough, you always
make sure to give back to your community.

He taught us to be good fathers, not by lecturing to us, but by showing us
how.

And he taught us to stand up to bullies. He taught us to never back down
from a fight when the cause is just — even when facing the toughest of
challenges.

These ideas have guided me throughout my life.

I found myself reflecting on his guidance during Donald Trump's
presidency, reminding myself not to yield to intimidation. Ultimately, I
realized that bullies are, in fact, cowards.

With my dad’s good advice always front of mind, I was able to take on
Donald Trump and hold him accountable for his abuses of power.

I’d like to think he’s proud of me. Just like I’m so, so proud of my
children, and the paths and lives that they’ve chosen for themselves.

I’m running for the United States Senate because everyone has the right to
a roof over their head. And all Americans should be able to put food on
the table and afford medication. And they shouldn’t have to live in fear
of a would-be dictator taking away their rights and freedoms.

My commitment to you is to keep up the fight for regular families just
like the one I grew up in. To uphold the great lessons my father taught me
— to do what I do best.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=june2024_abs_em.GGnUBV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]Now that you’ve learned about my father and how he’s motivated me, I
hope you will donate to my campaign to bring these values to the Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1008&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1009&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=june2024_abs_em.2hsoac&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1010&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240616_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=6720%2E5257348%2E7BYR1a ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

This is the first Father’s Day I’ve experienced without my dad. I’m
holding a special place in my thoughts for him and for those who have lost
their parents.

And I'm wishing you all a very Happy Father’s Day.

Thank you.

— Adam

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Happy Father’s Day, Derek — Today we honor our fathers and other figures who shaped us into who we are today. I want to take this moment to honor my greatest role model, my father, Ed Schiff, aka “Boca Eddie.” He recently passed away at age 96. I’m missing him a lot today. [ ]Adam posing in a photo with his brother and father I want to tell you about my dad. And I hope you’ll read along. Originally from Boston, my father left high school early to join the Army at the end of World War II. After his service, he used the GI Bill to attend the University of Alabama but left early to get started in business. He chose the schmata — or clothing — business. Later, he got out of the schmata business and bought a lumber yard, where he put me to work in the summers. My father taught me so much. When my dad was raising my brother Dan and me, he taught us to believe that even when times are tough, you always make sure to give back to your community. He taught us to be good fathers, not by lecturing to us, but by showing us how. And he taught us to stand up to bullies. He taught us to never back down from a fight when the cause is just — even when facing the toughest of challenges. These ideas have guided me throughout my life. I found myself reflecting on his guidance during Donald Trump's presidency, reminding myself not to yield to intimidation. Ultimately, I realized that bullies are, in fact, cowards. With my dad’s good advice always front of mind, I was able to take on Donald Trump and hold him accountable for his abuses of power. I’d like to think he’s proud of me. Just like I’m so, so proud of my children, and the paths and lives that they’ve chosen for themselves. I’m running for the United States Senate because everyone has the right to a roof over their head. And all Americans should be able to put food on the table and afford medication. And they shouldn’t have to live in fear of a would-be dictator taking away their rights and freedoms. My commitment to you is to keep up the fight for regular families just like the one I grew up in. To uphold the great lessons my father taught me — to do what I do best. [ ]Now that you’ve learned about my father and how he’s motivated me, I hope you will donate to my campaign to bring these values to the Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT This is the first Father’s Day I’ve experienced without my dad. I’m holding a special place in my thoughts for him and for those who have lost their parents. And I'm wishing you all a very Happy Father’s Day. Thank you. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E.
