name: Jon Hamm
subject: There’s an important race happening in my home state this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Hamm.
**There’s an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about.**
So before I ask you to support my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please let me explain why no one can afford to sit on the sidelines in this race.
**[Defeat Josh Hawley ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)**
Let’s start at the beginning. When I first got to know Lucas, his story resonated with me. He’s a born-and-raised Missourian who knows the real value of community — helping each other out, for better or for worse.
Growing up, his parents went bankrupt from his youngest sister’s medical bills and his family survived on the support of their friends and neighbors. After getting to college on a Pell Grant, Lucas decided to join the U.S. Marine Corps to honor the community that had given his family so much. He served for 13 years, including three deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan before later being stationed at the Pentagon.
Once he left active duty, Lucas turned his focus to the corrupt politicians and corporate monopolies that dominate our economy and squeeze small businesses. He took on everyone from Big Tech and Big Ag to defense contractors and pharmaceutical companies.
**Now, Lucas is running to defeat January 6th coward Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for real, everyday people.**
**[Elect Lucas Kunce ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)**
Let’s just be clear here: Hawley’s January 6th cowardice isn’t the only reason he’s incapable of representing my home state.
**Since he was elected to office, Josh Hawley hasn’t fought to bring even $0.01 back to our communities — but he’s had plenty of time to make money for himself.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)
While giant corporations strip our state of opportunity and jack up prices, Hawley is only focused on enriching himself. He’s made hundreds of thousands of dollars more than his congressional salary by selling his weird book all about “ _Manhood._ ”
**All this, while he made taxpayers cover the cost of his own lawbreaking.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)
Missouri can’t afford another six years of Hawley in the Senate, Peter, and voters of all stripes seem to agree.
**_Morning Consult_****reported that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Republican incumbent up for re-election this November.** And even Hawley’s own former mentor, Missouri’s three-term Republican U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was _“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”_
After spending a whole year consolidating support from workers, community leaders, and organizations across Missouri, Lucas Kunce has more than proved that he has what it takes to win this race. Multiple polls even confirm he’s in a dead heat with Hawley. That’s why I’m asking for your help, Peter:
[**Will you join me in supporting my friend Lucas Kunce by splitting a donation of any amount between his campaign and****Bob Casey****today? With so much at stake in this election — and with a race this close — no one can afford to sit on the sidelines.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)**
Lucas won’t be another shady, corrupt politician. He’s put his money where his mouth is since day one — refusing to accept any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives.
**He’s running to be a real warrior for working Missourians, unbeholden to anyone other than the everyday people who elected him to office.**
Lucas will fight for investment in our state — rebuilding forgotten communities, creating jobs, and empowering workers. He’ll stand up to the attacks on reproductive rights by controlling politicians like Hawley. He’ll work to end the corporate grip on power in our country, by banning insider trading and abolishing corporate PACs. And he’ll be accountable to real, everyday Missourians.
I can’t tell you how excited I am about everything we’ll be able to accomplish in Missouri with Lucas fighting for us in the Senate, Peter. But if we’re going to take advantage of this historic opportunity, Lucas urgently needs your help.
[**So please, will you split a donation of any amount between Lucas’ campaign and Bob Casey****right now so we can get Lucas’ unifying message in front of voters, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s Senate seat this year? Lucas is running a truly grassroots campaign, so anything you’re able to give really does make a big impact.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)**
Thanks for hearing me out,
Jon Hamm
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&refcode2=3276_552475_rf8onF&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3276%2E552475%2Erf8onF)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Paul Begala
subject: Listen up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I’ve been on both the winning and losing side, and here’s what I know for sure:
| | |
---
Listen up:
For decades, I have worked in politics electing Democrats in tough races across the country. I’ve been on both the winning and losing side, and here’s what I know for sure: **As PA goes, so goes the nation.**
Just look at the numbers: In 2016, 44,292 votes in PA propelled Donald Trump to his unexpected victory. Then, in 2020, Joe Biden clinched Pennsylvania’s 20 electoral votes by a narrow 1.17% margin, helping him secure the White House.
**Mark my words, 2024 will be no different, and Pennsylvania will once again be THE tipping point.**

So here’s a piece of expert advice for grassroots donors like you, friend: If we’re going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we must prioritize supporting Bob Casey in Pennsylvania. So please, if you can, split a donation between him and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell.
National Republicans know that if they flip this seat, they can flip the Senate, and they’re going to spend whatever it takes to do just that. Bob is up against a mega-millionaire who is already self-funding his campaign. So we need the resources to fight back.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Bob Casey by splitting a donation between his reelection campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s campaign. Whatever you can pitch in will make a big difference in a race this competitive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87018108/479761226/1958968719?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1372-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBkOWUzN2QtMDAyYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OHjzNpbghm-9_x7V5stM2rwBtns_wgR-MJq3ySnJR1w=)

[Click here to visit the site](https://substack.com/redirect/cf76e99d-a625-4168-8f0f-e1307fd9507b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[H5N1 Monitor](https://substack.com/redirect/cf76e99d-a625-4168-8f0f-e1307fd9507b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Global Disaster Briefs are your weekly (or more often, if needed) summaries and headlines from around the world about natural and man-made disasters, climate change, disease and health, and international conflict. See endnotes for resources used in putting this report together. Data is retrieved, analyzed and summarized on the day of publication unless otherwise noted.
* * *
### **Meteorological/Climatological**
#### Florida:
[Severe flooding](https://substack.com/redirect/9ce9f998-d22a-4ae3-b0c6-5ed777e34572?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last week dumped between 12 -- 28" of rain in areas of south Florida, trapping residents in their homes and cars despite earlier forecasts warning of [the record-breaking deluge](https://substack.com/redirect/9ce9f998-d22a-4ae3-b0c6-5ed777e34572?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
On average, Florida receives 54" of rainfall each year, though that figure varies greatly by geography, season, and [El Nino Southern Oscillation (ENSO)](https://substack.com/redirect/b8f79e60-6be3-4f66-908b-d8fe267228fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) phase. Currently, we are in an [ENSO neutral phase trending toward La Nina](https://substack.com/redirect/7f2f7227-aebe-4107-95eb-f066dc72214a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which historically brings bigger hurricanes but [less rainfall overall](https://substack.com/redirect/2f14c610-96ed-4624-8ec8-5d8965c8b9bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the US Southeast.
Just prior to the heavy rains last week,[ south Florida ](https://substack.com/redirect/f0f80d1b-7b20-4aa8-a465-85c24f35f9c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)was experiencing [moderate to severe drought](https://substack.com/redirect/8968c4bb-8314-4289-9f7c-21dbff98a9e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) conditions. Drought conditions preceding heavy rains[ can increase flooding ](https://substack.com/redirect/1f3a83d6-4f44-4ad8-92d1-6edbf298984a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)due to the hardened soils being less able to absorb water. My[ own research studying coastal land loss and hurricane impacts ](https://substack.com/redirect/c0e46a64-f311-479f-9254-72c36916eee4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)showed a strong link between summer heat and drought conditions and hurricane-induced land loss.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fbd3bdf4-86a4-48c9-b31c-66cd948993da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Florida continues to suffer the brunt of some of the most extreme ([and expensive](https://substack.com/redirect/907c9662-5104-42ef-85df-7ceb33e6a4da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) [impacts of climate change](https://substack.com/redirect/3e4c113e-1287-403b-ab27-95b1058c651c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- increases in the [frequency and intensity ](https://substack.com/redirect/4f2cc2a2-8575-4dde-9ca0-2808dd9581d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of severe weather, including hurricanes, as well as [sea level rise](https://substack.com/redirect/fdd53984-31aa-4063-a085-e328713f45f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [wildfires](https://substack.com/redirect/52bef181-115e-4320-bda9-a7212bb0a6a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [drought](https://substack.com/redirect/d34722eb-127d-4bf5-a3ca-43930dcf8123?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ([among other impacts](https://substack.com/redirect/e15b9d8a-6a16-4792-8ed7-bbd66c820d41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
> If you've suffered damages to your home or vehicle as a result of flooding in South Florida, [you can click here to file a claim.](https://substack.com/redirect/5b097aca-bbfe-48d4-b228-66996d3f7964?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Public lands must stay in public hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
As Chair of the Senate Interior Appropriations Subcommittee, I am in the driver’s seat to deliver on public lands priorities for Oregon.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87019037/479764461/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDNmYWMyZC0wMjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hQtIpS4hA1r6S2eVTsS2xrGQAubBB1RG5cubUF1zJbw=&emci=3a3fac2d-022c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=403fac2d-022c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=7731215)
---

| | From our high desert to our mountain ranges and beautiful coastline to the blue, pristine water of Crater Lake National Park, Oregon has over 30 million acres of some of the country's most breathtaking public lands. In my annual town halls in each of Oregon's 36 counties, I hear firsthand from folks about what matters most to them, and protecting our state's iconic public lands and waters is always a concern. Safeguarding the landscapes that make Oregon so special starts by listening to frontline communities on saying NO to gas drilling in public lands and waters and continuing to provide the resources to defend them. And unlike Republicans who want to expand mining operations, drill in the Arctic, and delist endangered species, Democrats are committed to fighting for our public lands. **As Chair of the Senate Interior Appropriations Subcommittee, I am in the driver's seat to deliver on these priorities for Oregon, and a recent bill I wrote and pushed to pass delivers critical funding for environmental programs, community-initiated projects, and Tribal communities that will benefit Oregonians in every corner of the state for years to come.** By funding outdoor recreation and conservation projects, we can create more jobs, grow economies, and keep our public lands accessible for all! Growing up in Oregon, I spent my childhood hiking and camping and enjoying Oregon's great outdoors, and I feel fortunate to be able to share those places with my own family. But with threats from development and climate chaos, we can't take it for granted that our public lands will always be in public hands. Your advocacy helps me secure the resources to protect our state's natural wonders, and we must continue to work together to ensure future generations of Oregonians are able to enjoy our incredible public lands. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Lanon Baccam
subject: Being a father is my most important job
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Hi Peter,

This Father’s Day is a special one because it’s also Freya’s birthday! She’s the sweetest girl and makes me proud everyday.

Freya has an insatiable curiosity, and we are always finding ways to learn and grow together. From her art projects (see her cool buttons below) to tinkering with engineering kits and old electronics, we’re always trying to figure out how things work.

https://secure.ngpvan.com/0E14lo3D20-nk7RGO_tLiQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0E14lo3D20-nk7RGO_tLiQ2]

Earlier this year we even combined engineering and art! We took a motor out of an old printer and wired it up to spin a frisbee inside of a box. We melted some crayons and poured it over the top. We layered up color by color and it came out pretty cool! What do you think?!?

https://secure.ngpvan.com/0E14lo3D20-nk7RGO_tLiQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0E14lo3D20-nk7RGO_tLiQ2]

This day and every day, I cherish the best job I have — being Freya’s dad. I’m committed now more than ever to fighting for her and all our kids to make this world a better place for them.

Happy Father’s Day. Thank you for joining us on this journey!

— Lanon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-june2024-fr-june?refcode=E9024-20240616-FathersDayCard-footer-Holiday&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-june2024-fr-june?refcode=E9024-20240616-FathersDayCard-footer-Holiday&amount=25]
Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. Right now, we have a real opportunity to flip this district from red to blue — but we need your help to finish this fight and take back the House in 2024.

clean_body: www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com] Hi Peter, This Father’s Day is a special one because it’s also Freya’s birthday! She’s the sweetest girl and makes me proud everyday. Freya has an insatiable curiosity, and we are always finding ways to learn and grow together. From her art projects (see her cool buttons below) to tinkering with engineering kits and old electronics, we’re always trying to figure out how things work. [] Earlier this year we even combined engineering and art! We took a motor out of an old printer and wired it up to spin a frisbee inside of a box. We melted some crayons and poured it over the top. We layered up color by color and it came out pretty cool! What do you think?!? [] This day and every day, I cherish the best job I have — being Freya’s dad. I’m committed now more than ever to fighting for her and all our kids to make this world a better place for them. Happy Father’s Day. Thank you for joining us on this journey! — Lanon [] Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. Right now, we have a real opportunity to flip this district from red to blue — but we need your help to finish this fight and take back the House in 2024. DONATE » [] Lanon's campaign to flip Iowa's Third Congressional District and take back the House is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We want to make sure you're getting our latest updates, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can click here to unsubscribe: . name: Cecile Richards
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is critical to the fight for reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87019771/479766733/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE0NmE0Yi0wMzJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRIUs_Zje36tllxIkjeq54cRpa1k9LWESFr6Wy_fGjo=)
With Nevada’s general election officially underway, [**I just had to reach out to you personally to ask for your support for Jacky Rosen’s reelection campaign, friend.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87019772/479766734/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE0NmE0Yi0wMzJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRIUs_Zje36tllxIkjeq54cRpa1k9LWESFr6Wy_fGjo=)
As the president of Planned Parenthood, I saw firsthand the devastating impact of laws passed to control women's bodies. Since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , these cruel attacks have only escalated.
**There's no doubt in my mind that Republicans will do everything they can to pass a nationwide abortion ban if they retake Senate control. **Mitch McConnell even personally recruited Sam Brown to run for Senate in Nevada. He’s a Trump-endorsed Republican who has a long record of opposing abortion rights, and he even supported an extreme abortion ban in Texas with no exceptions for rape or incest.
**The best way to stop them is to support my friend Jacky Rosen in her critical reelection campaign in Nevada.**
That’s why I’m reaching out today: **With Jacky officially facing off against MAGA extremist Sam Brown in the general election, she needs urgent support to defend her seat, our Senate majority, and the future of reproductive freedom in our country. I’m all in to help her win, and I hope you are, too.**
**[So please, will you join me in supporting Jacky Rosen today and help keep both Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87019773/479766735/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE0NmE0Yi0wMzJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRIUs_Zje36tllxIkjeq54cRpa1k9LWESFr6Wy_fGjo=)**
It’s not just Democrats who know how important Jacky’s race is. The GOP’s dark money donors – including the Koch network – have been spending big in Nevada to defeat her. Now, _The Cook Political Report_ is calling Nevada the "most perilous” battleground for Democrats after already downgrading Jacky’s chances of winning to “Toss Up.”
That’s why Jacky is counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her defend Nevada’s must-win seat. And now that her primary is over and we are sprinting to November, this is a crucial moment to help her win the tough fight ahead.
**So please, friend, I’m personally asking:[Will you donate $5 now – or however much you can – to keep Democrats in control of Nevada and the Senate? When it comes to protecting reproductive freedom in America, this race couldn’t be more important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87019774/479766736/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE0NmE0Yi0wMzJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRIUs_Zje36tllxIkjeq54cRpa1k9LWESFr6Wy_fGjo=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87019775/479766737/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk3976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE0NmE0Yi0wMzJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRIUs_Zje36tllxIkjeq54cRpa1k9LWESFr6Wy_fGjo=)

Cecile Richards

name: 1776 Club
subject: This is your LAST chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The 1776 Club is a group of patriots who REFUSE to let the Left destroy our values and take our country from us without a fight
Will you continue the Founders' legacy?

|
---
| | |

name: Mike Thompson
subject: to our amazing fathers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

This Father's Day, let’s take a moment to reflect on the fathers, step-fathers, grandfathers, uncles, brothers, and friends who have had an instrumental role in our lives— making us into who we are today.

As a dad, I can attest that we play a crucial role in shaping our kids, while they, in turn, contribute to our growth and learning every day. Witnessing my two boys evolve into the exceptional men and fathers they are today has been truly extraordinary.

If you cannot be with your father today, please take the time to reminisce on the meaningful memories you share.

Happy Father's Day Peter,

Mike Thompson

name: Eileen Filler-Corn
subject: Can you read this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eileen for Congress
body:
Today, my kids are now young adults, but my role as a mom on a mission continues

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87020016/479768072/-251521198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0YjVkMC0wNDJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHyuI8oC9bohe3oG8BxqC3OE1DEjD4ei3VKUgRY-ljU=&emci=1cebd37f-842a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=11d4b5d0-042c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=18286155) | Hi Peter, **“Mom on a mission.”** This is what people have called me since 1996, after my kids and I were car-jacked in a parking lot when they were just six months and two years old. I will always carry that memory with me – being a young mother whose babies were still strapped into their car seats at risk of being driven away by an armed robber. We came out okay, but that day spurred me to speak out and take action. I worked alongside other moms who were passionate about ending gun violence, and in 2000 we organized the Million Mom March. Fast forward to 2010, I won a special election to the House of Delegates to bring a progressive voice to Richmond on gun violence prevention. Then in 2020, I proudly became the first woman and person of Jewish faith elected as Speaker of the House of Delegates. **Today, my kids are now young adults, but my role as a mom on a mission continues.** I’m running for Congress to bring my expertise and passion for common sense gun violence prevention to Washington. I’m running to fight back against attacks on voting rights and threats to our democracy. And, I’m running to ensure that the reproductive rights that previous generations fought for — and won — are restored in our country. But in order to tackle the great challenges that lie ahead, I’m first counting on my team of grassroots supporters to fuel my campaign ahead of the primary — **which is this Tuesday!** [_**Peter, will you donate $25 or more to my campaign for Congress? Every donation matters in this final push!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87020017/479768073/-167990570?refcode=E9016-20240616-MomOnAMission-SL-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0YjVkMC0wNDJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHyuI8oC9bohe3oG8BxqC3OE1DEjD4ei3VKUgRY-ljU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87020018/479768074/-167990570?express_lane=true&&refcode=E9016-20240616-MomOnAMission-EG-CandidateBio&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0YjVkMC0wNDJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHyuI8oC9bohe3oG8BxqC3OE1DEjD4ei3VKUgRY-ljU=)

clean_body: Today, my kids are now young adults, but my role as a mom on a mission continues | | Hi Peter, “Mom on a mission.” This is what people have called me since 1996, after my kids and I were car-jacked in a parking lot when they were just six months and two years old. I will always carry that memory with me – being a young mother whose babies were still strapped into their car seats at risk of being driven away by an armed robber. We came out okay, but that day spurred me to speak out and take action. I worked alongside other moms who were passionate about ending gun violence, and in 2000 we organized the Million Mom March. Fast forward to 2010, I won a special election to the House of Delegates to bring a progressive voice to Richmond on gun violence prevention. Then in 2020, I proudly became the first woman and person of Jewish faith elected as Speaker of the House of Delegates. Today, my kids are now young adults, but my role as a mom on a mission continues. I’m running for Congress to bring my expertise and passion for common sense gun violence prevention to Washington. I’m running to fight back against attacks on voting rights and threats to our democracy. And, I’m running to ensure that the reproductive rights that previous generations fought for — and won — are restored in our country. But in order to tackle the great challenges that lie ahead, I’m first counting on my team of grassroots supporters to fuel my campaign ahead of the primary — which is this Tuesday! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = It takes a village to run for Congress, and I truly couldn’t be more grateful for your support. Sincerely yours, Eileen Filler-Corn

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Running this race for my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
https://www.trisha4colorado.com [https://www.trisha4colorado.com]
Peter,
This is my first Father’s Day without my old man, and I have to say that it gets harder before it gets easier.
But my dad is the reason I’m running. He was kind, brilliant, and strong: He was one of you .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_061624_FathersDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_061624_FathersDay]
My dad and I at Denver Zoo.
Before he passed, my dad urged me to run. He was the city attorney of Sterling, a member of the civil service, and a traditional law-and-order conservative.
Last year, both of my parents passed away from cancer within days of each other. Thanks to my union having my back, I was able to be there.
I know firsthand that seniors like my dad depend on government-funded healthcare programs and benefits. That’s why, in Congress, I will fight against any proposal that raises the retirement age or cuts Social Security and Medicare benefits.
I miss debating with my dad. I miss sharing my ideas, triumphs, and stumbles with him. I miss his laugh.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_061624_FathersDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_061624_FathersDay]
I used to stand on my dad’s shoes to dance to Billy Ray Cyrus. Now, help me stand on his shoulders and carry on his legacy. Please consider donating what you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_061624_FathersDay]

clean_body: It all comes down to turnout | Hi, Derek — There's one cardinal rule in retail politics: At the end of the day, it all comes down to voter turnout. The best-laid plans, award-winning ads, strong policy positions, and even exceptional candidates can all come to nothing if voters don't vote on Election Day. That's why we're burning the midnight oil to get Democratic voters across the Commonwealth to vote on Tuesday: Primary day. With 2024 the most consequential election in at least a generation, we must have an unprecedented turnout of grassroots Democrats on Tuesday. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = The dangers we face in Virginia are real, Derek. clean_body: Critical new poll just dropped Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Team, you read that right. Janelle Stelson and Scott Perry are neck and neck. A NEW public poll just dropped showing Janelle and Perry virtually tied for PA-10. This is a HUGE deal. Pundits and journalists alike are going to see this poll and understand that Janelle is a serious contender to take on Scott Perry. Following Donald Trump’s conviction, the latest poll puts Janelle just ONE PERCENTAGE POINT behind Scott Perry. Central Pennsylvania voters are saying what we’ve been saying all along — Scott Perry is NOT popular and voters don’t want to reelect someone who fraternizes with convicted criminals. We need to take advantage of the momentum we have. Janelle Stelson has a real shot at officially BEATING Scott Perry on Election Day — and the polls agree with us. We have a real shot at electing a leader who ACTUALLY cares about Central Pennsylvania, democracy, and women’s rights (a.k.a. everything Perry is against). That leader is Janelle Stelson. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Stelson | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. His propaganda campaign finally moved the needle. If we don't do something now, this will only get worse. 2% may seem like nothing, but we can't afford to trail behind Ruben. 2% can become 3%, which can become 5%, you get the picture. The further ahead in the polls he is, the more money the left will throw at him, and the more ads he will run depicting himself as a "moderate" despite his 100% radical record in Congress. This is why my midnight deadline is so important. I want to launch a HUGE ad campaign that will show the people of Arizona the TRUTH about radical Ruben Gallego. We can't afford to let Joe Biden keep the Senate and give him another radical ally in Ruben Gallego. They would destroy this country and sell YOU out to the Liberal Establishment in a heartbeat. The road to the Senate Majority and the Presidency runs right through Arizona. I'm counting on your support. name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: The most important title to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=%2FpEeywhU7G8ul25Ous4nV4kvVYhpTB41mFaMYn60knyTxHfF2raHLsEiEMUNNcQDBdI8RABmPp%2BQw7jq%2BwqzqXkkc0dfuF3Tem8ZOOK6Uy2UqCMvuKpMMTzHctPb7U7zoHO05Rodl1cxtRMHMqR1QYyporA4XiqxFkeloZe5dnFnGNOtoON0XMl4m70Kezgc%2BXD1QA2vEvvbkdUtXeTzS5lUOWwcBRv%2FepCzlxsy5roHgSze3veHOak7QBhNI37T9aww3gEam%2B4w0uZknl8IJgLKHgM0BuWHj5DmeEAT6PjbuSD2XG4irCxX1qHnG%2BNOCu0bLRQ2Y5Ip1p%2FNPv7%2B6WIlyidTdlLSH%2FRo%2BhCdX42WFvMBPkzjmW0LvgVftAmKTwFIXjWI%2FjzAjlqpt1589prFdcSpMh%2FEeRKdESKyu%2BoktzD9j2IhFy1nSVGk%2F%2BbX]

# [#]
# [#]Hi, it’s Dr. Raul Ruiz. I wanted to reach out and wish you and your family a happy Father’s Day!

As a physician and a Congressman, I wear a lot of hats — but the two most important titles to me are “dad” and “husband.”

My daughters, Sage and Sky, are the best parts of my life. They are a constant source of joy, and I’m lucky and proud to be their dad every single day — and I’m so grateful that my wife Monica always empowers me to be the best father I can be to them.

I take the pride I feel in my family into the halls of Congress. As a member of the Congressional Dads Caucus, I’m on the frontlines of the fight for paid family leave, paid family medical leave, and child care.

I hope you and your family have a restful Father’s Day and get to spend quality time with the ones you love.

— Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

body:
We want to file a report that will take the wind out of Republican sails and ruins their convention. | |
---
Derek -- In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a donation directly to the DNC before our FEC fundraising deadline ends. **Please give us a chance to explain why this deadline is not like any other, and why your donation is so important.** Here is the truth: As you know, when these FEC fundraising deadlines end, we have to report how much money we've raised and the number of donations we receive is public as well. It’s a number everyone watches and the press reports on. But what makes this FEC deadline unique is that it is the last one before the Republican National Convention. The last one before Republicans gather in one place to plot out their plans for November. The last one before Trump accepts the Republican nomination. And we want to file a report that will take the wind out of their sails and ruin their convention. But it will take lots of Democrats stepping up before our deadline to make it happen. clean_body: We want to file a report that will take the wind out of Republican sails and ruins their convention. | | Derek -- In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a donation directly to the DNC before our FEC fundraising deadline ends. Please give us a chance to explain why this deadline is not like any other, and why your donation is so important. Here is the truth: As you know, when these FEC fundraising deadlines end, we have to report how much money we've raised and the number of donations we receive is public as well. It’s a number everyone watches and the press reports on. But what makes this FEC deadline unique is that it is the last one before the Republican National Convention. The last one before Republicans gather in one place to plot out their plans for November. The last one before Trump accepts the Republican nomination. And we want to file a report that will take the wind out of their sails and ruin their convention. But it will take lots of Democrats stepping up before our deadline to make it happen. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | We'll put your donation right to work electing Democrats up and down the ballot. clean_body: | Hi Peter, it’s the DOTL team reaching out to let you know that your Democratic Supporter membership has officially expired. Unfortunately, this news comes at the worst time: Donald Trump is shooting ahead of Biden in multiple polls and winning in the majority of battleground states -despite his GUILTY verdict! Peter, the continuation of memberships like yours are critical to our Biden re-election strategy because low Democratic support = a corrupt 2024 Trump presidency! = | ****=** We hope we can count on you, The Democracy On The Line Team FWD \------------------------------------------- We asked you... name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: Don't let the latest Supreme Court ruling fool you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

Thanks,
Kurt

I just got off the phone with my campaign team, and I need to be upfront about our situation. **_[We’re just hours away from our critical mid-June deadline, and we’re falling short of where we need to be. It’s not an impossible number to reach, but it will take a huge effort from all of us to hit our goal. So, I have to ask: will you chip in any amount today? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87021793/479775153/209297649?refcode=ea.1f25eb45-0a2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.1f25eb45-0a2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjI1ZWI0NS0wYTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mA03IPJDwXNYxzxxK6UePiWbeTaNtgEpojWKS72gQ2Y=)_** | [**CHIP IN >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87021794/479775154/209297649?refcode=ea.1f25eb45-0a2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.1f25eb45-0a2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjI1ZWI0NS0wYTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mA03IPJDwXNYxzxxK6UePiWbeTaNtgEpojWKS72gQ2Y=)

Let me break down why your support matters:
1. **It sends a message to Marsha Blackburn and the GOP establishment that, no matter how much cash they pour in from special interests and bigwigs, our people-powered campaign stands strong.**

2. **It helps us maintain our momentum. We’ve cut Marsha Blackburn’s lead by 6 points and are leading among women voters 49% to 43%. We can't let up now!**

3. **It enables us to spread our message to voters and rally even more support across Tennessee. We’re opening offices across the state to meet voters where they are, but Marsha Blackburn and her far-right allies are trying to drown us out with their corporate PAC money. With your help, we can fight back.**

Together, we can keep pushing forward, counter the extreme GOP agenda, and win this race for Tennessee. **_[So please, chip in any amount right now to help us close our mid-June budget gap and keep our momentum going!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87021796/479775155/209297649?refcode=ea.1f25eb45-0a2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.1f25eb45-0a2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjI1ZWI0NS0wYTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mA03IPJDwXNYxzxxK6UePiWbeTaNtgEpojWKS72gQ2Y=)_**

clean_body: (it’s bad news) | I just got off the phone with my campaign team, and I need to be upfront about our situation. = | = Let me break down why your support matters: 1. It sends a message to Marsha Blackburn and the GOP establishment that, no matter how much cash they pour in from special interests and bigwigs, our people-powered campaign stands strong. 2. It helps us maintain our momentum. We’ve cut Marsha Blackburn’s lead by 6 points and are leading among women voters 49% to 43%. We can't let up now! 3. It enables us to spread our message to voters and rally even more support across Tennessee. We’re opening offices across the state to meet voters where they are, but Marsha Blackburn and her far-right allies are trying to drown us out with their corporate PAC money. With your help, we can fight back. Together, we can keep pushing forward, counter the extreme GOP agenda, and win this race for Tennessee. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Glenn Boysko
subject: What I want for Father’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Boysko for Congress
body:
https://www.mobilize.us/jenniferboysko/ [https://www.mobilize.us/jenniferboysko/]
Peter, it’s Glenn Boysko, Jennifer’s husband. I’m not much for emails, so I’ll make this quick.
Jennifer and I have two daughters, and all I want for Father’s Day is for them to have the right to live their lives as they choose - that includes having the right to determine whether and when to start a family.
https://www.mobilize.us/jenniferboysko/ [https://www.mobilize.us/jenniferboysko/]
Republicans don’t want my daughters to have those rights, which is a large part of why Jennifer is running for Congress. As a Father’s Day gift to all dads of daughters, will you click here and volunteer for Jennifer’s campaign? [https://www.mobilize.us/jenniferboysko/]
Thanks, Peter. And happy Father’s Day!
Glenn Boysko
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/boysko_foundingdonor?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/boysko_foundingdonor?amount=25]I'm Jennifer Boysko, and I'm running for Congress in Virginia’s 10th District.
After winning an against-the-odds campaign for the General Assembly and serving in the House of Delegates, I was elected to the Virginia Senate in 2019. In Richmond, I’ve taken on – and won — Virginia’s toughest fights for women, families, the LGBTQ community, and animals by bringing people together and never giving up. I intend to do the same in Washington.
As we look towards the primary election, I need your support. Will you chip in $25 or any amount to help get our campaign off to a strong start? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/boysko_foundingdonor?refcode=061224_1]

subject: Fauci and Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Our country deserves leaders who are not afraid to speak the truth and demand accountability.

|

Dear Peter,
In a time when transparency and accountability are more crucial than ever, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is leading the charge to hold those in power responsible.
Recent testimony Dr. Anthony Fauci highlighted the urgent need for leadership that prioritizes truth and the well-being of the American people.
Fauci has confirmed many things we already knew but were once considered "conspiracy." We know without a doubt where COVID came from, we know six feet of social distancing was never based on science, and severe vaccine injuries are widespread.
Most recently, _The Washington Post_ had to admit they were wrong to discredit the truth of Fauci funding dog abuse for experiments in Tunisia.
RFK Jr. has long been a vocal advocate for government and media freedom. He has consistently called out the failures and missteps of those who have mishandled the COVID-19 pandemic, including both Fauci and Donald Trump.
Our country deserves leaders who are not afraid to speak the truth and demand accountability.
RFK Jr. has been at the forefront of this fight, challenging the narratives and decisions that have affected millions of lives. His commitment to uncovering the truth and advocating for the American people sets him apart in this presidential race.
Team Kennedy's next critical FEC deadline is June 30th, and your contribution is essential to keeping this momentum going.
By donating to our campaign, you are supporting a candidate who is not afraid to stand up to the establishment and fight for what's right. Together, we can bring about the change our country desperately needs.
When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is president, government records will be open and ready for review. Budgets will be available to the exact penny on the digital blockchain, and _all documents about the COVID-19 pandemic will be released on Day 1_.
[With your support, Team Kennedy will change the course of history and bring transparent leadership to the White House!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_testimony_6_16_24_rs_nd1&n=3)

clean_body: Our country deserves leaders who are not afraid to speak the truth and demand accountability. | | | | | Dear Peter, In a time when transparency and accountability are more crucial than ever, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is leading the charge to hold those in power responsible. Recent testimony Dr. Anthony Fauci highlighted the urgent need for leadership that prioritizes truth and the well-being of the American people. Fauci has confirmed many things we already knew but were once considered "conspiracy." We know without a doubt where COVID came from, we know six feet of social distancing was never based on science, and severe vaccine injuries are widespread. Most recently, The Washington Post had to admit they were wrong to discredit the truth of Fauci funding dog abuse for experiments in Tunisia. RFK Jr. has long been a vocal advocate for government and media freedom. He has consistently called out the failures and missteps of those who have mishandled the COVID-19 pandemic, including both Fauci and Donald Trump. Our country deserves leaders who are not afraid to speak the truth and demand accountability. RFK Jr. has been at the forefront of this fight, challenging the narratives and decisions that have affected millions of lives. His commitment to uncovering the truth and advocating for the American people sets him apart in this presidential race. Team Kennedy's next critical FEC deadline is June 30th, and your contribution is essential to keeping this momentum going. By donating to our campaign, you are supporting a candidate who is not afraid to stand up to the establishment and fight for what's right. Together, we can bring about the change our country desperately needs. When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is president, government records will be open and ready for review. Budgets will be available to the exact penny on the digital blockchain, and all documents about the COVID-19 pandemic will be released on Day 1. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’d like to know what you think
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Ruben here.
I wanted to thank you for sticking with me during a pretty intense mid-month push. It means a lot, especially as we approach the most important FEC deadline of this campaign (so far) at the end of the month.
And I wanted to make one more request, before the weekend is over.
My team puts together surveys from time to time to understand what our supporters think are the most important issues facing Arizona and the country. These help me out a lot — both to run an effective campaign, and eventually to be a better Senator. Much as I’d like to, I can’t ask every single one of you for five minutes to chat. But these surveys give me a good picture of what you’re thinking about.
[**So, it’d be a huge help today if you could take a few minutes and fill out this survey. Use this link, or click the button here.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/issues_survey_2024_june_/?source=em240616-2-160&akid=2488%2E734936%2EEsLbzC)
[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/issues_survey_2024_june_/?source=em240616-2-160&akid=2488%2E734936%2EEsLbzC)
Thanks again,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=2488%2E734936%2EEsLbzC). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2488%2E734936%2EEsLbzC). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=2488_734936_EsLbzC&akid=2488%2E734936%2EEsLbzC)

name: Joyce Craig
subject: we were outraised by Ayotte
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joyce Craig for NH
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87023314/479780202/47545062?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024_header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE0ZjY3NS0wZTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9CeFQs0yNT3rk5jVOJb2U6RsnIldsWK-V_rwz0IN6I=)
---
Peter, I want you to understand the stakes of tomorrow’s public filing deadline:
1. Last deadline, we were outraised by Kelly Ayotte.
2. My MAGA opponent Kelly Ayotte brought in a record-setting fundraising haul – primarily from extreme GOP mega-donor contributions.
3. Cook Political Report rated this race a pure “toss-up” and polling shows I’m in a statistical tie against Ayotte.

But I'm no stranger to tough races – I flipped Manchester’s mayoral seat blue for the first time in nearly 15 years.

From that, I learned that the key is to build a strong, grassroots team that is determined to push New Hampshire forward. With enough supporters chipping in, organizing, and spreading our message across New Hampshire, we can flip this seat blue.

Kelly Ayotte’s average donation this year was more than $2,000. That’s not a typo.

That’s why I need our grassroots supporters to step up today.

[**_So I’m asking 100 of our top supporters – including you, Peter – to chip in $50, our average grassroots donation, to help our people-powered campaign take on Ayotte and the National Republicans trying to buy this seat. Can I count on you, Peter?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87023315/479780203/41188070?amount=50&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.16_deadline-1day_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE0ZjY3NS0wZTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9CeFQs0yNT3rk5jVOJb2U6RsnIldsWK-V_rwz0IN6I=) [__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87023316/479780204/41188070?amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.16_deadline-1day_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE0ZjY3NS0wZTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9CeFQs0yNT3rk5jVOJb2U6RsnIldsWK-V_rwz0IN6I=) | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87023317/479780205/41188070?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.16_deadline-1day_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE0ZjY3NS0wZTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9CeFQs0yNT3rk5jVOJb2U6RsnIldsWK-V_rwz0IN6I=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I want you to understand the stakes of tomorrow’s public filing deadline: 1. Last deadline, we were outraised by Kelly Ayotte. 2. My MAGA opponent Kelly Ayotte brought in a record-setting fundraising haul – primarily from extreme GOP mega-donor contributions. 3. Cook Political Report rated this race a pure “toss-up” and polling shows I’m in a statistical tie against Ayotte. But I'm no stranger to tough races – I flipped Manchester’s mayoral seat blue for the first time in nearly 15 years. From that, I learned that the key is to build a strong, grassroots team that is determined to push New Hampshire forward. With enough supporters chipping in, organizing, and spreading our message across New Hampshire, we can flip this seat blue. Kelly Ayotte’s average donation this year was more than $2,000. That’s not a typo. That’s why I need our grassroots supporters to step up today. = = | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, Joyce | = | = = Joyce Craig for NH PO Box 3893 Manchester, NH 03105 United States | mailto:info@joycecraig.org Paid for by Joyce Craig for NH. Patricia Cornell, Treasurer. P.O. Box 3893, Manchester NH, 03105

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Meet the MAGA Senate candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The Republican roster of mega-wealthy, out-of-state, self-funding millionaires
| Friend — in Wisconsin, they’re running a guy from California.

In Montana, they’re running a guy from Minnesota.

In Michigan, they’re running a guy from Florida.

In Pennsylvania, they’re running a guy from Connecticut. (At least this time, it’s not New Jersey).

Trump and his MAGA acolytes love to brag about representing the “real” America, but as far as their Senate candidates are concerned, the only “real” thing they need is a bunch of zeros at the end of their personal checking accounts.

Republican candidates are so unpopular with donors, Mitch McConnell and his allies prioritized recruiting candidates who could empty their wallets to buy battleground Senate seats. And that’s exactly what they’re attempting to do.

[Friend, will you chip in a split donation between Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help me keep California’s seat blue and defeat the out-of-state multimillionaires that Republicans are running to flip Senate seats from blue to red? This is just wrong.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70320?t=6&akid=15136%2E878179%2EmBwiNg) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70321?t=7&akid=15136%2E878179%2EmBwiNg)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70322?t=8&akid=15136%2E878179%2EmBwiNg)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70323?t=9&akid=15136%2E878179%2EmBwiNg)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70324?t=10&akid=15136%2E878179%2EmBwiNg)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70320?t=11&akid=15136%2E878179%2EmBwiNg)
Just when you think that Republicans can’t possibly get any more out of touch, they prove that there is no low to which they won’t steep in their desperate attempts to seize power.

With your small contribution of support today, they won’t. Thank you for chipping in.

— Adam

| | Peter, When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ two years ago, abortion wasn’t the only right that came under attack. In the months that followed, conservative lawmakers threatened same-sex marriage, access to in vitro fertilization, and more. That’s because _Roe_ protected our fundamental freedom to make intimate decisions about our lives, free from interference by politicians. While Democrats in Congress are fighting to protect access to IVF, Republicans are actively working against it. **Just last week, Kirsten’s opponent, Juan Ciscomani, blocked guaranteed IVF access for 32,000 Arizonans.** [**This is so much bigger than just abortion. In office, Kirsten will fight nonstop to protect our basic freedoms, including access to reproductive care. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade two years ago, abortion wasn’t the only right that came under attack. In the months that followed, conservative lawmakers threatened same-sex marriage, access to in vitro fertilization, and more. That’s because Roe protected our fundamental freedom to make intimate decisions about our lives, free from interference by politicians. While Democrats in Congress are fighting to protect access to IVF, Republicans are actively working against it. Just last week, Kirsten’s opponent, Juan Ciscomani, blocked guaranteed IVF access for 32,000 Arizonans. = Parents deserve the right to start a family when and how they want. Kirsten’s opponent is a proud Christian nationalist who has repeatedly voted to restrict access to reproductive care. Arizona deserves better. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = = = | = = = | | = = = | = = = | | Thank you, Team Engel | | | = Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country.= | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | |

clean_body: How we can regain our momentum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, it’s Emma Larsen, Valerie’s campaign manager. I’ll be honest, this is NOT the news I wanted to share today: We fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal. We’ve got 24 hours to close the gap, and Valerie is counting on supporters like you to help make up the ground:= | = We need to look stronger than ever when our FEC reports go public, but unfortunately, that is not the case right now. If people see that our numbers are slowing down, they will think Valerie is too. But, , Peter, that is far from the truth. Every dollar is crucial to our efforts to surge ahead, reach more voters, and re-elect Valerie. The bottom line is that we cannot afford to miss our fundraising goals right now. Let’s band together and make our front stronger than ever. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = There’s too much at stake to fall behind right now. But I know that this team will come through when we need it most and boost Valerie’s campaign ahead just in time for the FEC deadline. name: Jason Call (Jill Stein 2024)
subject: I missed my son’s graduation last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=1)
---
Peter

I’ve never made a big deal out of Father’s Day. It’s always been a Hallmark Holiday to me – just another excuse for rampant consumerism.

But this year, Father’s Day does hit a little different.

My youngest graduated from high school last week, and I wasn’t there.

I gave up being part of this milestone with him to be on the campaign trail with Dr. Jill Stein – fighting to end genocide, empire, and capitalism.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=2)
---
I hated to miss this moment, and I’m glad my daughter, his sister, was able to be with him in my place.

**We had a long talk about it. Trey knows how proud of him I am. He also knows how important this political journey is.

** My kids have been part of my activist journey their entire lives.

I protested the Iraq war with my daughter strapped to my back.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=3)
---
Years later, my son came to protests with me to carry the message on.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=4)
---
I became an activist because I abhor violence and injustice to my very core. **All I’ve ever wanted is a world where all of us can coexist, united in our humanity and able to enjoy all of the beauty that makes life worth living.

** The moment I became a dad, the urgency of that work went to a whole new level. Now I was fighting for _their_ future, and the future of kids everywhere.

Today, while most Americans are celebrating with cards and giving out gifts like novelty t-shirts and dad gadgets, I sit here thousands of miles away from my own kids fighting a political machine for a shot at justice.

Today, I’m thinking of the children of Gaza who no longer have their fathers.

Today, I’m thinking of the fathers of Gaza who no longer have their children.

Giving up graduation day isn’t much of a sacrifice compared to what we’re fighting for...and I know my son understands that.
---
I’ve been fighting for climate justice my entire life because I know that change is mandatory – _and I also know it is possible._
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=5)
---
In my 35 years of activism, I’ve watched the twin evils of capitalism and war strip our planet of its natural resources and strip our people of our humanity and dignity.

In one sense I have never been more fearful of what the future holds for them. In another sense, I have never been more inspired by the ingenuity, determination, and commitment of young organizers today.

Our children deserve everything. Every opportunity to thrive and fulfill their destiny. They are the reason I fight so hard.

No, I’m not celebrating Father’s Day today. I am recommitting myself to fighting for them.

In solidarity,

Jason Call
Campaign Manager
Jill Stein 2024
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=6 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathers_day&n=6)
---

body:
But until Dad shares some sausage from the grill, MOM is my favorite parent!
| | |
---
**Husky Father's Day, friend!! **I just finished a game of fetch with Dad, and he really is the best I could ever ask fur — no wonder he gets a whole day of love and treats!
(I don't know why he wouldn't just cash in for belly scritches ... _but_ _to each their own, I pup-pose._)
But when I went inside for water, he started up the grill to fix some meats for the human side of the family. And sniff this: Even after he said I was "_such a good girl_ ," **he TRAPPED me inside so he wouldn’t have to "**_worry about the food disappearing." _**NOT COOL, DAD.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87025300/479786824/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1364-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzNkZDY5NzUtMTUyYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hXyn8BkP7Xs9YNHYpvQi5Ka9KRV9rjUAKR5rFttUobA=)
To quote my mom, Debbie, I say _e-ruff is e-ruff_ _—_**so until he sees the err-_RRRR_ of his ways, MOM is my favorite parent now. **_Howl about that?_
**That's why I'm reaching out to see if you'll help her fetch the last 6% gap left to her $700,000 goal from last night.** She's been so stressed about falling behind her stinkin'-rich opponent's cash that she hasn't been able to fully enjoy Dad's special day — let alone take me for another walk!
_(And if we reach it before the end of the day, there might even be a fresh hot grilled sausage in it for me _🥵 _... whether Dad likes it or not.)_
**So since I can't put the puppy eyes on Dad, I'm begging you, friend: [Will you _PLEASE PRETTY PLEASE_ throw my mom, Debbie, a bone (or at least a few bucks) to help her finish out her mid-month goal strong, send Rick Scott to the pound, and flip Florida's seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87025301/479786825/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1364-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzNkZDY5NzUtMTUyYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hXyn8BkP7Xs9YNHYpvQi5Ka9KRV9rjUAKR5rFttUobA=)**

That's why I'm reaching out to see if you'll help her fetch the last 6% gap left to her $700,000 goal from last night. She's been so stressed about falling behind her stinkin'-rich opponent's cash that she hasn't been able to fully enjoy Dad's special day — let alone take me for another walk! (And if we reach it before the end of the day, there might even be a fresh hot grilled sausage in it for me 🥵 ... whether Dad likes it or not.) So since I can't put the puppy eyes on Dad, I'm begging you, friend: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks so much fur all your yelp — husky Father's Day again! Belly-rubs and kisses, 🐾 (Kali Mucarsel-Powell) | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: ⚠️ CRITICAL: ELECTION INTEGRITY IS AT STAKE
body:
We're tackling election integrity head-on. Be part of the solution. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9a4bc05a9f&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=98c168e812&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
CONCERNED ABOUT ELECTION
INTEGRITY IN OHIO?
YOU SHOULD BE!
WHERE TO GO TO KNOW WHY!**

---
|
Election Integrity is a concern for many Ohioans. Our Secretary of State, Frank LaRose, tells us Ohio holds "gold standard" elections. Nothing could be further from the truth!

We must be educated on the weaknesses, vulnerability, and ways Ohio's voting systems can be compromised. Then, we must help others to understand and take action.

Education is the first step, so here are 3 sources of Ohio election integrity information that you should bookmark & check frequently:

[**Ohio Election Integrity News**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d78e260bf1&e=5c740fa3e2)
This is a GFI effort. Go to the webpage [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d2bbd59f98&e=5c740fa3e2) to find a regularly-updated listing of election integrity news & resources important for Ohioans to know & know about. This was launched today, Sunday June 16th, and is a work in progress by many volunteers. If you have something you feel should be added, call or text Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599 (cell).

[**The Ohio Election Integrity Network (OEIN)**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e26d6576f8&e=5c740fa3e2)
OEIN is a statewide team of volunteers working to ensure our elections are fair & accurate, conforming to all current state & federal laws.

OEIN needs more volunteers. They need your help. To do your part go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4a236beb57&e=5c740fa3e2) and get on their mailing list!

[**Ohio4Truth.com**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=73953c3ae3&e=5c740fa3e2)
Ohio4Truth.com is a site that's "Sharing the Truth about Ohio Elections by Citizen Volunteer Researchers". It's an absolute encyclopedia of information and data that proves just how poorly our elections are run in Ohio. This is a "must bookmark" website.
######
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=65d67f4dcf&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**ALERT: OHIO PARENTS!
FIX OUR PUBLIC SCHOOLS!
BECOME A BOARD MEMBER!
HERE'S HOW! **

---
|
**WE NEED MORE PARENTS & GRANDPARENTS ACROSS OHIO TO STEP UP & RUN FOR SCHOOL BOARD!**

Next year, in November of 2025, all public school districts in Ohio will have at least 2 school board seats up for re-election, or if there is no incumbent for the seat, up for election.

We need concerned citizens who are for parental rights, a return to the basics of education, and completely depoliticizing Ohio's public schools, to run for these school board seats.

Anyone can run & there is no need for any kind of special qualifications, experience, or skills. All that's needed is a desire & common sense.

And, the Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition (OSBCC) can help you every step of the way. 40% of the candidates they helped last election won!

If you are interested, or know someone who is, please, please, please make sure you (or they) visit the OSBCC website & register to start getting OSBCC's regular emails & training notices [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f3e0173d12&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below

If you (or they) are anxious to start preparing to run for a school board seat, go to (or have them go to) the contact page & send OSBCC an email or fill out the contact form [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b56f425b01&e=5c740fa3e2). The volunteers at OSBCC will get back to you to get you started off strong. It's not too early to start your campaign!

THANK YOU!
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3786c7a202&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!
WEEK 4 • LESSON 4**

---
|
In May we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0626eb3b9e&e=5c740fa3e2)" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6982bb5e62&e=5c740fa3e2).

Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted [**Lesson 3**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=17f68639d3&e=5c740fa3e2). This week, we're highlighting [**Lesson 4**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=870bfe944c&e=5c740fa3e2): **China’s United Front Work Transforms America through Social Media, Our Economy and Our Schools[.](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4f87dd5151&e=5c740fa3e2)**

[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2ece5e1aca&e=5c740fa3e2) will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=07b02b6edb&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access **Lesson 4** of “**China’s Silent War on America** ” called **"[China’s United Front Work Transforms America through Social Media, Our Economy and Our Schools](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d165fbed37&e=5c740fa3e2)".**

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 5, will be the second of 5 lessons providing examples of China’s United Front's work in America and show how each of these initiatives undermines America’s national security._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6039a866db&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
