[June 2, 2024 - 😫 Tired of the Same Old Faces in DC?](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f6f79efe3d&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 26, 2024 - ⏰ Crucial Info Awaits You This Week](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=636d3dc16d&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 19, 2024 - 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4c40567732&e=5c740fa3e2 "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!")

[April 28, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3981650c10&e=5c740fa3e2)[👥 ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a487deeb7c&e=5c740fa3e2 "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!")[Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b21d7a979e&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d6b88968ed&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 14, 2024 - This Week's Must-Know Trio!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a821198bc1&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d11851b7d9&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|

What if I told you that $1 in every $5 this election year is being spent on our Ohio Senate race? It may be hard to believe, but it’s true. That’s because the GOP knows that if they win in Ohio, they will retake the Senate – so they’re putting everything they have into trying to defeat me.
Unlike my self-funding, Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno (R), I can’t write my campaign million-dollar checks, folks. I'm relying on folks like you to help me raise the resources I need to compete with the GOP's millions.

I won't lie: This is a tough race, and it’s only getting tougher as we near Election Day. Polls show me and Moreno statistically tied, and after looking at the latest numbers, I'm worried we could be outspent and fall behind.
That's why every single dollar makes a difference – and why your donation of $3 or $20 today could mean the difference between winning and losing this race and the Senate.

clean_body: = Hi folks, it’s Sherrod with an important stat: What if I told you that $1 in every $5 this election year is being spent on our Ohio Senate race? It may be hard to believe, but it’s true. That’s because the GOP knows that if they win in Ohio, they will retake the Senate – so they’re putting everything they have into trying to defeat me. Unlike my self-funding, Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno (R), I can’t write my campaign million-dollar checks, folks. I'm relying on folks like you to help me raise the resources I need to compete with the GOP's millions. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = I won't lie: This is a tough race, and it’s only getting tougher as we near Election Day. Polls show me and Moreno statistically tied, and after looking at the latest numbers, I'm worried we could be outspent and fall behind. body:

As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we’re doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

Hey - my name is Byron Donalds.

As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

_**[A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen- so bear with me for a minute:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3908d7a7b21d49e59975ab75372ce5ed&_e=aDzZO5WN4CW8DbRQgRGlaA1eRQsgUXMIgWmj-12DsMIpgd5xlbELkILVtsentMzMk9uUED1TpNFH8HkYxhnYNg57yg43CJHzYm5Bt-KDg2GCXU75bc8ydqo_ZPY2aQqyTtFwpH3gb2bByMV-_YgYwplkwxEhJZzGmkmr4UPNPH10C9LtcO0C63I_7RjsJ4TXvTssIP09XO5VHjO4nXlXEx2kfDGosMm8IhV_FnJ9rgB4RR-uOoMoba1U-lsJNwKY6ylmkny8qUPFCVbz0G4Ibvs-anD4JiJh4yBcfpAXLlfSql2NYM7j5_H70N65xvosa9ggywFYH6Vu3gQ9Huktv7v25FbndBfjTe6ZxkisJfH9vAozeNIHZLNdmfHwzIT1RNDkAqrzDNaf-gdLzxgKZCXm5O672rh8kJD6FIl86pE%3D "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:")**_

-> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them
-> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
-> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own
-> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them
-> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box
-> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat

These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts.

As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. **If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day.**

_But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive._ We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs.

And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding.

I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. _**[That's why I'm coming to you now - would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it's 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3908d7a7b21d49e59975ab75372ce5ed&_e=aDzZO5WN4CW8DbRQgRGlaA1eRQsgUXMIgWmj-12DsMIpgd5xlbELkILVtsentMzMk9uUED1TpNFH8HkYxhnYNg57yg43CJHzYm5Bt-KDg2GCXU75bc8ydqo_ZPY2aQqyTtFwpH3gb2bByMV-_YgYwplkwxEhJZzGmkmr4UPNPH10C9LtcO0C63I_7RjsJ4TXvTssIP09XO5VHjO4nXlXEx2kfDGosMm8IhV_FnJ9rgB4RR-uOoMoba1U-lsJNwKYUcAZBKVwMjJDShE3IxNMSe9fwRFry1xe1LRv5P0MmeB6hk1ZWry-V37ldR9-BgD0HVgEf5g2fh_yajqAiYo3Pfb9ShA1SPuHUSmpsbMuT87IvU2ckD2hG9tbcW8WQA-0L4OADfN2qV43vow_4zvZmw5yWoJIivZvVbCrquREbKs%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.")**_

Look,

**I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House.**

I don't know about you but the thought of unified Republican control fires me up! If that doesn't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?

Before I go, I'll just say this:

The Democrat Party is spending more money - and spending it earlier - than we've ever seen before. They know they are LOSING on the issues.

That's why they're compensating by raising astronomical sums of money, plastering social media with Liberal propaganda, and unleashing the powers of our Federal Government to attack Conservatives.

**But make no mistake: there are a lot more of US than there are of THEM!_[So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can't do. As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY! "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:" -> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them -> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better -> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own -> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them -> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box -> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts. As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day. But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive. We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs. And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding. I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING." Look, I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House. I don't know about you but the thought of unified Republican control fires me up! If that doesn't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! name: Sarah McBride
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene just personally attacked me
body:
I am no stranger to these kinds of attacks from the MAGA extremists.
#
Yesterday on Steve Bannon’s talk show, **Marjorie Taylor Greene described me and my candidacy as a “complete evil” that will “curse” our nation.** Not because of my policy agenda. Simply because of who I am.
Believe me, I am no stranger to these kinds of attacks from the MAGA extremists. I expected this from MTG and, believe me, **I won't lose sleep over what she thinks of me.**
If there’s one thing I know for sure, it’s this: I’m not running for Congress to pick fights with MAGA Republicans who want to waste the American people’s time on personal attacks and manufactured culture wars. I am running because I have a record of getting things done for Delaware — and Congress desperately needs more people who are there for the right reasons, rather than politicians stoking flames of fear and hate. **We need serious legislators in Congress, not professional provocateurs.**
I’m running to bring my results-driven approach to Washington so we can make progress on the most important issues: affordable health care and housing, paid leave and childcare, gun reform, solutions to the climate crisis, and so much more. That’s what this campaign is all about — and we’re not going to get distracted by the people who want to divide our country with their agenda of hatred.
These attacks won’t stop me from fighting for you. And even extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t stop me from bringing people together to deliver for all of us just like I’ve done in Delaware. I’m heartened that Delaware Democrats are united behind this campaign in the face of these attacks.
[**If you’re with me in this fight, can you make a $5 contribution right now to help send me to Congress? Together, we are stronger than any of the attacks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240616-1?refcode=em20240616-1-636&amount=5&refcode2=636_21716_jVlEdM&akid=636%2E21716%2EjVlEdM)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240616-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240616-1-636&refcode2=636_21716_jVlEdM&akid=636%2E21716%2EjVlEdM)**
Thank you, as always, for your love and support.
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240616-1&t=1&refcode2=636_21716_jVlEdM&akid=636%2E21716%2EjVlEdM)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=636%2E21716%2EjVlEdM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=636%2E21716%2EjVlEdM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=636%2E21716%2EjVlEdM)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Under President Trump, the world respected us. America needs his leadership back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
We need a Commander in Chief in the future who will not check his watch when welcoming those who have made the ultimate sacrifice.

| [](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZIvD9bERzeSohP9a0sLePVYnfO63r_iTN7cF-M1TIfJ4rkf_plzDzechlH9zJGTlUfpI3zv_DpEf4rYQbhuu4E__usXtee1SZCtSoUsUBxUi5GfnaF9peyQ_3Q9TROuFjsFcNPAtbWrVJcR3Fuxsg-fpWjagQTvesP59eKjHf4551NE--_Ew4egUmFNHPPAffkC2vtFufdlj2sC8y9RTCnxg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

**We were a stronger country under President Trump.**

_When he was in charge, the world respected us._

Just look around. Have you ever seen the videos of President Trump when he visits a military base, or first responders, or law enforcement officers, or visits a fire station? He'll walk into a room carrying pizza, and _everyone cannot wait to see him, speak to him, and welcome him back._

| [**BRING BACK DJT**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZI5oCx_snqciLGqx12AkBpNL5r-UFU0vzV_4rRrM-7cFp4m9FuadTMeUnXBr29o5EuepOPSCvzc6KeKDJVaCJsrnmP4W-yIRm1wuZcY79MLArbpaFcfluLc_ZDZd3DajdkAkbG7eDoDdNtEoa-KidC0Nx-ec8YtsQ1rBGPIuYxE1TrggpxNV1dVZ5yNw4sd2nfAFu9NHlkC9wYAYUN84IE7w%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK LEADERSHIP**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZI5oCx_snqciLGqx12AkBpNL5r-UFU0vzV_4rRrM-7cFp5uxTA3Lov-FTJCe4lI1wR1v8X-DpnBbOvxRQYsa6hfI8a1lnrMx-EooqcjQtKZlUURz7pVeev3ylBTL5D45rxarIf_7p-Vvmj160SQKFzYIN-TKem669sLkbdzcpLRJr7iBq9uJZSZqLyFYCogEi9DNYJs2dQOkvvmaxCiqcPcg%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK OUR RESPECT**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZI5oCx_snqciLGqx12AkBpNL5r-UFU0vzV_4rRrM-7cFrVl6RJ24NQhauOkUDrpubAl-dOD92UuzVRnegJVaf1DhjOBIbMHOD0RUChVJoZ3VBAKWlin42PcbzovkC__E1sXLQ4JxZBkXGs9faaJPuMjRG-YXt650v-hHadWIBw1s-6Es6psbOj18qeij-JQWWwVFDC2JETfftdKlOU97XStg%3D%3D)
---

_**We want a military that is always ready to fight, but only when necessary. If you recall, during President Trump's four years in office, there were no new wars. We had the Abraham Accords. We had world peace.**_
We need a Commander in Chief in the future who will not check his watch when welcoming those who have made the ultimate sacrifice. _**We need a Commander in Chief who has compassion.**_ That's going to thank those Gold Star Families, and most importantly, those Gold Star families are going to have their promise from our Commander in Chief that the United States of America will take care of them and their future and will continue to recognize their service and sacrifice.

[**PUT DJT IN THE WHITE HOUSE**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZI5oCx_snqciLGqx12AkBpNL5r-UFU0vzV_4rRrM-7cFoTla6Ex0I3cNqu7tgZ0sHolcss0D-METv_Exzsn7LTFua0kthQ1ZbDbVoOEjZ6Fl1EPVI-NlCMgZlzssg7G-9ywoAxqxY3peY3TYyVBnmXk5zEvChxQkUNUlMkbYr7JfDo7QJRONCIF4cCT0l1aiawTQylkPVCYCBFwlM35a6WPQ%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK WORLD PEACE**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZI5oCx_snqciLGqx12AkBpNL5r-UFU0vzV_4rRrM-7cFohkydM-b9JsMADFEXCl7bjgnRMbWE9jkMydxluhqRXE24Yx00XB3CwHVXz-lwcMjED8saIfzlJ003rxmJifL8FmjJMW7JcRmh5EwI6KZmhCJIVuK2K3EtTb6H4Lc7HBrqDId_3iJJQO7zH0hN0nwkFBcoYihB4t7X5QSWayaw8Zw%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK OUR RESPECT**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZI5oCx_snqciLGqx12AkBpNL5r-UFU0vzV_4rRrM-7cFoPaDZ4y6nfMp76AWfJc3BjrphzvkDFxbmmdgxbFcrTMo2OarZr0768i05mX15SGUPxhvK7vEtm_5TUdKeQkYQPotPClbc2M4eR-8t0sNyK6wEZoDAdYJPHNz7ymWrSSuv5c_GM23FN2XGqTpMMujQinFdvmx8H-il47oEqUwVVjg%3D%3D)
---

It's time to put a true leader back in the White House. We have to make America strong again. I hope you'll join me in supporting a strong leader.

_Wesley Hunt_
[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=5b9b21c221aa4ef0bd58ca60b60caf77&_e=JWBvDUerdh7y_zQz7Ljk5vs-_WD9A8CR-667PRuRDHjRZmnEA94Hc0myI9UV6lh5hiVeeCDq8yha0cEMxoqOwANxhVdsABOuMq3bp3mwsRzDXqHghi490OGhZmszchZIPdjso2H8vKen1Ue_D2x7Hrw0JI1X21zGglwpKnAPlVpHwFAQyILlBu3-ct5sLZLoR4P6YRm9lJgpTHwTjoc1CAI83s43TSeNlKh8NCnodwfeV6HlUuYKRx85WGOxIB9VM8NQu3bvQObea2Cg3ekQyNNBu6I21wVWu_A2tWaOud_OqM4Pwem9aqILYdkTcOZc)

**_Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges.

I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area._**********

I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area.****** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Hunt for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Copyright (C) 2024 Hunt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: our inheritance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
The Texas Democratic Party asked me to welcome the delegates at their opening reception last week.
I spoke of our current circumstances -- where we face the threat of a fascist, authoritarian takeover of our state and country -- within the context of those who fought and gave their lives to secure this democracy for this and every generation that follows.
You can watch the video here: [youtube.com/watch?v=khWC06ZuO7](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63640?t=1&akid=239648%2E444211%2EmOXOmU)
Whether they landed on the beaches of Normandy 80 years ago to fight fascism and save democracy or marched in the streets of America to make sure that democracy extended to each and every one of us, the service, sacrifice and struggle of those who came before has been passed on to us. What we do with this inheritance, whether we make the most of it or squander it forever will define this generation in the pages of history and the eyes of our kids and grandkids.
(No pressure.)
That's why we're doing everything we can at Powered by People to meet the moment and live up to the legacy left by those who came before: reach, register and turn out the voters who can make Texas safe for democracy.
[**We'd love your help to continue the work -- please consider donating today if you can.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240616.MH4xzC&refcode=ema20240616-239648&t=2&akid=239648%2E444211%2EmOXOmU)
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240616-239648-footer&t=3&refcode2=239648_444211_mOXOmU&akid=239648%2E444211%2EmOXOmU)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239648%2E444211%2EmOXOmU), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=239648%2E444211%2EmOXOmU).

name: Lila Rose
subject: Amazon’s paying for abortions
body:
Today Live Action is the online, educational leader of the pro-life movement.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_t=wPTphvCdVL3381pkTvo2wqXJWFWADKYJgYjV_hVAjGqWJBHury8qNz5M72i9vUIE6Xbn2xRgmP_RPpYHD38UeUNtHjFEvPN6b7hVD0Do2uSWnlAF5O18Fxl2nSCQq2gK)_
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_e=FAqO_5ARdORd9QwqEVX61Z9Px0ZNAYDh6mtoGvxLPb-27ywUanFbexBhVd6VFAQdxtsA42mEnJBLju_Bh1QGQbcUg-REXuhA2doMdB7vUk7EkXQiK2w8qhwKuxiZxZ03o0VwYqmCAojEACkjljrXvUv6hknxGYSb_D8m7mvfJ0WTKcc9sFvKPFonjlzKIiaLg--AgIDe86GU8fJM3D5crzPOkVgH7uCK6dNcgv0Trgkzbed-JciM4IJjJkba1daQKeScs15YDK7T7_NyrIVo-xuGDbbvmBzTSEkkflXui11euRaVCRCFchYP2l6SCbVW32BdtwrD6WZzMWkSW1U6GnolJ9X1TE6hB3v4ZANLXBU%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

My name is Lila Rose. I'm the founder and president of Live Action.

Today Live Action is the online, educational leader of the pro-life movement. We reach millions of Americans each month--changing minds and hearts and saving lives.

I wanted to alert you about a growing threat to preborn babies, one that is contributing to the growth in abortion numbers this year.

That's right. Even though _Roe v. Wade_ is gone, abortion rates are _growing_ instead of decreasing. Reports say that a preborn child in the United States now loses its life every 31 seconds.

And, corporate America has decided to jump on board and expand the killing.

**You see, at least 114 big corporations are paying --often pressuring--their female employees to fly to pro-abortion "sanctuary" states like California to kill their preborn children.**

Corporations like Amazon, Nike, Uber, Target, Disney, Starbucks, Sony, eBay, CVS, Apple, Bank of America, and 103 others are offering women $4,000, $5,000, $10,000, or unlimited "travel" and "lodging" to go abort their children.

It's beyond sickening.

Killing a baby is cheaper for businesses than maternity leave. Bosses can get the mother back to work faster. This is calculated evil, sugarcoated as "affirming" and "healthcare."

Corporate America should _help mothers_ embrace the lives of their children, not pressure them to have them killed!

**[Will you give $50 right now to help save at least one baby from this corporate greed?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_e=FAqO_5ARdORd9QwqEVX61Z9Px0ZNAYDh6mtoGvxLPb-27ywUanFbexBhVd6VFAQdxtsA42mEnJBLju_Bh1QGQbcUg-REXuhA2doMdB7vUk7EkXQiK2w8qhwKuxiZxZ03o0VwYqmCAojEACkjljrXvUv6hknxGYSb_D8m7mvfJ0WTKcc9sFvKPFonjlzKIiaLg--AgIDe86GU8fJM3D5cr8przEGPsfWa4Jyrs0ugWdNYydIFCuxZpwuII9yX8K2c8Xozwl_0scQJ0Rz1AfLFWEY33K6_UIaUHZvwOJfqRmmKc8h-5y2for-NwHTh9JEMsWtIbjhG5akEVvwsuMvx9gIZPQ4r44Sm3Wsxi1NjQKg%3D)** You will also spare parents a lifetime of loss and regret.

Your gift will reach parents moments away from an abortion decision with the truth they need to embrace life.

We discovered that spreading TRUTH in compelling and persuasive online videos is the single best tool to reach and compel millions of Americans, especially abortion-minded parents, and prevent abortions. Our videos include:
* Eye-opening facts about the humanity of a baby in the womb
* Raw, horrific truths about the abortion procedures
* Shocking details about the ugly, corrupt abortion industry

These high-quality videos change minds and hearts. 43% of those who follow Live Action say our content changed their position from pro-abortion to pro-life!

Your donation will also reach parents with _Window to the Womb_ , a state-of-the-art, Hollywood-quality, 3-D animated video showing the development of "Baby Olivia" from fertilization to birth.

**Some pregnancy resource centers share that 75% of abortion-minded women who view ultrasounds reject abortion.** One single mother sent us this note after viewing _Window to the Womb_ depicting "Baby Olivia":

"_I can barely pay the bills on time. . . . I was considering abortion for my 5th child, but after watching, I came back into the light and realized it would be so wrong to deprive a child of this wonderful thing we call life. Her name will be Olivia, too._"

We even developed an app to put the lifesaving truth of Window to the Womb at the fingertips of abortion-minded people on their cell phones.

But as long as corporate America keeps pouring millions of dollars of funding into abortion, we face an uphill battle. **That 's why we are looking for 79 courageous pro-life people in your state who are willing to give as little as $50 before midnight so that we can reach more parents with these videos before it's too late for their children.**

Here's the secure link to rush your gift: **[https://give.liveaction.org/corporate-greed/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_e=FAqO_5ARdORd9QwqEVX61Z9Px0ZNAYDh6mtoGvxLPb-27ywUanFbexBhVd6VFAQdxtsA42mEnJBLju_Bh1QGQbcUg-REXuhA2doMdB7vUk7EkXQiK2w8qhwKuxiZxZ03o0VwYqmCAojEACkjljrXvUv6hknxGYSb_D8m7mvfJ0WTKcc9sFvKPFonjlzKIiaLg--AgIDe86GU8fJM3D5cr0ZOBFifHv7ZWaq9a_QD2QeN4rPPTCa8Y6uROAKjh2STNgs4gz8g9U_yC4FYvGXRnzPjeHzcwGKVCcLNxR4tOvNm0fD0uRyBpZKAw8jgu28IuTt8NxFyIimassrWrsG7u-4jm8UMFFYres8UK5WWpIc%3D)**

Through our careful tracking, we know that $50 is enough to reach and change the minds of 1000 people, so your gift will likely save more than one child from violent death.

Meta (Facebook), Amazon, Apple, Microsoft, Disney, Target, and more than 100 other companies are determined to pay to kill babies that don't fit into their corporate plans.

But you can intervene in time to save a life. Please join us today.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_e=FAqO_5ARdORd9QwqEVX61Z9Px0ZNAYDh6mtoGvxLPb-27ywUanFbexBhVd6VFAQdxtsA42mEnJBLju_Bh1QGQbcUg-REXuhA2doMdB7vUk7EkXQiK2w8qhwKuxiZxZ03o0VwYqmCAojEACkjljrXvUv6hknxGYSb_D8m7mvfJ0WTKcc9sFvKPFonjlzKIiaLg--AgIDe86GU8fJM3D5crzD-lqljOZtKLnsI8x9nFDNU5AkG1qP37R3u50mQbGwTfDfTsr1Y98Bd4ZbNtYMa3BOi0F-zCa8cweEys578zM6DgEuDwTagow31HXTZmOUXrdSngT3zhc0uEWTGhkR2kzTzck1BxGKx6OQNyXbmRhs%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
#
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Live Action.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_t=wPTphvCdVL3381pkTvo2wqXJWFWADKYJgYjV_hVAjGqWJBHury8qNz5M72i9vUIE6Xbn2xRgmP_RPpYHD38UeVONHm4PS_YBcM-Qrda_Y9gvnZDxptp5JGOQGk0I9a8Uzq2pSdL_1JUE3d_SfdBkhB-jvRYw-QSvoYQaIdxsIzc%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=108d10d3df53419abdfa40b2429146f9&_t=wPTphvCdVL3381pkTvo2wqXJWFWADKYJgYjV_hVAjGqWJBHury8qNz5M72i9vUIE6Xbn2xRgmP_RPpYHD38UeUNtHjFEvPN6b7hVD0Do2uSWnlAF5O18Fxl2nSCQq2gK).

name: John Avlon
subject: When we say "broad coalition..." we mean it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlonfinalpush1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlonfinalpush1]

Friends, you've heard me say over and over that the only way to win this race is to build the broadest possible coalition to defend our democracy. Anyone who's ready to derail the Trump train and no-show Nick needs to be part of it.

That's exactly what our campaign has done, and I'm proud of it. And you want to know broad? Here's broad: The 1199SEIU - Long Island's heroic healthcare workers union - just endorsed me - and so did the New Democrat Coalition.

Here we've got a longtime stalwart in Democratic politics - one of the most important unions in the country - as well as a group dedicated to fresh ideas and a new approach - both coming together to win back this seat.

Quality healthcare. Good jobs. Rebuilding the middle class. Improving the quality of life for everyone. That's what 1199SEIU is about - and it's what Suffolk County voters tell me is important to them every day. I agree -- it's why when I'm in Congress, restoring the state and local tax credits, expanding the child tax credit, and fighting for women's reproductive freedoms are at the top of my agenda.
I've been a New Democrat at heart since I volunteered on Bill Clinton's campaigns back in college. His idea of Opportunity, Responsibility, and Community - that's a big reason why I'm running now. Those ideas can still guide us.

We win when we build coalitions like this. We win when we find common ground and pursue the common good together.

That's the kind of campaign I'm proud to be running. It’s the right thing to do and it's how we’ll win the primary and the general election. And it's why I'm proud to have your support, too.

We've got less than two weeks to go. If you can, please pitch in for the final push today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlonfinalpush1]

Thank you for fighting the good fight with me.

-John

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlonfinalpush1]

name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: It’s electric
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund
body:
Republicans have controlled the Wisconsin legislature for decades, but with new maps and Democratic candidates running in 97 of the state’s 99 Assembly districts, our party could finally gain ground. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Republicans have controlled the Wisconsin legislature for decades, but with new maps and **Democratic candidates running in 97 of the state’s 99 Assembly districts, our party could _finally_ gain ground.** With so many candidates on the ballot this fall, the momentum is electric. But the GOP is holding tight to every seat, trying desperately to reinforce its majority. **And with fundraising slower than normal, if we don't catch up, we won't be able to take advantage of the best opportunities we've had in decades to build power in Wisconsin and beyond.** [ We _must_ buckle down and gear up for the tough fights ahead. A donation of $7 could make a HUGE difference in states like Wisconsin. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDt4Do6vyPJ50F6Afq3NtvRPo9ZrPMF6sC0WubaWgKALzSzUjDmS0oEBFcT4euPTWtPeZAv48p_W0X3bkwQ0w7shgNfn_TZd2N4R2oXZz_jOzYy5AXC4M6K_e8C9bsU0ytXDtNvE90Qk6rK2S9jy817C-ymwO5AWVa2eXHqSp3hRCZjlDptxKAY0atTzY6r5-OXlsXMkZaHT6yFNoMSqH_EfUF4v3Ana-v2-URxcvZxv13YGfVhrEHC4n_UwftQ_KROpSWRZLnDHjwjvdoTppf7O8q7uVgJLmCWQa8jVd5hJatrnvIjKX7MmyF7hhKlf9JxPSA5WJLD5U8QhsqXsrMRYhBDAxJovCBDjZqaNexwWGUTZCVP4ZdCdaXKm1kZn3W1nw-YbVYPXTsLHGxkg0KSXfzEdwUIrGBAvm3AaqAhnk5bNmmNBCQ6iUSZ0Q-3CBjcvQ0qSnQzRg91nzwdEIRIAE8j4i2Ih8qP1epRNsHMOg/479/cof3OMubQJ6SUtTDPuna_Q/h0/h001.bm75QuHzXpFBb16OHAeGetVr68eCzIcxivybSYz15EM) We need to elect state Democrats who will defend democracy and our fundamental freedoms. But without enough grassroots support, we won’t stand a chance in Republican strongholds like Wisconsin. clean_body: Republicans have controlled the Wisconsin legislature for decades, but with new maps and Democratic candidates running in 97 of the state’s 99 Assembly districts, our party could finally gain ground. | | | | | ---|--- Republicans have controlled the Wisconsin legislature for decades, but with new maps and Democratic candidates running in 97 of the state’s 99 Assembly districts, our party could finally gain ground. With so many candidates on the ballot this fall, the momentum is electric. But the GOP is holding tight to every seat, trying desperately to reinforce its majority. And with fundraising slower than normal, if we don't catch up, we won't be able to take advantage of the best opportunities we've had in decades to build power in Wisconsin and beyond. We need to elect state Democrats who will defend democracy and our fundamental freedoms. But without enough grassroots support, we won’t stand a chance in Republican strongholds like Wisconsin. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | With you in this fight, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund. name: Tax the Rich Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Elon Musk's $48 billion pay package. Time to TAX THE RICH!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, the Trump
tax cuts passed in 2017 have given giant tax breaks to billionaires and
corporations. Now, the GOP wants to make even deeper cuts so wealthy CEOs
and mega-corporations can avoid paying anything close to their fair share
of taxes.

This comes at a time when the richest 1% of Americans have increased their
wealth by $15 TRILLION since the start of the pandemic. As Bernie says,
“While the rich become much richer, 60% of Americans live paycheck to
paycheck.”

Elon Musk is one of those billionaires getting much richer. Tesla just
approved Musk’s pay package of $48 billion. Meanwhile, Congress hasn’t
raised the federal minimum wage since 2009. It’s insane that GOP lawmakers
want to give away more tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy while giving away
OUR tax dollars in subsidies to some of the richest companies on earth.
This must change if we’re going to fight wealth inequality and protect the
social safety net.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18202?t=1011&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Add your name: Fight back against efforts to extend the Trump tax cuts
for Elon Musk, billionaires, and giant corporations. Tax the rich and
ensure they pay their fair share!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18203?source=email-20240616&t=1012&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]ADD YOUR NAME

The power held by wealthy CEOs and billionaires is a threat to our
democracy and our most important social programs: Social Security,
Medicare, Medicaid, public education, and more.

As Bernie said recently, “We must have the guts to take on and defeat a
powerful and greedy ruling class.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18202?t=1013&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ][IMG]

Republicans and the ultra-wealthy are ready to pounce if Trump wins. Their
path to more tax cuts will be clear — as Trump has promised to do their
bidding, especially for Big Oil corporations. He already asked fossil fuel
companies and CEOs for a billion dollars for his campaign to help him
retake the White House and continue their deadly, dirty business model
with more tax breaks and corporate welfare.

Wealth inequality is skyrocketing, and working people are just trying to
scrape by while health insurance executives, Wall Street high rollers, and
fossil fuel CEOs rake in massive profits. We need our movement to stand
with Bernie and take on the billionaire class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18203?source=email-20240616&t=1014&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Add your name: Tax Elon Musk, tax the rich, and tax big corporations!
End Trump’s tax cuts and force the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share
in taxes.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20240616.NuwUf7&t=1007&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240616.zGQbG-&t=1008&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20240616.BS7a_U&t=1009&akid=6185%2E5885482%2EkX5h-W ]GIVE MONTHLY

| We’ve set an ambitious goal to reach $20,000 by midnight TOMORROW, and in order to stay on track, **we need 200 more donors by 11:59 PM Eastern tonight.** [Will you be one of the 200 by chipping in $10 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027284/479793979/1134098681?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_CW_20240616_FR_filing9_0_3MO_TeamWarmington_NA_NA_filing9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmUzY2FjYi0xZTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3d1tVN7ilGG-jAojpgSunkZP_fxGv_MwLgJ_74zYV9Q=)

body:
We won’t be fooled.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87027317/479794021/1328794144?refcode=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmFjM2QxLTFlMmMtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lwplWtWCrHxRYMcqGEpG1EP47klYlibulbX3ip06pAs=&emci=423db1ef-902a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
There’s no two ways about it — the climate crisis is _the most_ significant global threat we face. We know it. You know it. But fossil fuel giants and the politicians deep in their pockets want to ignore, dismiss, and even erase this reality. The worst part? They think they can get away with it. **[We need to show them that we see through their lies. Sign our petition now to demand they stop ignoring the climate crisis >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87027318/479794022/391732713?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&refcode=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmFjM2QxLTFlMmMtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lwplWtWCrHxRYMcqGEpG1EP47klYlibulbX3ip06pAs=&emci=423db1ef-902a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)** Every level of government is being weaponized to further Big Oil's dangerous agenda:
* **Ron DeSantis's~~Climate Crisis~~ Erasure:** Florida Governor Ron DeSantis recently signed a bill that removed the requirement for the state to consider the climate crisis and rolled back nearly all references to the climate crisis in state law. This reckless action panders to his extremist base while putting Floridians at greater risk from the devastating impacts of global warming.

* **Congressional Sabotage:** Sitting members of Congress are blocking meaningful climate legislation. They are deliberately delaying and rejecting impactful bills to stall essential efforts to combat the climate crisis.

* **Fossil Fuel Greed:** The greedy fossil fuel industry is pouring millions into ensuring climate-denying politicians are elected in 2024. Their goal? To evade accountability and continue profiting at the expense of our environment.

* **Trump's Billion-Dollar Bribe:** And don’t forget that Donald Trump solicited a bribe from top oil executives for $1 billion in exchange for passing a laundry list of pro-industry, anti-climate priorities if he is elected. This blatant corruption can’t go unchecked.

At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we are bringing the climate crisis front and center and fighting back against anyone who tries to ignore it. **[By signing our joint petition, you are demanding that the climate crisis be a top priority for our elected leaders and political candidates. Let's show the fossil fuel giants and greedy politicians that we won't let them sweep this issue under the rug.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87027319/479794023/391732713?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&refcode=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmFjM2QxLTFlMmMtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lwplWtWCrHxRYMcqGEpG1EP47klYlibulbX3ip06pAs=&emci=423db1ef-902a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87027320/479794025/391732713?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&refcode=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmFjM2QxLTFlMmMtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lwplWtWCrHxRYMcqGEpG1EP47klYlibulbX3ip06pAs=&emci=423db1ef-902a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2e2ac3d1-1e2c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)

#
---
Yadira Caraveo is running in the most competitive House race in Colorado. National Republicans have named her a top target, and they're going to spend big to try and flip this seat red. Read her message below, then consider splitting a donation between her and Jason’s campaigns so we can keep Colorado blue. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027435/479794371/41762826?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI1ZjQzOC0xZjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztCUJQ6tZ_j8Xak59Tl--ljCqY7B03Ok8z-0GnCH3UA=) Hi there, it’s Yadira Caraveo. With Colorado's primary election in less than 2 weeks and my race in CO-08 heating up, I asked Jason if I could reach out to his top supporters. In a moment, I’m going to tell you more about myself and why I first ran for Congress. But to put it frankly, I represent one of the most competitive House seats in the country, so if you’re already with me, [_**please split $10 or any amount you can afford right now between my campaign and Jason Crow to help us defend this seat:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027436/479794372/41762826?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI1ZjQzOC0xZjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztCUJQ6tZ_j8Xak59Tl--ljCqY7B03Ok8z-0GnCH3UA=) | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027437/479794373/41762826?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI1ZjQzOC0xZjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztCUJQ6tZ_j8Xak59Tl--ljCqY7B03Ok8z-0GnCH3UA=)
---
I went to medical school, becoming the first in my family to graduate from college. But even before I finished my medical training, advocacy became an important part of my life. I helped organize my fellow medical residents for better working conditions, and became a union representative with SEIU.
**I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County** to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. I quickly realized that doctors face major obstacles when trying to treat our patients.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027438/479794375/41762826?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI1ZjQzOC0xZjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztCUJQ6tZ_j8Xak59Tl--ljCqY7B03Ok8z-0GnCH3UA=)
**That’s why I ran for the state legislature.** In that time, I worked to pass legislation to force drug companies to lower the cost of prescriptions, expand funding for preschool, ensure all Coloradans have access to paid family leave and sick days, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027439/479794376/41762826?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI1ZjQzOC0xZjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztCUJQ6tZ_j8Xak59Tl--ljCqY7B03Ok8z-0GnCH3UA=)
And that’s why I ran for Congress in 2022. **The pollsters said I didn’t have a shot of winning this race.** Thanks to this grassroots movement, we defied the odds and elected the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.
In Congress, I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose. [_**I’m ready to continue advocating for Coloradans in Congress, but I can’t beat the far-right or get there alone. Your support was critical last time. So please, will you split $10 between my congressional campaign and Jason Crow today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87027441/479794377/41762826?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20240616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI1ZjQzOC0xZjJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztCUJQ6tZ_j8Xak59Tl--ljCqY7B03Ok8z-0GnCH3UA=)

The pollsters said I didn’t have a shot of winning this race. Thanks to this grassroots movement, we defied the odds and elected the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In Congress, I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Yadira Caraveo and Jason Crow and processed immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being a part of my story. name: Dane Levis, LCV
subject: Join LCV’s organizing team for a Juneteenth Celebration: Honoring Freedom, Advancing Democracy, and Upholding Voting Rights
body:
You’re Invited!

| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Peter,
---
| | This Wednesday is Juneteenth, also known as Freedom Day, a federal holiday marking the day that over 250,000 Black Americans were finally freed in Texas by executive decree — over two years after the Emancipation Proclamation was issued.
---
| | To honor this pivotal day in history, LCV invites you to a virtual panel conversation with climate organizers and Black leaders across the country to discuss our current political landscape, the impacts of environmental racism, and the intersectionality of issues that affect Black Americans. Join us to learn more about the racial justice challenges still being faced 158 years after Juneteenth and actions you can take to help dismantle racism in your community.
---
| | **When:** Thursday, June 20th from 6:30pm - 8:00pm ET
**Where:** Virtual Zoom Event (link will be provided after you RSVP)
**Who:** Climate Action, a program of LCV, featuring guest speakers to be announced soon!
---
| | [**_You won’t want to miss this! RSVP now. And don’t forget to forward this email to three friends who’d enjoy this webinar too!_**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9AwXYhb/NWplcTdac3U4YVZBaERYVTRTVU54UTVxMHJjZ1VGSklvelVPZG4xVm1HbVJLQ3BLeENkdFRIUEZISllrNFUyZWJjU3RDUFRmMXpXbUE2NmV2cHYyMlQwb0FEQXQ0RCtkMW5yaHNnTkdNdm89S0/)
---
| | We appreciate your support and look forward to seeing you there,
---
| | LCV Membership Team
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11134757&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjAwMDI2NDYyNQS2&spReportId=MjAwMDI2NDYyNQS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11134757&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjAwMDI2NDYyNQS2&spReportId=MjAwMDI2NDYyNQS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
|

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Reaching out directly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey everyone, it’s Janelle. I wanted to reach out directly: I need your help now if I’m going to defeat Lori Chavez-DeRemer and flip this seat blue. Right now, we’re facing our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the general election, and my team told me we’re falling behind.

Hey everyone, it’s Janelle. I wanted to reach out directly: I need your help now if I’m going to defeat Lori Chavez-DeRemer and flip this seat blue. **Right now, we’re facing our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the general election, and my team told me we’re falling behind.** In 2022, Republicans spent millions to flip this seat red – and it worked. I’m running for Congress because I’ve defeated Lori Chavez-DeRemer before, and I know we can take this seat back in November. This is going to be one of the most competitive House races in the entire country, and the attacks against me have already started. In a race this close, every dollar is going to matter. Anything you can spare before this first mid-month fundraising deadline would mean the world and go a long way. Here's the best link to give now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynumq22024?refcode=JuneMidMonth](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87028680/479798340/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.16_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRjZjY3OGItMjQyYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O2gzWTYB1XBdSnExxDM8Q3gILR_r2u42SAMYNWAHA1Y=)** Thank you so much for your support. With gratitude, _Janelle_
Sent from my iPhone

What if I told you that Republicans are already funneling MILLIONS into this race to flip this seat and the Senate to my Trump-endorsed GOP opponent – and they're only getting started. What if I told you that Democrats across the country are counting on us to win in Nevada to defend Senate control – but with time running out before our critical midnight deadline, we're still falling short of our $15,000 goal? Only 10% of people open emails like this – and you're one of them. Friends — The 2024 election has been dubbed by many as the “most dangerous election” for abortion policy. This November, we have a real opportunity to make a lasting impact on our state and our country. Arizona Democrats are making abortion rights the centerpiece of our federal races, and flipping vulnerable seats has become more important than ever. If we secure a unified government, we can codify the provisions of _Roe v. Wade_ at the federal level. This means that our right to an abortion would once again be protected at the federal level. Patriot,

I am grateful that you even opened this email. Breaking through noise these days is hard, but I depend on being able to reach you via email and texts to keep you in the loop on the America First movement.

So, let me start by saying thank you for reading this, but I have an **urgent message** to get to, so please read this message all the way through.

Let me outline the current situation for you:

* **Joe Biden and Democrats are working to undermine the integrity of the American republic.**
* They have a Radical Left scheme to open the border and flood our country with illegal immigrants.
* They then bring those illegal immigrants into blue states and count them in the census. This will give the Democrats more congressional seats and voting power.

In summary, **if we don’t take immediate action now, the Radical Left will win** , and we will be stuck under Democrat rule _forever_ with no hope for the future.

**_How can we stop the Left today?_ [Help Republicans outraise the Democrats before the next deadline.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=581b6713ca874d5cb2411c325645a8b4&_e=5uWkqfWGaA8BsWgDSK4DXPWoAI3qrOuKzLEmAvVvI5TpsUPryL6AbxTg3EH_2Rgg5l1Ne8eAbzB4h4P1h9KOPW3k72EJW_x6xrpZ-DGXF_Ais53tJ6AOXr35LndrxotLV9-a3tMCxJxa-QBxmbRA-eS3OX8oGlBB67ap60SaMTikjhBzVWAuG5szs6NdYnhPD50hpF-IdW-g1TKqbcjKS26sQzc4s8mxIHqXm1Ukx_Lz1nvMnHwhV3RlosGGAdxcVSh-vDVHG6ZHBXH3cWM9Q3tc9jwa-wkDSyxmn9SVZd7whdzqnvLG80R20bAx-0LJC3GttAMu5FVNQ4xlsEiVq8iMiDrJRsd_baK8jQtaoTpHQVOSVtTU9W-Lvdya4cpIzyqDm2kPBsOSslVwgK26Awdox2H5dv8Bz7mZrkjsdyQ%3D) **

We have to catch up. Fast. But I’m about to say something that would make my finance director’s head spin — **the amount you give doesn’t matter to me.** Here’s why:
I’m proud to run this campaign the right way — with over 500,000 individual contributions from folks like you powering everything we do.
My opponent has the backing of shady billionaires and Mitch McConnell himself. Outside groups are flooding Montana with over **$50,000,000** in TV ads to try and defeat me.
I won’t lie, that’s a lot of cash. And it’s concerning — especially if we don’t have the resources to fight back. But I’d bet on this grassroots team any day of the week.
$10 here and $25 there might not seem like a lot, I know, but I promise it adds up. I wouldn’t be emailing you if your support didn’t make a difference.
**[So what do you think? clean_body: My opponent has the backing of shady billionaires and Mitch McConnell himself. Outside groups are flooding Montana with over $50,000,000 in TV ads to try and defeat me. Team, Look, I don’t expect everyone to contribute each time we send one of these emails. But the truth is we’re a little bit behind on the fundraising targets we need to hit to win this election. We have to catch up. Fast. But I’m about to say something that would make my finance director’s head spin — the amount you give doesn’t matter to me. Here’s why: I’m proud to run this campaign the right way — with over 500,000 individual contributions from folks like you powering everything we do. My opponent has the backing of shady billionaires and Mitch McConnell himself. Outside groups are flooding Montana with over $50,000,000 in TV ads to try and defeat me. I won’t lie, that’s a lot of cash. And it’s concerning — especially if we don’t have the resources to fight back. But I’d bet on this grassroots team any day of the week. $10 here and $25 there might not seem like a lot, I know, but I promise it adds up. I wouldn’t be emailing you if your support didn’t make a difference. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Adam Frisch will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything. They say a picture’s worth a thousand words, Derek, but we’ll let this one speak for itself: [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3RFwH8z3tfL1di_iS8zqdfSELTcMkT9VKi8TiE82ozLt2Q8XX4oQNl5QpNtKkjfsRx85zZnWzsy7WtMGLUiGWejnq3lECDDzeMA9QjbyIdY-NOpSUpKERWmuDFFYqYWkdPxRLqNxPonuNEk_4HQ_ApyrPXBDHiZgZb1ejZo-cXAoJZF-Cx4fvqJWIUsEWnkJYzCQATkxcBL_gS8hR2T5Al5rTtjVg03NxUa4yBUqbJ3ESDEq91HuKaEbNjFNmrooby479qqkfF1VD85bk47h-vHbP_LCOfP_s8V0NEGNUTlFV4DUaABjHr4kF4rlX33lSWktbxMuCil69Xs0QRf0WNeUHEP_Vs-umcnK1M9IwTqTA/479/7mfodnreQRqcGNKIl7NUIA/h0/h001.9fu15iwUVFFnLr6bCF95poQ4-jgFhncIYBSzQHbIf_8) That’s Donald Trump riling up his supporters outside the White House on January 6, 2021, before the insurrection to try and stop the peaceful transfer of power. Do you remember how you felt that day? Or how you felt after four long years of reading headlines like these? [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3RFwH8z3tfL1di_iS8zqdfSELTcMkT9VKi8TiE82ozLt2Q8XX4oQNl5QpNtKkjfsRyqSmtGZNfoEWTj3huLex4D6H4NB9HxENzkZWL5hgWykDz8zQ2FAOTHynV_sJZfvD-5maqtqSXNvs9tq3MVRif_ZfSTSEqxCGUbMV0GNnO4sNgmYbjHIhexvFwDvzGeXA_ZXn_E7jWyP25Xg5PFuJpqEexgcfYYo9vpPZWv6TZyNc6yOOOVeeLqn2dSo59CrkmSxAM8rXvm7uL14lT7sULa0z8VmES1SclTWgVlVZy3Bh35zGbSjLZOy3nb_GShTdC6QoijDqCxmUGmZ2gIbFIfay41l6vhpyYaTDYr1nrIcQ/479/7mfodnreQRqcGNKIl7NUIA/h1/h001.fkKsiK3ZAJBrQ44-hNzEMSQs7ldAU8acABKnnCwmJ6A) [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3RFwH8z3tfL1di_iS8zqdfSELTcMkT9VKi8TiE82ozLt2Q8XX4oQNl5QpNtKkjfsRy44YBo65_vkaGbPj7iZmLGskZOV2DAdSkJ2nJN5P555FX4Rf9iCSkpPz9fuddKjVsiGzvp7irRxAgH-oz8LbaGRcGuh-QvbSyW1VIAy-CJhRdJo8KZGLSeMfz1-hqQDpoq5KlYFAJf5wQSRPw0Vk5PrrQv1Vnx_EoN13tOdBAEGCH0ZsUftNLoL5hE5bS1u3uDyhNcLj-9B68sJFZSxeHcIDEbvdUnwTGflNawWLrM3ArV3CKW-GiFzh6Bi7h4KVm1hrnZwjOqeCWYVQt8UGngzhNlbkMKwUx66iA0_d8MLQ/479/7mfodnreQRqcGNKIl7NUIA/h2/h001.yg9SYNzvK7T0VFY-mAarbkD6dVHXA9kI_FMa7f8V8dI) [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3RFwH8z3tfL1di_iS8zqdfSELTcMkT9VKi8TiE82ozLt2Q8XX4oQNl5QpNtKkjfsRzOs2_AcNQx4nQp9n78SYRwM9pVoU1XoEhencjBkvNIOn-NOw8KVchhjwN5qzJTh6VgoLGl-Y0OGMj-Kl5TxlSEWIb6hSUEKx2hVlaGY-vRidpui7GuebeZ7uyCKyuy7teH5d7WVoyOli_kQXvaTcDpZZ7wRIdDjYE9AOuMngKQH2YKNKKJKbBkW5RCO2XAi68VLVxZxK3C_KYaKdzckYZH5FgYtvoxoiHu8z5C-U6gCpOVy362hQNjwhH8jluffbigFNCSnZOomMztUxEiXZmYBLl1092EXjeD2IHxigTiDw/479/7mfodnreQRqcGNKIl7NUIA/h3/h001.TiAq7eceK2SHPZ_ZsX0Nju9iT0eTSzHlkFe4zaO93-c) Remember the daily chaos, frustration, and fear as you wondered what the next day’s news might hold? We can’t go back to that, Derek. **But here’s the truth: It’s going to take a _lot_ of work between now and Election Day to make sure Trump never reaches the Oval Office again.** In 2020, Joe Biden beat Trump by about 45,000 votes across a few battleground states. We have to be prepared for the margins to be just as close in November. [**When you donate to the DNC, your contribution goes toward making strategic investments in the states Democrats need to win this fall. So we have to ask: Can you make your first $7 contribution to the DNC now?**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3RFwH8z3tfL1di_iS8zqdfSELTcMkT9VKi8TiE82ozLt2Q8XX4oQNl5QpNtKkjfsRxOy9g4Hk9OXOq2GAGMRQ091knFLChZgPg6tqslRz7UgNFniVACv5ktDcKNrCyyA-gBZZms0MbLEBuR538-aQKcIfEPbDWDI-LJzYlFhU5St-ZNU-02Nr3K1wBymj7sVdegO7dEEOsXyNLw3-31uFpVEO9h3nck67GzaNPpa-t4-pR2lIPtS7Z3djaeiFvsiKnYE-pLHQ2Hers3e809w7uWmPVpcaLfoJtuv09hxlWRvyHKQCYC5egWFy_q2r7ivQdBhUvpru_v9GTkrHsmLBrAanQ9Io6PeXALCQGdn7EVYA/479/7mfodnreQRqcGNKIl7NUIA/h4/h001.tMvzd6u8uDO2JH9LSWHXaTZxfgGrxPomOKu2Hov2-kQ)

clean_body: It’s going to take a lot of work between now and Election Day to make sure Trump never reaches the Oval Office again. | | They say a picture’s worth a thousand words, Derek, but we’ll let this one speak for itself: That’s Donald Trump riling up his supporters outside the White House on January 6, 2021, before the insurrection to try and stop the peaceful transfer of power. Do you remember how you felt that day? Or how you felt after four long years of reading headlines like these? Remember the daily chaos, frustration, and fear as you wondered what the next day’s news might hold? We can’t go back to that, Derek. But here’s the truth: It’s going to take a lot of work between now and Election Day to make sure Trump never reaches the Oval Office again. In 2020, Joe Biden beat Trump by about 45,000 votes across a few battleground states. We have to be prepared for the margins to be just as close in November. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Joe Biden can beat Trump again in November. But if Trump wins reelection, that future will be turned upside down. **That’s why I’m traveling to battleground states across the country to engage with Gen Z voters and turn them out to the polls this year for President Biden.**

We NEED to fire up young voters to prevent another Trump presidency. My generation deserves a say in our future, so I’m taking this youth-powered movement to new heights and making sure our voices are heard this November.

_But that makes me a top target for attacks from MAGA Republicans who want to shut out our generation at the polls._

So I’m counting on your support, Peter. Because when we all come together, we can create an unstoppable movement that MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance against.

[**_I need 275 supporters to step up with a donation today to ensure we have the resources to grow our youth-powered movement and engage young voters across the country. Can you rush a few dollar now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/UMik3zEwWBplyhIUSgAB3g~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoUeumP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDYxNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuX3JzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJoc04yQndGQ0FJMnFiR2NEaHk3VWVzMWphRSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yaHNOMkJ3RkNBSTJxYkdjRGh5N1VlczFqYUUmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmhzTjJCd0ZDQUkycWJHY0RoeTdVZXMxamFFVwNzcGNCCmZupmZvZmH6IMVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

Peter, young people are the driving force for change. We’ve already seen what happens when my generation turns out to the polls: **Democrats win._Democracy wins._**

With so much on the line – like taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and ensuring our democracy stays intact – young people are paying more attention than ever before. But these risks alone won’t guarantee that they’ll head to the ballot box.

We need to reach young people where they are and _genuinely engage_ with them to bring them into this movement. That’s how we beat Trump and re-elect President Biden. That’s how we save the future of our democracy.

**But now, MAGA Republicans are TERRIFIED and desperate to stop young people from rising up in the next election, so I need your help.**

[**_To keep our youth-powered movement strong in the face of MAGA attacks, I’ll need an unstoppable grassroots movement behind me. clean_body: | Peter – As the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, I know the power my generation holds in securing a better future for our country. But if Trump wins reelection, that future will be turned upside down. That’s why I’m traveling to battleground states across the country to engage with Gen Z voters and turn them out to the polls this year for President Biden. We NEED to fire up young voters to prevent another Trump presidency. My generation deserves a say in our future, so I’m taking this youth-powered movement to new heights and making sure our voices are heard this November. But that makes me a top target for attacks from MAGA Republicans who want to shut out our generation at the polls. So I’m counting on your support, Peter. Because when we all come together, we can create an unstoppable movement that MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance against. Peter, young people are the driving force for change. We’ve already seen what happens when my generation turns out to the polls: Democrats win.Democracy wins. With so much on the line – like taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and ensuring our democracy stays intact – young people are paying more attention than ever before. But these risks alone won’t guarantee that they’ll head to the ballot box. We need to reach young people where they are and genuinely engage with them to bring them into this movement. That’s how we beat Trump and re-elect President Biden. That’s how we save the future of our democracy. But now, MAGA Republicans are TERRIFIED and desperate to stop young people from rising up in the next election, so I need your help. | | | | ~~ | ~~ ~ In this together, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. name: Martin Sheen
subject: Please, join me in supporting Elissa Slotkin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)

Dear friends,
My name is Martin Sheen. But you probably know me best as President Jed Bartlet on _The West Wing._
The show, and President Bartlet, have come to represent the very best of what American political leadership should be: leadership defined by integrity, hard work, and an unrelenting commitment to our highest ideals as Americans.
Ever since I left President Bartlet behind, I’ve done all I can to support leaders who embody the qualities we tried to depict on _The West Wing._
And that’s why I am reaching out today. Meet Elissa Slotkin. She’s a CIA analyst who served alongside our military on three tours in Iraq, White House national security expert under two presidents, and Congresswoman with a track record of winning in tough districts and delivering for her constituents. Now, she’s running to represent the state of Michigan in the U.S. Senate.
[**Leaders like Elissa don’t come around every day, so I’m reaching out to you ahead of a key fundraising deadline on June 30. Will you join me in chipping in $3 to Elissa to help keep her campaign on track in a critical swing state?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240616-2&t=2&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-june24.vxqhA1&amount=3&refcode=em240616-2&t=21&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)**
---

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-june24.KtZUXe&refcode=em240616-2&t=24&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-june24.pLxOQF&refcode=em240616-2&t=25&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-june24.vxqhA1&refcode=em240616-2&t=26&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)**
---
****
See, candidates get all the headlines, but elections are about much more than the names on the ballot. They’re about all of us, as citizens, making a statement about what kind of country we want to live in, and taking small but important actions to change our politics for the better. That means voting, volunteering, talking to your friends and neighbors, and yes, making a monetary contribution to a campaign.
Each day, we get closer to November 5, 2024, perhaps the most consequential election of our lives, and almost certainly an inflection point for American democracy.
I may have played a president on TV, but today, I’m coming to you as a fellow citizen, asking you to join me in supporting a principled, tough, and thoughtful leader in Elissa in getting to the U.S. Senate. Will you donate today?
[**With the most important deadline of this campaign to date in just two weeks, Elissa could use all the support we can give her.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240616-2&t=27&akid=1538%2E135344%2EyP9oig)

I may have played a president on TV, but today, I’m coming to you as a fellow citizen, asking you to join me in supporting a principled, tough, and thoughtful leader in Elissa in getting to the U.S. Senate. Will you donate today? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Martin Sheen PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

body:
Democrats: “The Biden coalition is soft.”

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=memo_moveon&n=1)

Peter, Have you heard about the new strategy memo released by DNC allies MoveOn and Third Way?
---
[ ](www.jillstein2024.com/donate)
---
They consider your vote a **threat**.

**Here’s their plan** : tell any lie and use every dirty trick to try to determine who’s on your ballot and who you can vote for. Otherwise they would have to face the truth.

Biden isn’t popular.
---
[ ](www.jillstein2024.com/donate)
---
This shocking line is from their own memo: **“The Biden coalition is soft.”**

It’s not hard to understand why.

\- Americans do not support genocide or any politician that enables one.

\- Bidenomics has failed the working and middle class - and helped the rich.

\- Biden ran against Trump policies only to implement them as president.
_...among many other reasons._ We can’t let the DNC and their attack dogs take a wrecking ball to our democracy in their effort to save Biden's failing reelection bid.

That’s why we need your support to combat these increasing attacks on Jill and our movement for people, planet, and peace.

**_Peter, will you donate $24 or any amount that fits your budget right now to help us stay on track to meet our June ballot access goals?_**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: The finish line is in sight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240616-2&t=1&akid=820%2E587540%2EG8jhyx)
Peter,
**We’re sure you’ve heard about the end-of-quarter deadline at the end of June.**
Like most organizations and campaigns, Leaders We Deserve has to report what we’ve raised publicly after the FEC deadline on June 30. That means we’ve only got a couple more weeks left to prove the strength of this grassroots movement.
**Our co-founders David Hogg and Kevin Lata set a $10,000 fundraising goal this weekend** to make sure we’re on track for the big one at the end of the month. As of right now, we need a few more folks like you to help us across the finish line.
Reaching this goal is make-or-break as we work to elect the next generation of leaders, like Nate Douglas in Florida, Dante Pittman in North Carolina, and Sarah McBride in Delaware. These candidates can all win if we keep up our support. But if we fall short, we may have to scale back our efforts in these competitive races. And every dollar counts — believe us, we know! Our last race for Molly Cook she won by less than 74 votes!
[**Please — pitch in $5 or anything you can ahead of our midnight deadline!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240616-2?refcode=em20240616-2&amount=5&refcode2=820_587540_G8jhyx&akid=820%2E587540%2EG8jhyx)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240616-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240616-2-820&refcode2=820_587540_G8jhyx&akid=820%2E587540%2EG8jhyx)**
Thanks for all of your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240616-2&t=2&refcode2=820_587540_G8jhyx&akid=820%2E587540%2EG8jhyx)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=820%2E587540%2EG8jhyx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=820%2E587540%2EG8jhyx)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
