name: Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmLIbc4sIKoRtbZRfokKNGrk1rWNBo2Ld3kYuMvPeZA-Hvp__NprDUJdOhoOO9qM8LFjq9sIzsksWNa2-3d9YQHLCO2VLi5SxYOg4nZHZHXhqOULKIkStdogzP-REHLZvljDM_9QsTzegB0J7PMGqOG3OHcTVkHiTaSZ7m4-jSNao)

Fellow American,

I can't tell you how much it means to me that you opened this. Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these messages from me?

I do have to ask a quick favor of you - I'm simply asking you to read this all the way through. If you finish reading this and you still think a $1 donation doesn't matter, then I want to just say [**thank you for hearing me out.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmGGdOZ1lLbdqke7AKp0qGEYrwPmpjEmAoz3jb8qnvnTgAsEapz4ZvI_GaDv1gPhE46rdaY2Xxy-uy4FrDsZQ4B0T9_0Z0sEytJ4VFRUCiX8bm6MmrocDeAJVFq2yy92yeaMdzRmPT7lt6vPq0vU1n5b2Gvn8K2Znzab8l1TwY_tf)

While only about 25% of our friends are opening messages from me and my team, [**only about 1%**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmHiAVllq5T3L21B0SMZ4a7GeKBk_4EtPZ_OJxlMJ0JaJH7kdQe-jcG7AeHkssTWJD7gtA0fuLbwFHJp3rPhstCFI4be6M3r2Upz78iaTU0xQv6v5APci99TOsWeOk-fqS5sL4-CCQfwA_Q38uW4jZ4BkQzQMxLxSqdZr786yeCvM) will go the extra mile by donating! I'm not exaggerating when I say this, Fellow American, conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires that I can call on to hit these goals. [**I rely on the couple of bucks that hard -working Americans receiving these messages can afford to give me from time to time.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmKhsirYVYQ7EinohKbRxp5Dhk8eqQge_deDJiz9lJXDG0FhvU-PR8Wq__8fyozjfjTN7zXSpEqy-O7pD4O_4yC_zqOxyxlzlY3GH-iOUPeySm7C4tua7my-OsMZsJsB5hJh8KDTJkj4XSxfh-_5HHOHZSP7jLTrIlJNw_RWeQQpL)

If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit - even just $1 - we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' _MASSIVE_ campaign coffers.

[**I'll be honest...**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmBNE9qxSVscdJOKrbTz-6t0zLZQaiWZBr5ZVltkGMSXZ213Jt6bb5p4ZmKpLSc1C8mPeuPWrE3QmqeF4GBOTbEWVqMxDo6keTaKjDxjWfI1OZi73dzTDYSmJCjNrId_iu-2SvO6R5Q5t5QaK7JIjokuWz-GH5WBuhAQkc0b6Dnkn)
The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit of support we can get if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. If we're going to stay on pace to reach all of our goals, I truly need your help.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmIGMWWg44luKHYk8KHWKW-rhuOWVlyl-zRgowS8tGDk8F2VWly6Y8ZGTLeW4I4iRn9NNiYMj3j55ZGy0xoQ0ZLrmtdb5OJr_WQ8JDgvW3dleMd3pwg-Owt7z49rgSEJvFEbyzOiX_qryBBFCXK2riVAhw22K9xaQeO4qAEzoJ5sI)

[**I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a single cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a jelly doughnut. The Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my next crucial Goal.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmOngAvCg7dlTA_unqSx1Lk8WXQlsPY16Ukoxtf_dfrA9BSbmLp75wVoVz6Sh0UYSRVRhTQluzoVEgtPOuQKf2Kvz3i_ere3pa_goc93xT5tL6TvzcRSD_GAuPa0-ZMpX-9l7Qz42ov_WNEAlhpQMbLCFIRMQP013hK_P2UIu4r6g)

[**☕ CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A CUP OF COFFEE ☕**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmDOm1kbDNQO0lF0XCWLtaRZC2VgV_vnQyC6iN6uMbdxyplSOXiaidtDGwYdgE-KKi8uzeex7G2WwIo3k2hWe1Q7o_pI0nhDO9VWnYJ9LSx1if0QB2unM4qAMFdsVePTEpEgDszt_LqRwCaxMArzdQgx16YNDmSL-0HdO9GWai7vY)
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you._

_They're hoping you give up on me._

_They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._

We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to work for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I [**need**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a4b06bd670d44588383a267025eea87&_e=ZdAJ_ZQ8JOvBcE25NsdjFNw5LkMBnATZkmO4MzQeNQ4rPlZ5jirLdYbWfILesEBov885H1C8EQORxaaeOKZyG2YvwyoooiOHmN08xDlEw5PXSSNrcwJa14aTaLCmL4-TndvRiSE0E3h9XmRBv_14wdN7fNta6muXOE-Qv9CFqCDNJH2zr2YYRFms2jUS-lvwlv3bsVz5KGz5Hk4quI4OyTZTWitvOLHx_gPiKI3KBaNDdpVcNXiD1JYDYfF4gDxL3mJCJcdUp3EDGgRGlypJ_NsMXdMiy4N0jx5_hf_rg8TCC0PI-GSepInUENqNGMFlUXaaMKe7XnvMDj8BsP_kmEwgNSmDWs0_IJtcpFvozeCj14LM1CB2_bHk2nmQiajh1zffJgmWOLdIZYlVNLCXzjXhoz2YIfvsrDaGg_ld1IKe9Jj9azsM9dQ9JUUfT1rhPTSs94xIfcaVMpStvDf76fQULzDzIErEOm5UeE245bV8Yp1LhE9JIQCkg2ykbLFQ) patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

clean_body: | Fellow American, I can't tell you how much it means to me that you opened this. Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these messages from me? I do have to ask a quick favor of you - I'm simply asking you to read this all the way through. If you finish reading this and you still think a $1 donation doesn't matter, then I want to just say While only about 25% of our friends are opening messages from me and my team, will go the extra mile by donating! I'm not exaggerating when I say this, Fellow American, conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with supporters like you. I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires that I can call on to hit these goals. If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit - even just $1 - we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' MASSIVE campaign coffers. The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit of support we can get if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. If we're going to stay on pace to reach all of our goals, I truly need your help. Democrats are hoping I give up on you. They're hoping you give up on me. They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether. We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to work for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. Thank you, Marco Rubio (R-FL) If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Team Kennedy
subject: In it to win it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
It's time for new leadership and hope in the White House!

|
---
| | | [It's time for new leadership and hope in the White House!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_6_16_24_non_donor_1&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_6_16_24_non_donor_1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The biggest obstacle Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has faced as a presidential candidate so far is people thinking he can't win.
But we have a reliable poll that shows otherwise.
A massive 50-state poll from Zogby – the most robust poll yet on the outcome of the 2024 presidential election – shows that RFK Jr. can win!
The poll asked over 26,000 likely voters who they would vote for in three head-to-head scenarios and found:
* Biden vs. Trump: Trump wins by a comfortable margin.
* Trump vs. Kennedy: Kennedy wins in a close race.
* Kennedy vs. Biden: Kennedy wins in a landslide.

If you know anything about polling, 26,000 is a massive sample size,compared to the much smaller samples mainstream media outlets use. _Zogby's polling is the most statistically accurate presidential poll to date!_
These results mean President Biden _cannot_ beat President Trump in any matchup. The only scenario in which Trump does not win this election is in a head-to-head against Robert F. Kennedy Jr!
These results are a game-changer. They prove that RFK Jr. is the candidate who can unite Americans and lead our country to a brighter future. But to turn these winning chances into a reality, [we need your financial help today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_6_16_24_non_donor_1&n=3).
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_6_16_24_non_donor_1&n=4)

Even with historic polling numbers, 20% of the electorate is still unaware Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is running for President.
[By investing in our campaign today, you are helping us build the momentum and resources we need to secure victory in 2024!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_6_16_24_non_donor_1&n=9)
Even if you have donated before, please stand with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and help us send a message to the DC Establishment: It's time for new leadership and hope in the White House!
[We can and will win in November with your help today!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_6_16_24_non_donor_1&n=10)

name: SB
subject: our deadline was extended – but only until midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I know my team already reached out, but I needed to personally ask for your help before midnight tonight. **We just fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal, and we need to get back on track ASAP. **
Here's why: We're entering the homestretch of the election. The GOP is spending recording-breaking amounts to flood the airwaves with attack ads against me – and our team is working around the clock to set the record straight and get our pro-worker message out to millions of voters.

**It might be hard to believe, but the resources we raise _now_ – not in November – will have the biggest impact on our ability to win this race. That's why hitting our fundraising goals is so important, and why falling short would be so costly.**
This is going to be, without a doubt, my toughest election yet. I'm up against a Trump-backed, self-funding millionaire, Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs, and the full weight of the GOP. **So I'm asking: Are you with me? **

**[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in now to help us get back on track so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87031242/479807187/691330008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2016-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJkOGJlMy0zNDJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvwE5WzlkkpDYnSjxwwly3YtlZOuKBKbhLBIP_Nj8MA=)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My coming out story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, this is Tammy Baldwin. Can I share something with you? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service. But I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87031270/479807389/-83437346?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QyNmM5MS0zNTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2mrixlwpZk-ypLPNX_5pfM89GrGERf-hAy4B1Rc_04=) After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both: **I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did.** When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. **[I’m facing my most competitive and expensive reelection yet, so I can’t keep up this work without your help. Will you help me continue to make a difference by splitting a donation between Tina Smith and my reelection campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87031271/479807390/-83437346?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QyNmM5MS0zNTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2mrixlwpZk-ypLPNX_5pfM89GrGERf-hAy4B1Rc_04=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87031272/479807391/-83437346?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240616_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QyNmM5MS0zNTJjLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2mrixlwpZk-ypLPNX_5pfM89GrGERf-hAy4B1Rc_04=)

clean_body: | Hi there, this is Tammy Baldwin. Can I share something with you? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service. But I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. = After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both: I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did. When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We have made incredible progress over the years in the fight for equality — but folks, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ+ youth. In 2024 alone, 515 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across the country. It’s going to take all of us to counter these right wing attacks so everyone grows up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion — not hatred and division — are American values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your ongoing support. Let’s recommit ourselves to work towards the day when all LGBTQ+ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. Happy Pride! 🏳️🌈 — Tammy Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
We’re worried, Peter. | | |
---
**We're** worried, Peter. In **short** , polling shows this race is statistically tied and Donald Trump just raised $141 million. We know it’s hard to take Trump seriously with his long rants on Truth Social and his taunts against his political opponents. But we cannot risk losing sight **of** the stakes in this election. Trump and MAGA Republicans have **an ambitious** laundry list of unconstitutional and authoritarian “tasks” with one **goal** in mind: _to take away our fundamental freedoms and destroy democracy as we know it._ They’re _counting_ on this team to fall short so they **can** impose cruel restrictions on reproductive health care, completely overhaul public education, and erase the progress on racial equality and LGBTQ+ rights that supporters like **you** have fought so hard to protect. We hate to put this thought in your head, but **please consider** how disastrous a second Trump term would be for our country. Remember the fear we all felt the day after he was elected, and how those fears were realized time and time again. Here’s the good news: If everyone is **pitching in $25** at a time **or whatever** you can afford when **you can afford** it, then we will have the resources necessary **to** beat Trump and **the** millions of dollars he’s receiving from his billionaire backers. The **Biden-Harris reelection campaign** is powered by grassroots supporters just like you, Peter, and we’re proud of that fact. It really adds up when we’re all pitching in here and there. That’s why we need you **before our** Q2 fundraising numbers go public. The amount we raise right now will have a direct impact on the programs we need to run before folks start voting. So, it’s important that we do not fall short ahead of this **June FEC deadline**. [We’re short of an ambitious goal. clean_body: We’re worried, Peter. | | | We're worried, Peter. In short , polling shows this race is statistically tied and Donald Trump just raised $141 million. We know it’s hard to take Trump seriously with his long rants on Truth Social and his taunts against his political opponents. But we cannot risk losing sight of the stakes in this election. Trump and MAGA Republicans have an ambitious laundry list of unconstitutional and authoritarian “tasks” with one goal in mind: to take away our fundamental freedoms and destroy democracy as we know it. They’re counting on this team to fall short so they can impose cruel restrictions on reproductive health care, completely overhaul public education, and erase the progress on racial equality and LGBTQ+ rights that supporters like you have fought so hard to protect. We hate to put this thought in your head, but please consider how disastrous a second Trump term would be for our country. Remember the fear we all felt the day after he was elected, and how those fears were realized time and time again. Here’s the good news: If everyone is pitching in $25 at a time or whatever you can afford when you can afford it, then we will have the resources necessary to beat Trump and the millions of dollars he’s receiving from his billionaire backers. The Biden-Harris reelection campaign is powered by grassroots supporters just like you, Peter, and we’re proud of that fact. It really adds up when we’re all pitching in here and there. That’s why we need you before our Q2 fundraising numbers go public. The amount we raise right now will have a direct impact on the programs we need to run before folks start voting. So, it’s important that we do not fall short ahead of this June FEC deadline. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance, Biden-Harris HQ

name: Gloria Steinem
subject: We need to stand by leaders like Jacky
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-rosen.0KQoJv&refcode=em240616-3-30&refcode2=2489.734936.r9QTsz&t=1&akid=2489%2E734936%2Er9QTsz)
---
Hi Peter,
I’m very grateful for the courageous leadership of women like Jacky Rosen, who advocate for reproductive freedom as an essential human right. This vision, embraced by the majority of women nationwide, demands our collective effort and determination.
That’s why we need a leader like Jacky in the Senate, Peter. Over the past few years, unprecedented attacks on abortion access have set our country back decades. Jacky has fought to defend and restore abortion rights. She recognizes that equality between men and women is crucial to the success of our nation. If we can’t make decisions over our own reproductive lives, we are not living in a democracy.
Right now, Jacky is the most vulnerable woman in the Senate and a top target for anti-abortion GOP extremists in Washington. The latest New York Times poll shows her TIED against her far-right opponent, and _The Cook Political Report_ has downgraded her race to a "Toss Up."
With Republican dark-money groups like the Koch network flooding Nevada with millions of dollars, it’s crucial that we do everything we can to help Jacky defend her must-win Senate seat – and fast.
Remember, the last Senate race in Nevada was decided by only 7,928 votes, and Jacky’s race is shaping up to be just as close. This means that every single dollar of support makes a difference in ensuring that we don’t put the future of abortion rights in the hands of the GOP. [**With Nevada’s general election underway, will you join me in splitting $5 or more now between Jacky’s campaign and Ruben Gallego to help her win in Nevada, defend Senate control, and protect our reproductive rights? This is an investment in our future and our freedom.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-rosen.0KQoJv&refcode=em240616-3-30&t=2&akid=2489%2E734936%2Er9QTsz)

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Week 23: Legislative update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=62902a22f3&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

As a legislator, I have one main duty to execute: help pass a balanced budget. Alas, this week was FINALLY budget week at the Arizona state capitol. We have a divided government with a democrat overseeing the executive branch and the Republicans holding a slim majority in both the House and Senate in the legislative branch. This year’s budget that we passed was lower than previous years and we were able to rein in our government to boot. The proposed state budget will eliminate a $1.4 billion dollar deficit _and_ it shrinks government. Our caucus worked to protect $350 million in scheduled transportation projects approved in last year’s budget.

With a divided government the $16.1 billion dollar state budget protects critical government services we rely upon to function. Most government agencies saw their budgets reduced by 3.5% – except for the Departments of Public Safety, Corrections Child Safety, and the Auditor General.

**_FACT_** : The Republican-leaning legislature didn’t irresponsibly tap into our state’s rainy-day fund to balance the budget like some Democrat legislators had requested and continued to suggest we do while we were passing the budget bills into the late evening on Saturday night.

_Week in review_

On Monday, SB 1370 (aka the “lemonade stands” bill) passed the Senate on a final read along party line and was transmitted to the governor on June 13th. I still can’t believe why the Democrats are against allowing Arizona kids to have a lemonade stand without a business license and without having to pay taxes. Even blue states with Democratic governors have passed similar legislation and had it signed into law.

On Wednesday, SB 1435 passed the House and was transmitted to the governor on June 13th. This bill ultimately protects our school aged kids by holding our schools accountable during the hiring process.

Also, the Senate voted on HB 2665. Sadly, most of the Senate Democrats voted NO. This bill would create tougher penalties for child sex traffickers and greater protections for the young victims of these heinous crimes.

On Thursday morning, I toured a prison reentry program near the capitol. Phoenix West is a minimum security facility whose primary focus is to reduce recidivism. This 200-bed second chance center is where inmates serve the last 8-9 weeks of their sentence and participate in various programming to best prepare them for reentry into society. They have been a success story with their wrap-around services and their continuum of care programs.

On Friday morning, I submitted a pro publicity pamphlet statement for Proposition 313 to the Secretary of State. As you may recall, earlier this legislative session I sponsored SCR 1021 to end child sex trafficking in Arizona. The passage of Prop. 313 will send a powerful message: Arizona’s children are not for sale. If you buy or sell our minor children, you are going to prison for natural life. It is time to hold criminals accountable for trafficking minor children. I hope you will join me come November in voting to save our most precious resource by being on the side of saving children. Keep in mind: my general election opponent decided to walk off the House floor and skip this crucial vote protecting our kids! How shameful.

On Saturday, SB 1630 passed the Senate on final read. Also, on Saturday all the Senate Democrats voted NO to allow Arizona voters to ban foreign donations in our election administration. Last year, Louisiana voters overwhelmingly voted 72.57% in favor of banning foreign donations in their state’s elections. Sadly, we didn’t have all 16 Republican senators in the building to pass it for you to vote on come November. This is the same important piece of legislation I sponsored earlier this session that passed the Senate, but the Republican House Chair on Elections refused to hold a hearing on this bill.

>From Wednesday through Saturday, between budget briefings, negotiations and passing 15 budget bills spanning K-12 education to general appropriations we spent time voting out all remaining House and Senate bills to be sent to the governor before the Fifty-sixth Legislature, Second Regular Session adjourned Sine Die, Saturday, June 15, 2024, at 9:55 p.m. – 160 days this legislature was at the capitol conducting the people’s work.

_2024-2025 Budget Highlights_

We passed a balanced and leaner fiscal year 2024-2025 [state budget](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b0eecf5a61&e=a7ab36849c) that eliminates a $1.4 billion shortfall, reducing on-going spending and shrinking government. This budget protected school choice, fully funded public safety, increased necessary border security investments, and safeguarded more than $520 million invested in our state’s infrastructure.

_Here are just a few budget highlights:_
* Cut fees for Maricopa County drivers on emissions testing by 5%
* Prohibited state board fee increases on Arizonans for the next two years
* Trimmed fat from state agencies
* Reduced state spending by $1.7 billion below the 2023-2024 enacted budget (a 10% reduction)
* Reduced ongoing spending by $330 million
* Protected school choice programs- both Empowerment Scholarship Accounts and School Tuition Organizations are funded for continued growth
* Protected Arizona Freedom Schools
* Maintained law enforcement funding, while adding $5 million for local border security support and $4 million for fentanyl interdiction and law enforcement response
* Added additional full-time employees to reduce concealed carry permit application and renewal time frames, and
* Made necessary policy and spending reforms to the Arizona Commerce Authority, the Arizona Department of Transportation, the Industrial Commission of Arizona, and the Board of Technical Registration per some of the Auditor General’s recommendations.

This week I received additional primary endorsements, including endorsements from the Arizona Chamber of Commerce & Industry and the Arizona Nurses Association.

In this week’s snail mail, you should have received your primary election publicity pamphlet. If you live in District 2, you should have seen my biography and candidate statement. If you haven’t opened your mailbox, yet, this is what my published biography and statement said:

_Biography:_ The Honorable Shawnna LM Bolick has been an effective legislator for her district since she was elected to serve in 2018. With a strong policy and research background, she is a dynamic leader advancing educational freedom, tax reform, election integrity, protecting our children, countering fentanyl abuse, and working to end human trafficking. Bolick is the current State Senator in District 2. In 2020, Bolick was re-elected to the Arizona House of Representatives in a swing district. Bolick is a Republican, wife, and mother of two. Shawnna and her family reside in Phoenix, AZ with their three greyhounds.

_Statement:_ Dear Neighbor: Actions and accomplishments speak louder than hollow rhetoric. Since 2019, I have represented you with a common-sense voice at the State Capitol. I have supported legislation to secure our border, reduce our taxes, decrease regulatory burdens on small businesses, make housing more affordable, lower inflation on our food and housing costs, increase educational options, protect and secure the integrity of our elections, counter fentanyl from entering our communities, advance consumer protection measures, and end child sex trafficking. When I am re-elected, I will continue to advocate for these priorities. I have never backed down from doing what is right, earning the “Champion of Liberty” award in 2021 from the Republican Liberty Caucus. I have always worked hard to support our Republican candidates in the general election. I am a wife, mom, and protector of our children. I will continue to be a check on Hobbs’ radical agenda. Please visit my website at www.BolickforArizona.com to learn more or ask questions, and I humbly ask for your support. Thank you! Shawnna

Now, that our legislative session is behind me, I will be spending all my free time campaigning to help maintain our Republican majority at the Capitol. The Republican primary will take place on July 30th, but we will be executing get-out-the-vote efforts leading up to the actual primary date. I look forward to working with you to save our state from a takeover by the far left. They have earmarked $2 million to buy this State Senate seat in November. We need to WIN in July to have a ticket to the big dance.

If you live in [District 2](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=30487cac88&e=a7ab36849c) and you would like a yard sign, we can deliver one directly to you as well. Please let us know if you'd like to volunteer. We will put you to work. Thank you to all our volunteers who have joined the Bolick Brigade so far and we welcome additional volunteers to help save our state. Thank you for your continued support!

**Finally, a big shout out to our amazing Dads – HAPPY FATHER’S DAY to you all!! **

Take care,
Shawnna

With a divided government the $16.1 billion dollar state budget protects critical government services we rely upon to function. Most government agencies saw their budgets reduced by 3.5% – except for the Departments of Public Safety, Corrections Child Safety, and the Auditor General. FACT : The Republican-leaning legislature didn’t irresponsibly tap into our state’s rainy-day fund to balance the budget like some Democrat legislators had requested and continued to suggest we do while we were passing the budget bills into the late evening on Saturday night. Week in review On Monday, SB 1370 (aka the “lemonade stands” bill) passed the Senate on a final read along party line and was transmitted to the governor on June 13th. I still can’t believe why the Democrats are against allowing Arizona kids to have a lemonade stand without a business license and without having to pay taxes. Even blue states with Democratic governors have passed similar legislation and had it signed into law. On Wednesday, SB 1435 passed the House and was transmitted to the governor on June 13th. This bill ultimately protects our school aged kids by holding our schools accountable during the hiring process. Also, the Senate voted on HB 2665. Sadly, most of the Senate Democrats voted NO. This bill would create tougher penalties for child sex traffickers and greater protections for the young victims of these heinous crimes. On Thursday morning, I toured a prison reentry program near the capitol. Phoenix West is a minimum security facility whose primary focus is to reduce recidivism. This 200-bed second chance center is where inmates serve the last 8-9 weeks of their sentence and participate in various programming to best prepare them for reentry into society. They have been a success story with their wrap-around services and their continuum of care programs. On Friday morning, I submitted a pro publicity pamphlet statement for Proposition 313 to the Secretary of State. As you may recall, earlier this legislative session I sponsored SCR 1021 to end child sex trafficking in Arizona. The passage of Prop. 313 will send a powerful message: Arizona’s children are not for sale. If you buy or sell our minor children, you are going to prison for natural life. It is time to hold criminals accountable for trafficking minor children. I hope you will join me come November in voting to save our most precious resource by being on the side of saving children. Keep in mind: my general election opponent decided to walk off the House floor and skip this crucial vote protecting our kids! How shameful. On Saturday, SB 1630 passed the Senate on final read. Also, on Saturday all the Senate Democrats voted NO to allow Arizona voters to ban foreign donations in our election administration. Last year, Louisiana voters overwhelmingly voted 72.57% in favor of banning foreign donations in their state’s elections. Sadly, we didn’t have all 16 Republican senators in the building to pass it for you to vote on come November. This is the same important piece of legislation I sponsored earlier this session that passed the Senate, but the Republican House Chair on Elections refused to hold a hearing on this bill. From Wednesday through Saturday, between budget briefings, negotiations and passing 15 budget bills spanning K-12 education to general appropriations we spent time voting out all remaining House and Senate bills to be sent to the governor before the Fifty-sixth Legislature, Second Regular Session adjourned Sine Die, Saturday, June 15, 2024, at 9:55 p.m. – 160 days this legislature was at the capitol conducting the people’s work. 2024-2025 Budget Highlights We passed a balanced and leaner fiscal year 2024-2025 that eliminates a $1.4 billion shortfall, reducing on-going spending and shrinking government. This budget protected school choice, fully funded public safety, increased necessary border security investments, and safeguarded more than $520 million invested in our state’s infrastructure. Here are just a few budget highlights: Cut fees for Maricopa County drivers on emissions testing by 5% Prohibited state board fee increases on Arizonans for the next two years Trimmed fat from state agencies Reduced state spending by $1.7 billion below the 2023-2024 enacted budget (a 10% reduction) Reduced ongoing spending by $330 million Protected school choice programs- both Empowerment Scholarship Accounts and School Tuition Organizations are funded for continued growth Protected Arizona Freedom Schools Maintained law enforcement funding, while adding $5 million for local border security support and $4 million for fentanyl interdiction and law enforcement response Added additional full-time employees to reduce concealed carry permit application and renewal time frames, and Made necessary policy and spending reforms to the Arizona Commerce Authority, the Arizona Department of Transportation, the Industrial Commission of Arizona, and the Board of Technical Registration per some of the Auditor General’s recommendations. This week I received additional primary endorsements, including endorsements from the Arizona Chamber of Commerce & Industry and the Arizona Nurses Association. In this week’s snail mail, you should have received your primary election publicity pamphlet. If you live in District 2, you should have seen my biography and candidate statement. If you haven’t opened your mailbox, yet, this is what my published biography and statement said: Biography: The Honorable Shawnna LM Bolick has been an effective legislator for her district since she was elected to serve in 2018. With a strong policy and research background, she is a dynamic leader advancing educational freedom, tax reform, election integrity, protecting our children, countering fentanyl abuse, and working to end human trafficking. Bolick is the current State Senator in District 2. In 2020, Bolick was re-elected to the Arizona House of Representatives in a swing district. Bolick is a Republican, wife, and mother of two. Shawnna and her family reside in Phoenix, AZ with their three greyhounds. Statement: Dear Neighbor: Actions and accomplishments speak louder than hollow rhetoric. Since 2019, I have represented you with a common-sense voice at the State Capitol. I have supported legislation to secure our border, reduce our taxes, decrease regulatory burdens on small businesses, make housing more affordable, lower inflation on our food and housing costs, increase educational options, protect and secure the integrity of our elections, counter fentanyl from entering our communities, advance consumer protection measures, and end child sex trafficking. When I am re-elected, I will continue to advocate for these priorities. I have never backed down from doing what is right, earning the “Champion of Liberty” award in 2021 from the Republican Liberty Caucus. I have always worked hard to support our Republican candidates in the general election. I am a wife, mom, and protector of our children. I will continue to be a check on Hobbs’ radical agenda. Please visit my website at www.BolickforArizona.com to learn more or ask questions, and I humbly ask for your support. Thank you! Shawnna Now, that our legislative session is behind me, I will be spending all my free time campaigning to help maintain our Republican majority at the Capitol. The Republican primary will take place on July 30th, but we will be executing get-out-the-vote efforts leading up to the actual primary date. I look forward to working with you to save our state from a takeover by the far left. They have earmarked $2 million to buy this State Senate seat in November. We need to WIN in July to have a ticket to the big dance. If you live in and you would like a yard sign, we can deliver one directly to you as well. Please let us know if you'd like to volunteer. We will put you to work. Thank you to all our volunteers who have joined the Bolick Brigade so far and we welcome additional volunteers to help save our state. Thank you for your continued support! Finally, a big shout out to our amazing Dads – HAPPY FATHER’S DAY to you all!! Take care, Shawnna | | "Donate" | | "Volunteer" | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. AUTHORIZED BY SHAWNNA BOLICK. | | Copyright © 2024 Vote Bolick, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Vote Bolick 610 E. Bell Road 2-142 Phoenix, AZ 85022 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Vote Bolick c/o Shawnna Bolick 610 E. Bell Rd. #2-142 Phoenix, AZ 85022 USA

# Rallying Rural Democrats
# Your $1 Can Make a Difference!
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/341?refcode=341)
---
Dear friend, In the heart of every rural community lies the spirit of resilience, unity, and hope. As Democrats committed to empowering every voice, we understand the importance of amplifying the concerns and aspirations of rural America. Today, we invite you to be a part of a movement that embodies these values and drives real change for all Americans. If every person on our list pitches in $1, we’ll soar **three months ahead** of our fundraising goals. That means more resources to **support Democratic candidates who champion rural interests** , more capacity to engage in **vital grassroots organizing** , and more impact in **amplifying the voices of our communities**. Your dollar isn’t just a drop in the bucket; it’s a ripple that can turn into a wave of change. It symbolizes your commitment to building a future where every rural American has access to quality healthcare, education, and economic opportunity. We understand times are tough, but your small investment today can yield immense returns tomorrow. Together, we can build a stronger, more resilient future for rural America. **We need the House, Senate, and Presidency** to accomplish change in 2024. It's possible, and it's vital if we want our democracy to withstand the attacks on our civil infrastructure waged by MAGA Republicans. **We need to pass legisaltion for reproductive rights**. Republicans may hold the Supreme Court, but we can pass federal abortion legislation if we have the House, Senate and Presidency in 2024. **We need smart green policy to avoid future catastrophe**. These next years a crucial tipping point as we get closer and closer to 1.5 degrees celsius of global warming. We already spent last summer under a haze of wildfire smoke. Even $1 helps us uplift progressive voices pushing for climate-friendly policy. [**Will you stand with us? Click here to donate $1 and be a part of shaping a brighter tomorrow.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/341?refcode=341&amount=1&express_lane=true)

name: Robert (Debbie's husband)
subject: The best Father's Day gift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Will you join me in supporting my wife, Debbie, this Father's Day?
| | |
---
Hi there, friend — it’s Robert, Debbie’s husband.
I want to wish a very Happy Father’s Day to all of the fellow dads and father figures in Florida and around the country. Today, I’m spending the day with Debbie and our three beautiful children, Willow, Jude, and Siena. But before jumping back into the festivities, I want to take a quick moment to touch base with you all.
I wouldn’t be who I am today without Debbie. She’s an incredible wife, mother to our kids, and public servant — and guess what? **She’s also a fierce fighter when it comes to Florida and protecting hardworking families. **
That’s how I know she’s the leader our great state deserves. She truly is the kindest and most generous person I’ve ever met — and I've been her biggest supporter from the very beginning. As a father, I worry greatly about my children's futures, and I know that with extremist Republicans like Rick Scott in charge, they won’t have the same opportunities my wife and I had growing up.
**So, one of the greatest gifts for me this Father’s Day is getting Debbie the 50,000 official grassroots endorsements she needs to become Florida’s next U.S. senator. **[Friend: Will you please give my family the best Father’s Day gift and add your name to endorse Debbie's campaign before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87031652/479809047/-433290475?refcode=jtk1365-su-nd&code=jtk1365-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk4ODc4MTAtMzkyYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SydpSBbCTO0Iiy9hUf3PlojxOlw3D4lK9LBfzM2ZVNc=&emci=614eee09-bc29-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=19887810-392c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)
| | [Endorse Debbie's Campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87031653/479809048/-433290475?refcode=jtk1365-su-nd&code=jtk1365-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk4ODc4MTAtMzkyYy1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SydpSBbCTO0Iiy9hUf3PlojxOlw3D4lK9LBfzM2ZVNc=&emci=614eee09-bc29-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=19887810-392c-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)

— Robert Powell

subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene and I exchanged words

body:
|
---
Peter, it’s Jasmine Crockett, the Democrat representing Texas’ 30th Congressional District.

During a recent committee session in the House, Marjorie Taylor Greene decided to insult my appearance.

MAGA Marge knows it's against the rules to do so...

_Yet she refused to apologize!_

It is beyond outrageous that someone like Marjorie Taylor Greene ended up in Congress. Disagreement on policy is a worthy debate in the People's House. But talking badly about what I look like? Really?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87031804/479809632/-1680394011?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240616_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3ZTcxYTc1LTNhMmMtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PXSDxGECSUx1Py0Um5oiaX2jVA8kldfPE3vUhHu5o1A=)
